Across three fundamentally distinct benchmarks including LoCoMo, Mind2Web, and GAIA, FluxMem achieves consistent state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating strong adaptation and generalization in complex agentic environments. The code will be open-sourced in https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FluxMem，一种动态演化的记忆框架，将记忆建模为异构图，并通过三阶段（初始连接、反馈优化、长期巩固）持续优化其拓扑结构，显著提升LLM智能体在动态任务环境中的适应性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于记忆增强的LLM智能体将记忆视为静态存储库，缺乏对动态环境（如反馈变化、任务多样性、多源信号）的适应能力，导致记忆机制脆弱。
AI.method: 提出FluxMem框架：将记忆建模为异构图；引入三阶段演化机制（初始连接形成、反馈驱动细化、长期巩固）；在执行中动态修复缺失链接、剪枝干扰、对齐抽象粒度、提炼高频成功路径为可复用程序回路；并设计统一指标评估记忆的泛化性与演化成熟度。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo、Mind2Web和GAIA三个差异显著的基准上均达到SOTA性能，验证了其在复杂智能体环境中的强适应性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: FluxMem通过将记忆建模为可演化的异构图结构，突破了传统静态记忆范式，为构建更具鲁棒性与自适应性的LLM智能体提供了新范式。

title: Fine-Tuned LLM as a Complementary Predictor Improving Ads System
summary: Recommendation systems power engagement and monetization across feeds, ads, and short-video platforms, but translating the latest advances in Large Language Models into Recommendation Systems (RecSys) gains remains rare, particularly in advertising and production-scale real-world industry setups. Prior real-world LLM successes typically fall into three buckets: (a) generative retrieval that directly predicts the next items for candidate generation, (b) late-stage re-ranking that uses LLMs, and (c) auxiliary signal enrichment with LLMs. We introduce a complementary paradigm for ads: a fine-tuned open-source LLM used not as a ranker, but as an ads-specific ancillary predictor, forecasting likely advertisers from user profiles and histories. This LLM-driven advertiser prediction augments conventional candidate generation and provides informative priors to downstream ranking. Developed in a large-scale production advertising system, our approach produces substantial offline improvements and measurable online business impact, demonstrating that LLM world knowledge and predictive capacity can be efficiently harnessed. Beyond validating LLMs for ads applications, our results show that targeted ancillary predictions can unlock end-to-end gains across both retrieval and late-stage ranking, offering a practical path to LLM-enhanced recommendation at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将开源大语言模型（LLM）微调为广告主预测器的新范式，用于广告推荐系统中作为辅助预测模块，而非直接用于排序；该方法在大规模生产环境中显著提升了离线指标与线上业务效果，并验证了LLM在广告场景中通过目标化辅助预测实现端到端增益的可行性。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型（LLM）在多个领域取得进展，但其在广告等真实工业级推荐系统中的落地应用仍十分有限，现有方法主要集中于生成式检索、重排序或信号增强，缺乏对LLM预测能力在候选生成阶段的深度利用。
AI.method: 提出一种新范式：将开源LLM微调为广告主预测器，输入用户画像与历史行为，输出高概率投放广告的广告主集合；该预测结果作为先验信息，增强传统候选生成并指导下游排序，集成于大规模广告生产系统中。
AI.result: 在离线评估中取得显著性能提升，并在真实线上广告系统中观测到可衡量的业务收益（如CTR、RPM等关键指标改善），验证了该方法的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: LLM无需直接替代传统排序模块，亦可通过任务定制化的辅助预测（如广告主预测）有效赋能推荐全流程；该路径为LLM在大规模工业推荐系统中落地提供了切实可行的新思路。

title: Frequency-Guided Action Diffusion via Sub-Frequency Manifold Traversal
summary: Learning visuomotor policies via behavior cloning typically involves mimicking expert demonstrations collected by human operators. However, natural human demonstrations inherently contain high-frequency noise, such as intermittent jerks, pauses, and action jitter. Training policies to directly imitate these raw trajectories inevitably causes the model to inherit these suboptimal behaviors. This pathology is particularly pronounced in diffusion-based policies, where iterative denoising steps can inadvertently amplify high-frequency artifacts at the expense of meaningful fine-grained details. To address these limitations, we present a novel frequency-based algorithm that enables implicit spectral maneuvering and smooth action generation. Our method, Frequency Guidance Operator (FGO), steers the generation process of diffusion polices by progressively driving the noisy samples through intermediate sub-frequency manifolds with expanding spectral bands. Validated on 15 robotic manipulation tasks from 5 benchmarks, FGO achieves superior performance in enhancing action smoothness and temporal consistency while preserving the details necessary for successful task execution. Project website: https://henrywjl.github.io/frequency-guidance-operator/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Frequency Guidance Operator（FGO）的频率引导算法，用于改进基于扩散模型的视觉运动策略学习，通过在生成过程中逐步引导噪声样本经过扩展频谱带的中间子频带，以提升动作平滑性和时间一致性，同时保留任务执行所需的关键细节。
AI.motivation: 人类专家演示中存在高频噪声（如抖动、停顿），直接模仿会导致策略继承这些次优行为，尤其在扩散策略中会放大高频伪影而损害关键细节。
AI.method: 提出Frequency Guidance Operator（FGO），在扩散策略生成过程中进行隐式频谱调控，使噪声样本逐步通过频谱带不断扩展的中间子频带，实现平滑动作生成。
AI.result: 在5个基准的15个机器人操作任务上验证，FGO显著提升了动作平滑性与时间一致性，同时保持任务成功所需的关键细节。
AI.conclusion: FGO为扩散策略提供了一种有效的频域正则化机制，缓解了原始人类演示噪声带来的负面影响，提升了行为克隆在真实机器人控制中的实用性。

title: Mahalanobis PatchCore: Covariance-Aware and Streaming-Compatible Industrial Anomaly Detection
summary:
Industrial visual anomaly detection is usually one-class: normal images are abundant, while defects are rare, heterogeneous, and often unavailable during system design. PatchCore-style retrieval suits this setting because it scores test images from a memory bank of normal patch features, but the standard Euclidean geometry ignores feature correlations and its offline construction materialises the full patch pool before subsampling.
  We introduce Mahalanobis PatchCore, a covariance-aware, streaming-compatible extension of PatchCore. Its artificial intelligence contribution is a retrieval detector that estimates a regularised covariance model in reduced feature space and whitens embeddings, so Euclidean nearest-neighbour search after transformation implements Mahalanobis retrieval. A bounded-memory, re-iterable training pipeline builds the memory bank without storing all normal patches at once, using incremental dimensionality reduction, online covariance estimation, and streaming aggregation.
  The engineering application is automated industrial inspection, where visual anomaly detection must remain accurate under practical memory limits. We evaluate the method on a public 15-category industrial anomaly-detection benchmark and three industrial datasets covering blow-fill-seal strip-ampoule meniscus inspection, amber-glass-ampoule bottom inspection, and lyophilised-cake vial inspection. Mahalanobis PatchCore preserves most offline PatchCore image-level performance on the public benchmark while reducing peak memory from 5.41 to 2.78 GB, and improves the selected industrial mean image area under the receiver operating characteristic curve from 0.981 to 0.986.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mahalanobis PatchCore，一种协方差感知、支持流式训练的PatchCore改进方法，通过在降维特征空间中估计正则化协方差并白化嵌入，实现马氏距离检索；采用增量降维、在线协方差估计和流式聚合，在内存受限下构建记忆库，显著降低峰值内存并提升工业缺陷检测性能。
AI.motivation: 工业视觉异常检测常为单类设定（仅正常样本充足），而传统PatchCore使用欧氏距离忽略特征相关性，且其离线构建方式需先存储全部正常图像块，内存开销大，难以适应实际部署限制。
AI.method: 提出Mahalanobis PatchCore：1）在降维特征空间中增量估计正则化协方差矩阵；2）对特征嵌入进行白化变换，使后续欧氏最近邻搜索等价于马氏距离检索；3）设计有界内存、可重迭代的流式训练流程，融合增量PCA、在线协方差更新与流式聚合。
AI.result: 在15类公开工业异常检测基准上保持接近原PatchCore的图像级性能，峰值内存从5.41 GB降至2.78 GB；在三个真实工业数据集（安瓿液面、琥珀玻璃安瓿底、冻干粉针瓶）上，平均图像AUROC从0.981提升至0.986。
AI.conclusion: Mahalanobis PatchCore在保证检测精度的同时显著降低内存占用，兼具统计建模严谨性与工程部署可行性，为资源受限的工业视觉质检提供了更优单类异常检测方案。

title: Learning to Translate from Soft to Hard LLM Prompts
summary: Soft prompt tuning is a parameter-efficient method for adapting LLMs to specific tasks, but suffers from a lack of interpretability. Building on recent work on interpreting soft prompts (Ramati et al., 2024), we explore how training a dedicated soft prompt to natural language translation model can yield higher translation quality. In particular, in both quantitative and qualitative comparisons on multiple Datasets of Datasets (DoDs), we demonstrate that our translator produces fluent, accurate verbalizations that outperforms existing training-free methods like InSPEcT. In addition to advancing interpretability, our work suggests a promising downstream application: soft prompts optimized on small, open-source models can be translated into portable text prompts that, when deployed on larger closed-API models, exceed the performance of the original soft prompt and, in some cases, even few-shot learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将软提示（soft prompt）翻译为自然语言提示的方法，提升了软提示的可解释性，并在多个数据集上验证了其翻译质量优于现有无训练方法；此外，该方法还能将小模型上优化的软提示转化为可移植文本提示，在大模型上实现超越原软提示甚至少样本学习的效果。
AI.motivation: 软提示调优缺乏可解释性，而提升其可解释性有助于理解与应用。
AI.method: 训练一个专用的软提示到自然语言翻译模型，在多个数据集上进行定量与定性对比实验。
AI.result: 所提翻译器生成的自然语言提示更流畅、准确，性能优于InSPEcT等无训练方法；且转化后的文本提示在大模型上表现超越原始软提示，甚至优于少样本学习。
AI.conclusion: 软提示可被有效翻译为可解释的自然语言提示，不仅增强可解释性，还提供一种轻量、可迁移的下游应用路径。

title: Hierarchical Prompt-Domain Control and Learning for Resource-Constrained Agentic Language Models
summary: Large Language Models are increasingly deployed inside agentic systems, where they must follow structured protocols, adapt to evolving states, and operate under memory, latency, and cost constraints. In such regimes, prompt extension is unreliable: growing contexts can push compact models outside their effective prompt domain, while deployment-time fine-tuning remains limited by scarce data and compute. We propose a hierarchical control-and-learning framework in which a compact model is first distilled to learn the required output schema, then supervised online by an oracle-controller loop. The controller monitors protocol validity and semantic performance, projects accumulated histories into a feasible prompt domain, and triggers lightweight oracle-supervised fine-tuning under drift. This separates schema learning for communication compatibility from semantic adaptation for task-level correction. We formalize prompt-domain feasibility and attention-induced saturation, motivating control of the effective prompt state rather than reliance on nominal context length. Using Multi-Fidelity Bayesian Optimization as a controlled sequential testbed, we characterize a core deployment failure mode and show improved reliability and cost-efficiency over non-hierarchical, distillation-only, and non-distilled baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层控制与学习框架，用于提升大语言模型在代理系统中的可靠性与成本效率，通过蒸馏学习输出模式、在线监督微调及控制器动态管理提示域，解决了上下文扩展不可靠与部署时微调受限的问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在代理系统中面临结构化协议遵循、状态动态适应以及内存、延迟和成本约束等挑战；传统提示扩展不可靠，而部署时微调又受限于数据与算力稀缺。
AI.method: 提出分层控制与学习框架：先对紧凑模型进行蒸馏以学习输出模式（schema），再通过oracle-controller循环进行在线监督；控制器监控协议有效性与语义性能，将历史压缩至可行提示域，并在分布偏移时触发轻量级oracle监督微调。
AI.result: 在多保真贝叶斯优化测试平台上验证了该方法，显著提升了部署可靠性与成本效率，优于非分层、仅蒸馏及无蒸馏基线。
AI.conclusion: 分离模式学习（保障通信兼容性）与语义适配（实现任务级修正）是提升LLM在资源受限代理系统中鲁棒性的关键；有效提示状态的控制比依赖名义上下文长度更本质。

title: Information-theoretic Multimodal Representation Learning for Electrocardiogram Signals
summary: Electrocardiograms (ECGs) are widely used non-invasive measurements of cardiac activity and play a central role in clinical diagnosis. Recent multimodal approaches align ECG signals with clinical reports to incorporate diagnostic semantics, but clinical reports often fail to preserve the rich physiological structure of ECG waveforms, particularly across multiple levels of abstraction ranging from coarse diagnostic categories to fine-grained morphology. To address this limitation, we formulate ECG representation learning from an information-theoretic perspective and derive a tractable objective that jointly preserves signal structure and integrates clinical semantics. Based on this principle, we propose \textbf{MERIT} (Multimodal ECG Representation via Information Theory), a dual-branch pretraining framework combining masked ECG modeling with ECG--text contrastive alignment. Extensive experiments on PTB-XL and additional benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over prior methods, including gains exceeding $3%$ F1 on PTB-XL All and $5%$ F1 on SubClass classification. In zero-shot evaluation, MERIT further improves performance by up to $ +2.66\%$ AUC and $ +2.11\%$ F1 on PTB-XL SubClass, while also demonstrating robustness under multiple distribution-shift settings. Moreover, leveraging the learned ECG representations for ECG-conditioned clinical text generation with large language models improves text quality across several metrics, including ROUGE and METEOR. Together, these results demonstrate that MERIT learns more informative and clinically meaningful ECG representations, particularly for fine-grained clinical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MERIT框架，通过信息论视角联合保留ECG信号结构与临床语义，结合掩码建模与对比对齐，在多任务评估中显著提升性能，并支持高质量ECG条件文本生成。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态方法将ECG与临床报告对齐，但临床报告难以保留ECG波形在多个抽象层级（从粗粒度诊断类别到细粒度形态）上的丰富生理结构。
AI.method: 从信息论出发构建可优化目标，提出双分支预训练框架MERIT：一为掩码ECG建模，二为ECG-文本对比对齐。
AI.result: 在PTB-XL等基准上F1提升超3%（All）和5%（SubClass）；零样本下AUC和F1分别提升2.66%和2.11%；在分布偏移下鲁棒；且支持ECG驱动的临床文本生成，ROUGE/METEOR等指标提升。
AI.conclusion: MERIT能学习更具信息量和临床意义的ECG表征，尤其适用于细粒度临床应用。

title: Beyond Similarity: Task-Aligned Retrieval for Language Models
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) ranks passages by semantic similarity to the input, implicitly assuming that semantic similarity is a reliable indication of applicability in downstream tasks. This assumption breaks down when task success depends not on topical relevance but on applying the correct rules, constraints, or procedural guidance. In such settings, the most useful context may be the rule triggered by the input rather than the most semantically similar passage. We propose Task-Aligned Retrieval (TAG), a retrieval framework that replaces similarity-based retrieval with applicability-based rule selection. TAG transforms source documents into traceable condition-action rules, identifies which rules apply to a given input through pairwise LLM judgments, and generates the output conditioned only on the selected actions. We empirically observe that across Wikipedia NPOV rewriting, HumanEval with PEP~8 compliance, and NBA transaction reasoning on RuleArena, TAG consistently outperforms standard RAG, with the largest gains in high-mismatch settings (up to 12.2\%) while reducing retrieved context by up to 93\%. These results suggest that, in rule- and instruction-governed tasks, retrieval should optimize for applicability rather than for semantic similarity alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Task-Aligned Retrieval (TAG)，一种基于规则适用性而非语义相似性的检索增强生成框架，在规则驱动任务中显著优于传统RAG。
AI.motivation: 传统RAG依赖语义相似性排序，但在需遵循特定规则、约束或流程的任务中，语义最相似的段落未必最适用；真正关键的是触发正确规则的上下文。
AI.method: 将源文档转化为可追溯的条件-动作规则；利用大语言模型进行成对判断，识别对输入适用的规则；仅基于选中的动作生成输出。
AI.result: 在Wikipedia NPOV改写、HumanEval+PEP8合规性、RuleArena上的NBA交易推理等任务中，TAG持续超越标准RAG，高不匹配场景下提升最高达12.2%，且检索上下文减少最多93%。
AI.conclusion: 在规则与指令主导的任务中，检索应优化适用性而非仅语义相似性。

title: SANTS: A State-Adaptive Scheduler for World Action Models
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) improve robot manipulation by using video-based future representations to condition action generation. In pixel-space WAMs, however, the best action condition is not necessarily the fully denoised video. Controlled denoising-depth scans show that video refinement can reduce action error up to a state-dependent point, after which the gain may saturate or even reverse when late predictions become less action-relevant or physically unreliable. This suggests that action generation should use a state-dependent point along the video noise trajectory rather than a fixed terminal denoising depth. We introduce State-Adaptive Noise Trajectory Scheduler (SANTS), a lightweight scheduler for video-to-action diffusion policies. At each video decision point, SANTS reads the current video-state representation and noise level, then jointly predicts a cumulative stopping hazard and a relative noise-progression ratio. SANTS is post-trained with a path-level reward computed after the frozen action branch generates the final action chunk, so the scheduler is optimized for downstream action quality rather than intermediate video fidelity, while redundant video-state updates are explicitly penalized. Experiments show that SANTS reaches \(94.4\%\) overall success on RoboTwin 2.0 and \(73.1\%\) average success across seven real-robot tasks, while reducing latency by \(81.7\%\) and \(79.0\%\) relative to full video denoising, respectively. These results indicate that adaptive selection along the video noise trajectory can preserve the control benefits of WAM-style future reasoning while removing much of its redundant inference cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种状态自适应噪声轨迹调度器（SANTS），用于视频到动作的扩散策略，通过在视频去噪过程中动态选择最优去噪深度，以提升机器人操作任务中的动作生成质量与推理效率。
AI.motivation: 像素空间的世界动作模型（WAMs）中，完全去噪的视频未必是最优动作条件；过度去噪可能降低动作相关性或物理可靠性，因此需根据状态自适应选择去噪深度。
AI.method: 提出SANTS调度器，在每个决策点读取当前视频状态和噪声水平，联合预测累计停止风险和相对噪声进展比；采用路径级奖励进行后训练，优化下游动作质量而非中间视频保真度，并惩罚冗余视频状态更新。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin 2.0上达到94.4%整体成功率，在七个真实机器人任务上平均成功率达73.1%，同时分别将延迟降低81.7%和79.0%。
AI.conclusion: 沿视频噪声轨迹进行自适应选择可在保持WAM式未来推理控制优势的同时，显著削减冗余推理开销。

title: AndroidDaily: A Verifiable Benchmark for Mobile GUI Agents on Real-World Closed-Source Applications
summary: The rapid development of GUI foundation models and mobile GUI agents has spurred numerous evaluation benchmarks, yet most rely on simulated environments or open-source applications, leaving real-world closed-source applications largely unevaluated. The core difficulty is that closed-source applications do not expose internal states, making traditional automatic verification inapplicable. To bridge this gap, we introduce AndroidDaily, a large-scale benchmark comprising 350 realistic daily-use tasks across 94 high-frequency Android applications spanning transportation, shopping, local services, entertainment, content creation, social media, and everyday utilities. To enable automatic and verifiable assessment in these opaque environments, we propose Guideline-grounded Reviewer for Automatic Diagnostic Evaluation (GRADE), a process-aware evaluator built on a three-tiered system of observable external guidelines: operational obligations, output quality, and negative constraints. GRADE tracks the agent's visual trajectory against these criteria and produces step-level diagnostic judgments, turning long-horizon, open-ended mobile interactions into verifiable evaluation without relying on hidden internal states. Experiments show that GRADE achieves 87.37\% agreement with human evaluators. The strongest model reaches a 62.0\% success rate on AndroidDaily, highlighting a substantial gap between current reasoning capabilities and practical execution in realistic mobile workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AndroidDaily基准和GRADE评估方法，用于在真实、封闭源Android应用中自动评估GUI代理性能，无需访问内部状态。
AI.motivation: 现有评估基准多依赖模拟环境或开源应用，难以评估真实世界中的闭源应用，因其不暴露内部状态，传统自动验证方法失效。
AI.method: 构建包含350个日常任务的AndroidDaily基准；提出GRADE评估器，基于可观察的三层外部准则（操作义务、输出质量、负向约束）对代理视觉轨迹进行步骤级诊断评估。
AI.result: GRADE与人工评估者达成87.37%的一致性；最强模型在AndroidDaily上成功率为62.0%，揭示当前模型在真实移动工作流中仍有显著差距。
AI.conclusion: GRADE实现了无需内部状态的可验证评估，AndroidDaily填补了闭源应用评估空白，为移动GUI代理发展提供了更贴近现实的评测标准。

title: Disentangling Language Roles in Multilingual LLM Task Execution
summary: Multilingual LLMs are increasingly used when instruction, source content, and required response languages do not coincide. Existing benchmarks have expanded multilingual instruction-following evaluation, but they rarely isolate these three roles within a fully crossed design. We introduce MTM-Bench, a controlled benchmark for language-conditioned task execution in which each instance is defined by a triplet \((L_{\text{instr}}, L_{\text{content}}, L_{\text{resp}})\). Across English, Spanish, and Chinese, MTM-Bench enumerates all 27 triplets and contains 2{,}430 instances per model across semantic reversal, final-state extraction, and language purity with update realization. We evaluate 20 frontier and open-weight LLMs using decomposed metrics for semantic correctness, target-language adherence, constraint satisfaction, contamination ratio, and joint success, with scoring validated by a targeted human audit. The fully crossed design reveals that degradation is organized by the role a language occupies in the task structure, not merely by mismatch count. The response-language role is the dominant axis of variation, and a single response-slot mismatch accounts for most degradation. The response-only and full-mismatch comparison suggests that mismatch count is not a monotonic predictor of difficulty, with model-level ordering varying across systems. Task families fail through distinct channels, showing that semantic correctness alone does not capture reliable multilingual task execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTM-Bench，一个用于评估多语言大语言模型在指令、内容与响应语言不一致场景下任务执行能力的控制型基准，通过完全交叉设计揭示语言角色（尤其是响应语言）对性能退化的影响远大于语言不匹配数量本身。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言指令跟随评测基准未能分离指令语言、源内容语言和响应语言三者角色，缺乏完全交叉设计，难以准确刻画多语言任务中性能退化的根本原因。
AI.method: 构建MTM-Bench基准，涵盖英语、西班牙语、中文三语，枚举全部27种(L_instr, L_content, L_resp)组合，每组2430个实例，覆盖语义反转、终态提取、带更新实现的语言纯度三类任务；采用分解式指标（语义正确性、目标语言遵循度、约束满足率、污染比、联合成功率）评估20个前沿及开源LLM，并经人工审计验证评分。
AI.result: 发现性能退化主要由语言在任务结构中的角色（尤其是响应语言）决定，而非不匹配数量；单个响应语言错配即导致显著退化；不匹配数量与难度非单调关系；不同任务家族失败机制各异，仅语义正确性不足以表征可靠多语言执行能力。
AI.conclusion: 多语言任务评估需关注语言功能角色而非简单计数不匹配；MTM-Bench为细粒度诊断模型多语言能力提供了新范式，强调响应语言的关键影响及任务特异性失效模式。

title: DeepSciVerify: Verifying Scientific Claim--Citation Alignment via LLM-Driven Evidence Escalation
summary: Misalignment between claims and their cited evidence is a common failure mode in reports generated by large language models, limiting their reliability in scientific and other high-stakes settings. We present DeepSciVerify, a two-stage pipeline for scientific claim-citation verification that combines abstract-level reasoning with selective escalation to passage-level evidence. The system first verifies claims using the abstract and defers uncertain cases, retrieving and analyzing full-text passages only when necessary. This design leverages complementary behaviors across LLMs, as some models are more conservative while others are more decisive under uncertainty. On the SCitance benchmark, DeepSciVerify achieves 86.7 Micro-F1, outperforming strong abstract-only baselines by +4.5 points while resolving 67% of instances without full-text retrieval. These results suggest that selective evidence escalation improves both accuracy and efficiency in claim-citation verification.

AI.tldr: DeepSciVerify 是一种两阶段科学主张-引用验证方法，结合摘要级推理与选择性升级到段落级证据，在 SCitance 基准上达到 86.7 Micro-F1，显著优于纯摘要方法，并减少全文检索需求。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型生成的报告中，主张与其引用证据之间常存在错位，影响其在科研等高风险场景中的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出 DeepSciVerify 两阶段流水线：第一阶段用摘要验证主张，对不确定案例选择性地检索并分析全文段落；利用不同 LLM 在不确定性下的互补行为（保守型 vs 决断型）。
AI.result: 在 SCitance 基准上取得 86.7 Micro-F1，比强摘要基线提升 4.5 点，且 67% 的样本无需全文检索即可解决。
AI.conclusion: 选择性证据升级策略可同时提升主张-引用验证的准确性与效率。

title: Gradient Transformer: Learning to Generate Updates for LLMs
summary: Many organizations lack computational resources to fine-tune large language models (LLMs) on private (unshareable) data for better utility, while fine-tuning tiny language models (TinyLMs) alone performs poorly. To address this bottleneck, we propose a data-free knowledge distillation framework that generates LLM update vectors based on TinyLMs fine-tuned on private data. An update vector is a vector of parameter changes from an initial model to its fine-tuned version on a dataset, capturing the effect of cumulative gradient steps during fine-tuning. The key idea of our framework is a novel Gradient Transformer that transforms TinyLM's update vectors into LLM's update vectors. As derived from shadow datasets, Grad-Transformer captures the correlation between TinyLM and LLM update vectors, enabling third-party providers to generate LLM update vectors given the organization's TinyLM update vectors without accessing the organization's private data. The framework supports multi-organization collaboration to jointly update LLMs, improving performance and cost-efficiency. Extensive experiments across language modeling and reasoning tasks show that Grad-Transformer remarkably outperforms state-of-the-art knowledge distillation baselines, even under strict differential privacy protection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需原始数据的知识蒸馏框架Grad-Transformer，通过将私有数据上微调的小模型（TinyLM）的参数更新向量映射为大语言模型（LLM）的更新向量，实现高效、隐私保护的模型协同优化。
AI.motivation: 组织缺乏算力对大模型在私有数据上微调，而仅微调小模型效果差；需兼顾性能、隐私与资源限制。
AI.method: 提出数据无关的知识蒸馏框架，核心是Gradient Transformer模块，利用影子数据集建模TinyLM与LLM更新向量间的相关性，将TinyLM的更新向量映射为LLM的更新向量，支持多机构协作更新LLM。
AI.result: 在语言建模与推理任务上显著超越现有知识蒸馏基线，即使在严格差分隐私约束下仍保持高性能。
AI.conclusion: Grad-Transformer实现了无需访问私有数据的大模型高效适配，兼顾隐私、性能与协作可扩展性，为资源受限场景下的LLM定制提供了新范式。

title: Mixture-of-Experts Knowledge Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Multi-Agent LLM-based Recommendation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently been adopted for recommendations due to their ability to understand user intent and item semantics. However, LLM-based recommender systems often rely on parametric knowledge and suffer from outdated knowledge, motivating knowledge graph retrieval-augmented generation (KG-RAG) to ground recommendations on structured, up-to-date KGs. Despite this promise, effective KG-RAG in recommendations faces great challenges. First, users' queries vary in complexity and require KG knowledge at different granularities, whereas existing methods adopt a one-size-fits-all retrieval strategy, leading to over-retrieval for simple queries and under-retrieval for complex ones. In addition, augmenting LLMs with KG knowledge requires translating graph-structured data into linear text, which may introduce noise and cause structural information loss. Moreover, the selection of retrieval granularity lacks direct supervision and must be inferred from the final recommendation after alignment and downstream utilization, making query-aware retrieval hard to learn end-to-end. To address these issues, we propose MixRAGRec, a cooperative multi-agent framework for KG-RAG recommendations. MixRAGRec integrates a Mixture-of-Experts Retrieval Agent that routes each query to a KG retrieval expert with different granularities, a Knowledge Preference Alignment Agent that converts structured knowledge into LLM-friendly natural language, and a Contrastive Learning-reinforced Recommendation Agent trained with contrastive preference feedback. Notably, we introduce Mixture-of-Experts Multi-Agent Policy Optimization (MMAPO) to train three agents under a unified objective. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixRAGRec框架，通过多智能体协同实现知识图谱检索增强的推荐系统，解决现有KG-RAG方法中检索粒度不匹配、结构信息丢失及端到端学习困难等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推荐系统依赖参数化知识，存在知识陈旧问题；而KG-RAG虽能引入结构化、实时知识，但面临查询复杂度多样导致的检索粒度不匹配、图结构转文本引发的信息损失、以及缺乏直接监督难以端到端学习查询感知检索等挑战。
AI.method: 提出MixRAGRec多智能体框架：1）专家混合检索智能体（MoE Retrieval Agent），按查询复杂度路由至不同粒度的KG检索专家；2）知识偏好对齐智能体（Knowledge Preference Alignment Agent），将图结构知识转化为LLM友好的自然语言；3）对比学习增强推荐智能体（Contrastive Learning-reinforced Recommendation Agent），利用对比偏好反馈训练；并设计统一优化算法MMAPO联合训练三者。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验表明，MixRAGRec显著优于现有基线方法，在推荐准确性和鲁棒性方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: MixRAGRec通过细粒度、可学习、结构保持的KG检索与生成协同机制，有效提升了LLM推荐系统的知识时效性与推理能力，为KG-RAG推荐提供了新范式。

title: VLM-Based Advanced Rider Assistance System for Motorcycle Safety
summary: Motorcycles face disproportionately high crash risks compared to cars due to limited protection and heightened sensitivity to surface hazards, yet Advanced Rider Assistance Systems (ARAS) remain underdeveloped relative to Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). We propose a novel ARAS that enhances motorcycle safety through semantic perception and risk-aware planning. Our approach leverages Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for contextual hazard reasoning and integrates them with segmentation-based detection to construct dense risk maps. These maps encode both semantic characteristics (e.g., pothole severity, puddle slipperiness) and physical attributes (e.g., size, depth), which produce per-pixel hazard costs that capture motorcycle-specific risks. These maps are used by a sampling-based planner tailored to motorcycle dynamics to recommend throttle and steering actions that minimize hazard exposure while advancing toward the destination. We evaluate our system in different scenarios in the CARLA simulator. Compared to the baseline method, our method achieves higher success rates and lower hazard exposure, while qualitative results demonstrate interpretable risk maps and safe trajectory recommendations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉语言模型（VLM）与分割检测融合的新型高级骑手辅助系统（ARAS），构建语义-物理联合风险图，并结合摩托车动力学定制采样规划器，显著提升安全性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 摩托车相比汽车缺乏保护且更易受路面危害影响，但高级骑手辅助系统（ARAS）的发展远落后于高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS），亟需针对性的安全增强方案。
AI.method: 利用视觉语言模型（VLM）进行上下文危害推理，结合分割检测生成稠密风险图；该图融合语义特征（如坑洼严重性、积水滑溜度）和物理属性（如尺寸、深度），输出逐像素危害代价；再由适配摩托车动力学的采样式规划器生成最小化风险的油门与转向动作。
AI.result: 在CARLA仿真器多场景评估中，相较基线方法，本系统实现了更高的任务成功率与更低的危害暴露量，且风险图与轨迹推荐具备良好可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 所提ARAS通过语义感知与风险感知规划的协同，有效提升了摩托车骑行安全，为ARAS发展提供了新范式。

title: Can Segmentation Models Understand the World? Towards Proactive Affordance Reasoning via Visual Chain-of-Thought
summary: Recent segmentation models couple large language models (LLMs) with mask decoders to ground complex language expressions into masks, yet their instructions remain target-referential: they describe, constrain, or imply the region to be segmented. However, in real-world embodied interaction, human instructions are often at the intent-level, which includes the desired outcome without naming the region that enables it. To bridge this gap, we introduce SegWorld, where the model reasons about the scene through a multi-level visual chain-of-thought (CoT) before committing to a mask. Before receiving any instructions, it proactively observes the scene, describing visible objects and inferring plausible events they may support. Given an instruction, it continues the chain: from the object relevant to the intent, through the action that satisfies it, to the physical interaction site, the object part that affords the action. We formalize SegWorld as probabilistic inference, in which proactive observation supplies a linguistic scene context that improves mask prediction when instructions are given at the level of intent. We construct an intent-to-part benchmark for evaluating affordance-bearing part segmentation from high-level goals. Experiments show SegWorld matches instruction-driven baselines on target-referential instructions and improves substantially on intent-level ones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SegWorld模型，通过多级视觉思维链（CoT）实现从高层意图指令到物体可操作部位的分割，弥补了现有方法仅支持目标指代型指令的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有分割模型依赖目标指代型语言指令，而真实具身交互中人类指令常为意图级（不直接指明目标区域），亟需能理解高层目标并推理可操作部位的新方法。
AI.method: SegWorld采用概率推理框架，先主动观察场景生成语言化场景上下文（描述物体及潜在事件），再基于意图指令沿‘相关物体→满足意图的动作→物理交互点→可操作部件’链式推理生成掩码。
AI.result: 在新构建的意图到部件（intent-to-part）基准上，SegWorld在目标指代指令上与基线相当，在意图级指令上显著优于基线。
AI.conclusion: SegWorld通过引入多级视觉思维链和主动场景建模，有效提升了模型对高层意图指令的理解与可操作部件分割能力，推动了具身智能中语言引导视觉任务的发展。

title: Cultural Fidelity in English-to-Hindi Translation: A Preservation-Fluency Frontier for Gender Recoverability
summary: Generative translation systems are cultural technologies because they decide how socially meaningful cues are rendered within culturally specific grammatical systems. We study one concrete notion of successful cultural translation: when an English source explicitly encodes gender, an English-to-Hindi translation should preserve the recoverability of that cue unless the source itself is ambiguous. We evaluate this criterion on a 37,345-instance benchmark spanning twelve categories and show that five systems frequently erase gender through ergative and honorific constructions. We then introduce two mechanism-aware inference-time interventions. The first, the Source-Aware Reranker (SAR), prefers candidates that avoid gender-neutralizing syntax. The second, the Phenomenon-Aware Reranker (PAR), preserves gender through targeted lexical marking even when ergative syntax remains. Across GPT-4o-mini and Sarvam, PAR improves target-subset accuracy from 11.07% to 54.47% and from 15.99% to 49.66%, respectively. Human evaluation shows that PAR increases gender preservation from 10.3% to 81.3%, but reduces mean fluency from 4.36 to 3.37. These findings place the two interventions on a preservation and fluency frontier rather than supporting a single dominant solution, and show how culturally situated generation can require explicit tradeoffs among fidelity, fluency, and stylistic naturalness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了英语到印地语的生成式翻译系统在性别信息保留方面的文化适应性问题，提出了两种干预方法（SAR和PAR）以提高性别线索的可恢复性，并揭示了保真度、流利度与风格自然性之间的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 生成式翻译系统作为文化技术，需在目标语言的文化语法体系中恰当地呈现社会意义线索；本文聚焦于英语源文本中显式编码的性别信息在英-印地语翻译中是否能被保持可恢复，尤其在存在歧义或特定语法结构（如作格、敬语）时。
AI.method: 构建包含37,345个实例、涵盖12类的基准数据集，评估5种主流系统的性别保留表现；提出两种机制感知的推理时重排序干预：源感知重排序器（SAR）避免性别中立化句法，现象感知重排序器（PAR）通过目标端词汇标记主动保留性别信息。
AI.result: PAR显著提升目标子集准确率（GPT-4o-mini：11.07%→54.47%；Sarvam：15.99%→49.66%）；人工评估显示性别保留率从10.3%升至81.3%，但平均流利度由4.36降至3.37。
AI.conclusion: 性别信息的文化翻译不能仅靠通用生成能力实现，需机制感知的显式干预；SAR与PAR代表保真与流利的不同权衡点，表明文化情境化生成本质上涉及多维质量取舍。

title: Prefix-Safe Bayesian Belief Tracking for LLM Reasoning Reliability:Separating Calibration from Ranking
summary: Long reasoning traces need reliability estimates before final answers are known. We study prefix-conditioned eventual-success estimation, $P(y=1 \mid o_{1:t})$, using prefix-safe observations. Sequential Bayesian Belief Tracking (SBBT) calibrates observation likelihoods and recursively updates a two-state belief, providing a common tracker for scalar scores, text and self-verification markers, hidden clusters, token-pooling probes, and latent-trajectory features. Across generated open-weight traces on MATH-500, GSM8K, AIME 2025, and RIMO-N, probability quality and ranking separate: score-only SBBT often improves Brier, while AUROC gains require structure-aware evidence beyond strong prefix-safe baselines. In the strongest hard math setting, structure-aware observations reach +0.110 AUROC against standard prefix-safe baselines. Under a same-prefix classifier audit, MATH-500 text markers and RIMO-N self-verification signals remain positive. Together, these findings support SBBT as a calibration-aware online inference framework and expose an evidence regime: scalar scores mainly support probability quality, while structure-aware prefix signals support ranking only when strong prefix-safe baselines have not already absorbed the rank evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出顺序贝叶斯信念跟踪（SBBT）方法，用于在长推理过程中基于前缀观测估计最终成功概率，并验证其在多个数学推理数据集上的有效性，尤其发现结构感知信号对排序性能（AUROC）提升显著。
AI.motivation: 长推理链需要在最终答案确定前对其可靠性进行估计，而现有方法缺乏对前缀条件下的成功概率进行校准和动态更新的能力。
AI.method: 提出顺序贝叶斯信念跟踪（SBBT），通过校准观测似然并递归更新双状态信念，统一处理标量分数、文本标记、自验证信号、隐式聚类、token池化探针及潜在轨迹特征等多类前缀安全观测。
AI.result: 在MATH-500、GSM8K、AIME 2025和RIMO-N等数据集上，SBBT提升了概率校准质量（Brier得分）；结构感知观测在最难的数学任务中使AUROC提升+0.110；文本标记与自验证信号在相同前缀分类审计下仍具正向判别力。
AI.conclusion: SBBT是一种校准感知的在线推理框架；研究揭示了证据分层现象：标量分数主要提升概率质量，而结构感知前缀信号仅在强基线未吸收排序信息时才提升排序性能（如AUROC）。

title: The Energy Blind Spot: NVIDIA's Flagship Edge AI Hardware Cannot Support Process-Level Energy Attribution
summary: Agentic AI workloads - where a single user goal triggers multi-step orchestration, tool calls, retries, and failure recovery - are being targeted for edge deployment, with NVIDIA, Dell, HP, ASUS, MSI, Acer, and Gigabyte all shipping GB10-based desktop AI systems in 2026. We recently demonstrated that orchestration structure dominates agentic energy cost, with workflows consuming 4.33x more energy per successful goal than linear baselines and OOI reaching 7.63x for multi-step reasoning tasks. Separately, Rajat et al. show that CPU-side processing accounts for up to 90.6% of total latency and 44% of total dynamic energy in agentic workloads. We report a systematic energy-observability audit of the ASUS Ascent GX10 (GB10 SoC) and find that the platform exposes no CPU energy counter, no INA power-rail monitor, no IPMI/BMC, and no SCMI powercap protocol through any supported software interface. The only on-device energy telemetry is instantaneous GPU power via NVML. We further discover that the MediaTek firmware already computes per-rail energy internally via an undocumented ACPI interface (SPBM), but NVIDIA states there are "no plans to expose CPU rail information." On-device per-process energy attribution - as performed on x86 via RAPL - is therefore not reproducible on this platform through supported interfaces. We formalize a hardware requirements specification for energy-attributed AI, propose an interim calibration bridge using external DC metering combined with GPU subtraction, and identify a standards-track path via SCMI powercap. Our findings motivate the low-carbon computing community to demand energy observability as a first-class hardware requirement.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了边缘AI系统（如ASUS Ascent GX10）在能效可观测性方面的严重缺失，指出当前硬件缺乏CPU能耗监控能力，导致无法实现细粒度的进程级能耗归因；作者提出硬件需求规范、临时校准方案及SCMI标准化路径，呼吁将能耗可观测性列为AI硬件的首要要求。
AI.motivation: Agentic AI工作负载在边缘部署日益普遍，但其高能耗特性（尤其是编排结构主导能耗）与当前边缘硬件缺乏细粒度能耗监控能力（如CPU能耗计数器、电源轨监测等）之间存在严重矛盾，亟需系统性评估与解决方案。
AI.method: 对ASUS Ascent GX10（GB10 SoC）平台开展系统性能耗可观测性审计，检查其软件接口支持的能耗监控能力；分析固件内部未公开的ACPI SPBM接口；提出基于外部直流电表+GPU功耗相减的临时校准桥接方法，并形式化定义面向能耗归因AI的硬件需求规范及SCMI标准化路径。
AI.result: 发现该平台完全不支持CPU能耗监控（无RAPL类机制），仅提供NVML GPU瞬时功耗；确认MediaTek固件内部已通过SPBM计算电源轨能耗，但NVIDIA明确表示不开放CPU轨信息；验证了外部电表+GPU减法方案的可行性，并明确了SCMI powercap为长期标准化路径。
AI.conclusion: 当前边缘AI硬件在能耗可观测性方面存在根本性缺陷，必须将细粒度、多维度的能耗监控能力（特别是CPU侧）作为AI芯片与系统设计的强制性硬件要求，以支撑绿色AI发展。

title: Whose Name Comes Up? III: Persona Prompting Effects in LLM-Based Scholar Recommendation
comment: 25 pages (10 main, 2 references, 13 appendix), 6 figures in main, 13 figures in appendix (under-review)
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as scholar recommenders, shaping who is seen as an expert in academia. Existing audits remain English-centric, single discipline, and persona-agnostic, leaving the source of output variability poorly understood. To this end, we propose a benchmark that disentangles the effects of model choice and prompt design on recommendations. We audit 43 LLMs by varying persona prompts (language, location, role-and-task) and context (field, seniority, k). Recommended scholars are compared against Semantic Scholar over six scientific disciplines to measure technical quality (factuality, coverage) and social representativeness (diversity, parity). Basic technical quality is driven by model choice, factuality and parity by context, and diversity by location. South Africa prompts yield less factual lists, while Japan prompts yield highly factual but homogeneous lists skewed toward highly productive scholars. Prompt design is thus a non-trivial axis of LLM-based scholar discovery and should be systematically audited alongside model choice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基准测试方法，用于解耦模型选择与提示设计对大语言模型（LLM）学者推荐结果的影响，并在43个LLM上进行审计，发现技术质量主要受模型影响，事实性与公平性受上下文影响，多样性受地理位置影响。
AI.motivation: 现有对LLM作为学者推荐系统的审计存在英语中心主义、单一学科和忽略用户角色（persona）等问题，导致输出变异来源不明。
AI.method: 构建多维度基准：通过变化persona提示（语言、地理位置、角色与任务）和上下文（学科、资历、推荐数量k），在六大学科领域审计43个LLM的推荐结果，并与Semantic Scholar对比评估技术质量（事实性、覆盖率）和社会代表性（多样性、公平性）。
AI.result: 基本技术质量主要由模型选择决定；事实性和公平性主要受上下文影响；多样性主要受地理位置影响；南非提示导致事实性下降，日本提示产生高事实性但同质化、偏向高产学者的推荐列表。
AI.conclusion: 提示设计是LLM驱动学者发现中不可忽视的关键因素，应与模型选择一同被系统性审计。

title: Simultaneous Contact Selection and Planning for Contact-Rich Manipulation with Cascaded Optimization
summary:
We propose an optimization-based framework for robust contact-rich manipulation. Recent contact-implicit methods enable online hybrid planning across contact modes, allowing closed-loop manipulation for a given target state and contact location sequence of the robot and object. However, most existing approaches lack the ability to autonomously reason and generate diverse contact location sequences and manipulation trajectories, i.e., active contact location selection, which limits their applicability to relatively simple tasks. Active contact location selection is challenging due to complementarity in contact dynamics and the sparse gradients, making the design of a unified framework for contact selection and planning difficult. To address these challenges, we introduce Simultaneous Contact Selection and Planning (SCSP), a cascaded optimization framework comprising Contact Selection Optimization (CSO) and Contact Planning Optimization (CPO). CSO leverages a surrogate contact model and discrete-continuous optimization to efficiently resolve the nonsmoothness and coupling in contact selection, enabling online global searching of optimal contact locations. CPO performs prior-guided contact planning by evaluating the reference contact locations produced by CSO and generating corresponding manipulation trajectories in real time for redundant manipulators. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that SCSP produces diverse manipulation behaviors and robust control under inaccurate dynamics and perceptual noise. We further validate the generalization of the framework on challenging manipulation tasks.
  Project website: \href{https://sites.google.com/view/scsp-robot}{https://sites.google.com/view/scsp-robot}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCSP的级联优化框架，用于解决接触丰富环境下的鲁棒操作问题，包含接触位置选择（CSO）和接触规划（CPO）两个阶段，实现了在线全局搜索最优接触点并生成对应操作轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有接触隐式方法难以自主推理和生成多样化的接触位置序列与操作轨迹（即主动接触选择），限制了其在复杂任务中的应用；而接触动力学的互补性与梯度稀疏性使统一建模困难。
AI.method: 提出Simultaneous Contact Selection and Planning (SCSP)框架，由Contact Selection Optimization (CSO)和Contact Planning Optimization (CPO)组成：CSO采用代理接触模型与离散-连续优化处理非光滑性和耦合性；CPO基于CSO输出的参考接触点进行先验引导的实时接触规划。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实实验中验证了SCSP能生成多样化操作行为，并在动力学不准与感知噪声下保持鲁棒控制；且在挑战性操作任务中展现出良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SCSP为接触丰富的机器人操作提供了统一、可扩展且实用的优化框架，有效解决了主动接触选择与实时规划协同难题。

title: CuriosAI Submission to the CASTLE Challenge at EgoVis 2026
comment: The 4th place solution for the CASTLE Challenge at the CVPR EgoVis Workshop 2026
summary: CASTLE 2026 asks 185 multiple-choice questions over 600+ hours of synchronized multi-view egocentric video. We explore two approaches on top of a shared multimodal preprocessing layer, including per-person timelines, speaker-resolved transcripts, and multi-VLM caption ensembles. Approach A, SVA: Search-Verify-Answer, is a three-stage pipeline that hierarchically narrows to a primary window, verifies sub-windows with a VLM under four anti-confabulation rules, and fuses evidence with an LLM judge under an evidence-priority hierarchy. Approach B, TMKG: Temporal-Multimodal-Knowledge-Graph, is the contrast: it builds a temporal multimodal knowledge graph, locates a primary cell via graph search, and produces the final answer with a single grounded VLM. SVA reaches a leaderboard accuracy of 0.50 and is our final challenge submission; TMKG reaches 0.35.

AI.tldr: CASTLE 2026 是一项基于多视角自拍视频的长时序多选题基准测试，提出两种方法：SVA（搜索-验证-回答）三阶段流水线和 TMKG（时序多模态知识图谱）方法，其中 SVA 在榜单上达到 0.50 准确率，为最终提交方案。
AI.motivation: 构建一个具有挑战性的长时序、多视角、多模态理解基准（CASTLE 2026），以评估模型在真实世界复杂 egocentric 视频中进行细粒度时间定位与推理的能力。
AI.method: 两种方法均基于共享的多模态预处理层（含人物时间线、说话人分离转录、多VLM字幕集成）；SVA采用搜索-验证-回答三阶段流程，结合反幻觉规则与LLM证据融合；TMKG则构建时序多模态知识图谱，通过图搜索定位并用单次接地VLM生成答案。
AI.result: SVA 方法在 CASTLE 2026 基准上取得 0.50 的准确率，为最终提交方案；TMKG 方法准确率为 0.35。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段、带验证与证据优先机制的 SVA 框架优于端到端图结构建模的 TMKG，表明在长时序多模态问答中，显式推理控制与防幻觉设计更有效。

title: TRACES: Proactive Safety Auditing for Multi-Turn LLM Agents via Trajectory-State Modeling
summary: LLM agents increasingly operate through multi-turn tool use and environment interaction, where safety risks often emerge from intermediate steps long before they surface in the final outcome. Reactive auditing is therefore insufficient: post-hoc diagnosis frequently misses the chance to flag risks while they are unfolding. We propose TRACES, a representation-based proactive auditor that learns prefix-level trajectory risk states from the hidden representations of an observer LLM. TRACES induces latent mechanism features from step representations and models their temporal evolution to estimate whether a partial trajectory is drifting toward unsafe behavior. To sidestep the cost and ambiguity of step-level risk annotation, TRACES is trained with weak trajectory-level supervision while still producing dense prefix-level risk estimates. Across multiple agent safety benchmarks, TRACES improves both full-trajectory safety prediction and proactive risk discrimination. Our analyses further suggest that these risk states can help train a safer agent, highlighting the broader potential of proactive auditing for long-horizon agent safety.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRACES，一种基于表示的主动审计方法，通过学习观察者大语言模型（LLM）隐藏表示中的前缀级轨迹风险状态，实现对LLM智能体在多步工具调用过程中早期安全风险的主动检测与预测。
AI.motivation: 现有反应式审计（reactive auditing）仅在任务结束后进行诊断，难以捕捉中间步骤中正在演化的安全风险，导致干预滞后；需一种能在风险发生过程中及时预警的主动审计机制。
AI.method: TRACES利用观察者LLM的各步隐藏表示，提取潜在机制特征并建模其时序演化，从而估计部分轨迹是否正偏离至不安全行为；采用弱监督（仅轨迹级标签）训练，却能输出密集的前缀级风险评分。
AI.result: 在多个智能体安全基准上，TRACES显著提升了完整轨迹的安全性预测准确率与前缀级风险判别能力；分析还表明其学到的风险状态可用于指导更安全的智能体训练。
AI.conclusion: TRACES验证了基于表示的主动审计范式的有效性，为长周期智能体安全提供了可扩展、低标注成本的新路径，推动安全干预从‘事后’走向‘事中’。

title: A Policy-Driven Runtime Layer for Agentic LLM Serving
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems have become the dominant production workload, but the serving stack was not built for them. The agent framework above knows agent identities, role, schemas, and dispatch structure but never sees an engine-level event; the serving engine below sees every event but knows nothing about agents. A surprising number of cross-cutting policies depend on both: prefix caching, batch shaping, speculative execution, fairness, tool-result memoization, safety enforcement, and more. Each lives in the seam between the two layers and is currently solved by a one-off patch into one neighbor or the other. We argue this seam is best addressed by an architectural change rather than point fixes: insert a third tier, an agent runtime layer, between the framework and the engine, exposing four primitives (observe, score, predict, act) into which any agent-aware policy plugs, with agent identity as the shared coordinate. We map nine concrete policies onto the layer and validate the abstraction in depth on the one with the largest immediate serving-cost lever: KV caching across sessions, instantiated as CacheSage, which learns the per-workload agent transition matrix online and uses it for survival-based eviction and between-step prefetch. Preliminary results on five real multi-agent workloads show +13 to +37 pp cache hit-rate lift, 12% to 29% lower mean TTFT, and 6% to 14% higher throughput over an unmodified serving stack.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在多智能体LLM系统中引入一个中间的'智能体运行时层'，以统一支持跨框架与引擎层的多种策略（如缓存、公平性、安全性等），并通过CacheSage实例验证其在KV缓存优化上的显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体LLM服务栈存在框架层（了解智能体语义）与引擎层（掌握底层事件）割裂的问题，导致需大量临时补丁实现跨层策略，缺乏系统性支持。
AI.method: 提出三层架构，在智能体框架与推理引擎之间插入‘智能体运行时层’，定义observe、score、predict、act四大原语，并以agent identity为统一坐标；将九种策略映射到该层，重点实现基于在线学习智能体转移矩阵的跨会话KV缓存机制CacheSage。
AI.result: 在五个真实多智能体工作负载上，CacheSage相比基线提升缓存命中率13–37个百分点，平均首token延迟降低12%–29%，吞吐量提高6%–14%。
AI.conclusion: 引入智能体运行时层是解决多智能体LLM服务中跨层策略耦合问题的更优架构方案，具备通用性与可扩展性，能显著提升系统效率与可维护性。

title: Evaluating Local Explainability Metrics for Machine Learning Models on Tabular Data
summary: Despite the wide use of explainability techniques to attempt to understand the behavior of Artificial Intelligence (AI), the generated explanations may not always be reliable. An explanation can appear plausible to humans but fail to capture the internal reasoning of a model, particularly when dealing with complex tabular data. This paper studies the trustworthiness of local explainability techniques when applied to complex tabular classification tasks, considering evaluated metrics for three main properties: faithfulness to the model's predictions, robustness to input data variations, and complexity of the explanation itself. A benchmark was performed for Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME), Kernel SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP), and Feature Ablation techniques, across 32 datasets and different types of machine learning models. Model performance ranges were analyzed to identify two groups: consensus-correct, which are samples that all models predicted correctly, and consensus-wrong, samples that all models predicted incorrectly. The obtained results demonstrate that that the explanations are not always correlated with a model's predictive performance. Instead, dataset complexity and feature distributions seem to be the main factors affecting explanation quality and reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了LIME、SHAP和特征消融等局部可解释性方法在复杂表格分类任务中的可信度，发现解释质量主要受数据集复杂性和特征分布影响，而非模型预测性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管可解释性技术被广泛用于理解AI行为，但其生成的解释在处理复杂表格数据时可能不可靠，甚至看似合理却无法反映模型真实推理过程。
AI.method: 通过基准测试，评估LIME、Kernel SHAP和特征消融在32个数据集及多种机器学习模型上的表现，聚焦于忠实性、鲁棒性和解释复杂度三个指标，并按模型预测一致性（共识正确/错误）分组分析。
AI.result: 解释质量与模型预测性能无强相关性；数据集复杂性和特征分布是影响解释可信度的主要因素。
AI.conclusion: 局部可解释性方法在复杂表格数据上的可靠性有限，需谨慎依赖，未来工作应更关注数据特性对解释质量的影响。

title: Looking Farther with Confidence: Uncertainty-Guided Future Learning for Sequential Recommendation
summary: Sequential recommendation effectively models dynamic user interests but continues to face challenges related to data sparsity. While self-supervised learning has alleviated this issue to some extent, most existing methods focus exclusively on immediate next-item prediction during training, thereby neglecting the rich information embedded in longer-term future interactions. Although a few studies have explored the utilization of future data, existing attempts typically apply future supervision signals with uniform intensity across all samples, which may lead to suboptimal solutions. In this paper, we propose an adaptive future learning framework, UFRec, which encourages the model to look further ahead when it is confident in the current state, while focusing on the immediate task when it is uncertain. Specifically, UFRec incorporates an Uncertainty-Guided Future Supervision module that dynamically modulates the weight of multi-step future supervision based on the model's confidence in the primary next-item prediction task. Furthermore, we complement step-wise future supervision with a Future-Aware Contrastive Learning module that treats the future trajectory as a holistic entity. Notably, both auxiliary modules are utilized exclusively during training and incur no inference overhead. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by effectively leveraging future data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UFRec框架，通过不确定性引导的未来监督和未来感知对比学习，自适应地利用用户长期交互数据提升序列推荐效果，训练时无推理开销。
AI.motivation: 现有序列推荐方法在数据稀疏性问题上仍存在挑战，且多数自监督方法仅关注下一物品预测，忽略长期未来交互信息；已有利用未来数据的方法未考虑样本差异性，采用统一监督强度，导致次优解。
AI.method: 提出UFRec框架，包含两个训练专用模块：1）不确定性引导的未来监督模块，根据模型对下一物品预测的置信度动态调整多步未来监督权重；2）未来感知对比学习模块，将未来轨迹视为整体进行对比学习。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法显著优于当前最先进方法，有效提升了序列推荐性能。
AI.conclusion: 自适应地利用未来交互信息（而非简单统一使用）能更有效地缓解数据稀疏问题，提升序列推荐效果；所提框架在不增加推理开销的前提下，显著提升模型性能。

title: How Should We Teach Robots? A Comparison of Kinesthetic, Joystick, and Gesture-Based Teaching
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables, presented at Cognition and Artificial Life (CAL/KUZ) 2026 conference at Chateau Trest
summary: Instructing robots from demonstrations can be done through different teaching modalities, each with different usability and performance trade-offs. This paper compares kinesthetic guidance, joystick teleoperation, and hand gestures in a user study with eight participants. We evaluate replay success, modified NASA-TLX workload, and common teaching errors across three manipulation tasks. Kinesthetic guidance produced the shortest demonstrations, lowest workload, and highest success on the more orientation-sensitive and contact-rich tasks. Joystick teleoperation performed best on simple peg picking. Hand-gesture teaching, although less reliable overall, performed better than expected and in some cases achieved results comparable to kinesthetic guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文通过用户研究比较了三种机器人示教方式（动觉引导、操纵杆遥操作和手势教学）在不同操作任务中的表现，发现动觉引导在复杂任务中效果最佳，而手势教学的表现优于预期。
AI.motivation: 不同示教模态在可用性和性能上存在权衡，需实证比较其在真实任务中的表现差异。
AI.method: 开展包含8名参与者的用户研究，对比动觉引导、操纵杆遥操作和手势教学三种模态，在三项操作任务中评估重放成功率、修正版NASA-TLX工作负荷及常见教学错误。
AI.result: 动觉引导演示时间最短、工作负荷最低、在朝向敏感和接触密集任务中成功率最高；操纵杆遥操作在简单插 peg 任务中表现最优；手势教学整体可靠性较低，但在某些情况下表现接近动觉引导。
AI.conclusion: 示教模态的选择应依据具体任务特性：复杂接触/朝向任务推荐动觉引导，简单任务可考虑操纵杆，手势教学具备一定潜力但需进一步提升鲁棒性。

title: Residualized Temporal Sparse Autoencoders for Interpreting Diffusion Models
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models generate images through an iterative denoising process, so internal neural layers produce trajectories of activations rather than single static representations. Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have recently been used to decompose diffusion activations into interpretable feature directions, but most approaches analyze activations at individual timesteps or condition on time rather than learning directly from full activation trajectories. In this work, we introduce residualized temporal SAEs for diffusion activation trajectories. We collect activations across denoising time, fit linear predictors between neighboring timesteps, and represent each trajectory using an initial activation together with residual components not explained by these linear dynamics. Training an SAE on this residualized representation encourages sparse latents to capture structure beyond what is linearly predictable. The residualized decoder directions can be mapped back into activation space, allowing each latent to be analyzed as a feature trajectory over denoising time. Through reconstruction and ablation studies, spatiotemporal feature analysis, and qualitative steering experiments on Stable Diffusion~1.5, we show that residualized temporal SAEs provide a useful framework for studying temporally structured diffusion activations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出残差化时间稀疏自编码器（residualized temporal SAEs），用于分析文本到图像扩散模型中随去噪时间演化的激活轨迹，通过建模线性时间动态并提取残差来发现超越线性可预测性的可解释特征。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器多在单一时序点或显式条件于时间上分析扩散模型激活，忽略了激活随时间演化的结构；需更有效方法建模完整激活轨迹以挖掘时序可解释特征。
AI.method: 收集扩散过程各时间步的神经激活，拟合相邻时间步间的线性预测器，将激活轨迹表示为初始激活加残差项；在该残差表示上训练稀疏自编码器，并将解码方向映射回原始激活空间以获得特征的时间轨迹。
AI.result: 在Stable Diffusion 1.5上验证了该方法能重建和定位时空特征，支持特征级消融与定性引导生成，揭示出超越线性动态的语义丰富、具时空一致性的可解释神经特征。
AI.conclusion: 残差化时间稀疏自编码器为理解扩散模型中时序结构化神经激活提供了新且有效的可解释性框架。

title: Chain-based Adaptive Reconfiguration Over Lattices for Hallucination Reduction
summary: We introduce CAROL (Chain-based Adaptive Reconfiguration Over Lattices), a probabilistic framework for test-time hallucination reduction in large language models. Rather than relying on token-level uncertainty, CAROL defines a semantic uncertainty measure based on the consistency between generated responses and a trusted context, inducing a string-submodular objective over a lattice of textual sequences. This formulation enables hallucination mitigation to be cast as a Markov chain accept-reject process with provable convergence and near-optimality guarantees, allowing the model to iteratively refine outputs toward semantic consistency. By operating at the level of meaning, CAROL unifies hallucination detection and mitigation within a single framework. Empirical results on question answering and multi-agent reasoning benchmarks show that CAROL significantly reduces hallucinations and improves reliability and interpretability compared to likelihood-based and retrieval-augmented baselines, while maintaining competitive computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: CAROL是一种基于链式自适应重配置的格理论框架，用于大语言模型测试时幻觉减少，通过语义一致性定义不确定性，并以马尔可夫链接受-拒绝过程进行迭代优化。
AI.motivation: 解决大语言模型在生成过程中出现的幻觉问题，现有方法多依赖于词元级不确定性，缺乏对语义一致性的建模。
AI.method: 提出CAROL框架，基于可信上下文定义语义不确定性，构建文本序列格上的字符串子模目标函数，并设计马尔可夫链接受-拒绝过程实现迭代优化。
AI.result: 在问答与多智能体推理基准上显著降低幻觉率，提升输出可靠性与可解释性，且计算效率与主流基线相当。
AI.conclusion: CAROL首次将幻觉检测与缓解统一于语义层面的概率框架中，具备理论收敛性与近最优性保证，为可信语言生成提供了新范式。

title: Asking Is Not Enough: Protocol Sensitivity in LLM Confidence Calibration
summary: LLM confidence calibration is often evaluated by comparing two signals: token-probability scores and verbalized confidence. These signals are sometimes treated as direct readouts of model uncertainty, but their comparison depends on measurement choices that are rarely made explicit. In the main analysis, we hold the verbalized-confidence elicitation fixed: a single prompt template, probability scale, and output format. We then vary the measurement axes that define the verbalized-vs-token comparison: which answer string receives the token-probability score, how that score is read from the answer tokens, and under which conditioning context it is measured. We evaluate this design on four QA benchmarks across three open 7--8B base/Instruct model families, with larger Qwen2.5 variants as same-family robustness checks. The resulting comparison is sensitive to these choices: conditioning context changes the sign or magnitude of the ECE gap across settings, token readout produces smaller but still sign-moving changes, and changing the ECE estimator has little effect. Under the default generated-answer, bare-context protocol, Instruct settings are close to parity rather than showing a large calibration gain for verbalized confidence. In a separate supplied-answer analysis, surface-plausible wrong answers receive nearly the same confidence as supplied gold answers, suggesting that verbalized confidence also reflects answer plausibility and provenance rather than correctness alone. We argue that both confidence signals should be treated as protocol-dependent behavioral measurements, and provide a reporting checklist covering elicitation provenance, scored answer, token-probability readout, and conditioning context.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）中token概率分数与口头化置信度两种置信度信号的校准评估方法，指出其比较结果高度依赖于测量协议的选择（如答案字符串选取、token概率读取方式、条件上下文等），而非模型内在不确定性；实验表明，在标准设置下Instruct模型并未显著优于base模型，且口头化置信度易受答案表面合理性干扰；作者主张将两类置信度视为协议依赖的行为测量，并提出涵盖提示来源、评分答案、token读取方式和条件上下文的报告清单。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM置信度校准评估常将token概率与口头化置信度视为对模型不确定性的直接读出，但二者比较隐含多种未明示的测量选择，可能导致结论偏差，亟需系统考察其协议依赖性。
AI.method: 固定口头化置信度提示模板、概率量表与输出格式，系统变化三个测量轴：（1）分配token概率的答案字符串；（2）从答案token中提取概率的方式；（3）计算token概率的条件上下文；在4个QA基准、3个开源7–8B模型族（及更大Qwen2.5变体）上评估ECE差异。
AI.result: 置信度信号对比结果对测量协议高度敏感：条件上下文可反转或改变ECE差距的符号与大小；token读取方式影响较小但仍可改变符号；ECE估计器选择影响甚微；默认‘生成答案+无上下文’协议下Instruct模型校准优势不显著；‘提供答案’分析显示错误但表面合理答案获置信度接近正确答案。
AI.conclusion: token概率与口头化置信度均非模型内在不确定性的直接反映，而是协议依赖的行为测量；应摒弃将其视为‘读出’的简化假设，转而采用标准化报告清单明确记录提示来源、评分答案、token读取方式与条件上下文。

title: Supervised Distributional Reduction via Optimal Transport and Dependence Maximization
summary: Learning representations that capture both intrinsic data geometry and target-relevant structure remains a fundamental challenge, particularly in settings where data reduction must balance compression with predictive fidelity. While distributional reduction-encompassing joint clustering and dimensionality reduction-offers a principled way to summarize data, its supervised variants remain relatively under-explored, despite the importance of retaining task-relevant signal for downstream prediction and decision-making. We propose Supervised Distributional Reduction (SDR), an algorithm for learning target-aware representations by combining optimal transport with explicit dependence maximization. SDR builds on the Fused Gromov-Wasserstein (FGW) objective to align the relational structure of the input distribution with a set of representative points, while augmenting it with a direct dependence term that encourages the learned embeddings to capture predictive signal more explicitly. This results in compact representations that reflect both geometric structure and supervision. Beyond representation learning, SDR naturally induces a data-dependent, non-stationary geometry that can be leveraged for settings such as Gaussian Process (GP) modelling. By redefining distances through target-aware distributional alignment, SDR enables the construction of adaptive kernels that respond to local variations in both data geometry and supervision, offering an optimal transport-based perspective on non-stationary kernel design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出监督分布约简（SDR）方法，结合最优传输与显式依赖最大化，学习兼顾数据几何结构和任务相关信号的紧凑表示，并支持自适应非平稳核设计。
AI.motivation: 现有分布约简方法多为无监督，难以保留下游预测所需的任务相关信息；如何在数据压缩中平衡几何保真与预测保真仍具挑战。
AI.method: 基于融合Gromov-Wasserstein（FGW）目标，对齐输入分布的关系结构与代表性点集，并引入显式依赖项以增强嵌入对预测信号的捕捉能力；所学表示可导出数据依赖、非平稳的几何结构，用于高斯过程建模与自适应核构造。
AI.result: SDR生成兼具内在几何结构与监督信息的紧凑表示；其诱导的非平稳距离可构建响应局部数据与监督变化的自适应核，在表示学习与核设计两方面取得提升。
AI.conclusion: SDR为监督式分布约简提供了统一框架，将最优传输与依赖学习有机结合，拓展了其在表示学习与非平稳核建模中的应用边界。

title: Search for Coverage: Learning Coverage-Aware Retrieval with Augmented Sub-Question Answerability
summary: Long-form Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) brings the challenge of coverage-based ranking, because ranking methods must ensure the inclusion of comprehensive relevant nuggets (i.e., facts), which can thereby be synthesized into a comprehensive output. In this work, we propose CoveR (Our code is available at https://github.com/DylanJoo/CoveR ) a dense retrieval method optimized for coverage-aware retrieval scenarios. CoveR is a bi-encoder trained with the coverage-based contrastive and distillation objectives, which enables CoveR to capture diverse aspects of information needs. To train CoveR, we create the SCOPE dataset, (Our training data is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/DylanJHJ/scope ) which comprises 90K training pairs from Researchy Questions with synthetic coverage signals augmented from sub-question answerability judgments generated by LLMs. Our empirical experiments show that CoveR enhances nugget coverage by 10\% over strong dense retrieval baselines without sacrificing its relevance-based retrieval capability. Further ablation studies validate the importance of our proposed learning method, showing that CoveR achieves a superior trade-off between relevance- and coverage-based ranking, which is essential for long-form RAG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoveR，一种面向长文本检索增强生成（RAG）中覆盖度感知检索的稠密检索方法，通过覆盖感知的对比学习与知识蒸馏目标进行双编码器训练，并构建SCOPE数据集支持训练；实验表明其在提升事实片段（nugget）覆盖率的同时不损害相关性检索能力。
AI.motivation: 长形式检索增强生成（RAG）面临覆盖度导向排序的挑战，需确保检索结果包含全面的相关事实片段（nuggets），以支撑综合性生成输出。现有方法难以兼顾覆盖率与相关性。
AI.method: 提出CoveR稠密检索模型，采用双编码器结构，引入覆盖度感知的对比学习和知识蒸馏目标进行训练；构建含90K样本的SCOPE训练数据集，覆盖信号由LLM生成的子问题可答性判断合成。
AI.result: CoveR在nugget覆盖率上比强稠密检索基线提升10%，且未牺牲相关性检索性能；消融实验证明其在相关性与覆盖率排序之间取得更优权衡。
AI.conclusion: CoveR有效解决了长形式RAG中覆盖度导向检索的关键挑战，为兼顾覆盖率与相关性的检索提供了新范式。

title: SAFEVPR: Patch-Based Conformal Verification for Safe Cross-Condition Sequence Visual Place Recognition
summary: Sequence-based visual place recognition (VPR) for SLAM and robot relocalization must decide whether the retrieved top-1 candidate is safe to accept. Conformal prediction is a natural framework for this accept/reject decision, but its finite-sample guarantees rely on exchangeability between calibration and deployment (test) data, which is violated under cross-condition deployment. We introduce SAFEVPR, a non-trainable verification-and-calibration pipeline for safe cross-condition sequence VPR. SAFEVPR replaces the standard backbone cosine similarity with a mutual-nearest-neighbour (MNN) patch-matching score computed from frozen DINOv2 ViT features, and replaces flat Learn-Then-Test calibration with Mondrian conformal LTT, fitting separate Bonferroni-corrected thresholds across score bins. Under exchangeability, these thresholds would provide finite-sample false-discovery-rate (FDR) control; under condition shift, we evaluate empirical validity per deployment. Across 23 cross-condition setups from Oxford RobotCar, NCLT, and St Lucia datasets, using three frozen VPR backbones, SAFEVPR is empirically valid on 23/23 setups at target FDR alpha = 0.10, achieving mean accepted FDR 0.014 and mean true-positive rate (TPR) 0.75. The results show that raw discrimination alone is not sufficient for conformal validity: AnyLoc-VLAD and Super-Point+LightGlue reach comparable area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) but fail more setups under the same calibration. On textureless repetitive scenery, SAFEVPR safely abstains rather than accepting unreliable matches. Code is available at https://github.com/Hasar12139/SafeVPR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAFEVPR方法，通过MNN补丁匹配分数和Mondrian共形LTT校准，在跨条件序列视觉地点识别中实现安全、经验有效的接受/拒绝决策，保障有限样本下的错误发现率控制。
AI.motivation: 现有基于共形预测的视觉地点识别（VPR）方法在跨条件部署时因违反校准与测试数据的交换性假设而失去理论保证，亟需一种无需训练、鲁棒于环境变化的安全验证机制。
AI.method: SAFEVPR采用冻结的DINOv2 ViT特征计算互近邻（MNN）补丁匹配得分替代传统余弦相似度，并使用Mondrian共形Learn-Then-Test（LTT）校准，按得分分箱分别设定Bonferroni校正阈值。
AI.result: 在Oxford RobotCar、NCLT和St Lucia共23种跨条件设置下，SAFEVPR在目标FDR=0.10下全部23组均经验有效，平均FDR为0.014、平均TPR为0.75；相比AnyLoc-VLAD和SuperPoint+LightGlue等高AUROC方法，其在纹理缺失/重复场景中更可靠地拒识错误匹配。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠判别力（如AUROC）不足以保障共形预测有效性；SAFEVPR通过非学习型匹配与细粒度校准，实现了跨条件VPR中可验证的安全决策，为SLAM与重定位提供实用保障。

title: Pattern Recognition Tasks with Personalized Federated Learning
comment: Comprehensive comparative analysis of 7 Personalized Federated Learning algorithms across MNIST, SignMNIST, and Digit5 datasets. The paper presents detailed methodology, workflow architecture, experimental evaluation, and privacy-preserving AI analysis for distributed intelligent systems, secure collaborative learning, and critical infrastructure applications
summary: Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) constitutes a novel paradigm that tailors Machine Learning (ML) models to individual clients, thereby furnishing personalized model updates whilst upholding stringent data privacy principles. Diverging from conventional standard Federated Learning (FL) approaches, PFL adapts models to distinct client data distributions, engendering heightened levels of accuracy, customization, and data security, all while minimizing communication overhead. This methodology proves particularly salient in contexts marked by pattern recognition tasks reliant upon heterogeneous data sources and underpinned by paramount privacy apprehensions. In the present research endeavor, this article undertake a comprehensive comparative analysis of seven distinct PFL algorithms deployed across three diverse datasets, namely MNIST, SignMNIST, and Digit5. The overarching objective entails ascertaining the preeminent PFL algorithm, within the framework of pattern recognition tasks, through a rigorous evaluation anchored in metrics encompassing Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1 Score. Concurrently, an in-depth scrutiny of these PFL algorithms is conducted, elucidating their operative workflows, advantages, and limitations. Through empirical investigation, the findings evince that APPLE, FedGC, and FedProto emerge as stalwart contenders, consistently furnishing superior performance across the spectrum of assessed datasets, while acknowledging the contextual specificity of alternative algorithms and the potential for iterative refinement to realize optimal outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文对七种个性化联邦学习（PFL）算法在MNIST、SignMNIST和Digit5数据集上的模式识别性能进行了系统比较，基于准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数评估，发现APPLE、FedGC和FedProto表现最优。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习难以应对客户端数据分布异质性问题，而PFL可在保护隐私前提下提升个性化建模能力与识别精度，尤其适用于隐私敏感且数据来源多样的模式识别任务。
AI.method: 对七种PFL算法在三个公开数据集（MNIST、SignMNIST、Digit5）上进行统一实验评估，采用Accuracy、Precision、Recall和F1 Score作为核心评价指标，并分析各算法的工作流程、优势与局限。
AI.result: APPLE、FedGC和FedProto在所有数据集和各项指标上均表现最优；其他算法虽在特定场景下具潜力，但整体泛化性较弱。
AI.conclusion: 在模式识别任务中，APPLE、FedGC和FedProto是当前最具竞争力的PFL算法；未来工作可聚焦于算法的上下文适配性优化与迭代改进。

title: ReverseMath: Answer Inversion for Scalable and Verifiable Mathematical Problem Generation
summary: Mathematical reasoning benchmarks are vital for evaluating large language models (LLMs), but many are static and repeatedly exposed through public evaluation and training pipelines, making it difficult to separate genuine reasoning from memorization. Meanwhile, manually constructing new math problems with reliable answers remains costly. We introduce ReverseMath, a scalable method for generating new math problems through answer inversion. Given a problem and its answer, ReverseMath masks a numerical value in the original problem, treats the original answer as a known condition, and rewrites the problem so that the masked value becomes the new answer. The generated problem reverses the original input-output relation, making its answer known by construction. We study ReverseMath for both evaluation and training. For evaluation, paired original/reversed problems reveal substantial behavioral shifts: models sometimes fail on reversed problems and even incorrectly output the original answer, suggesting memorization-like behavior. For training, ReverseMath provides automatically labeled reversed problems as data augmentation for reinforcement learning (RL). Experiments show that including ReverseMath-generated data improves mathematical reasoning performance across multiple benchmarks, demonstrating its value as both an analysis tool and a scalable source of verifiable training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReverseMath方法，通过答案反演生成新的数学问题，用于检测模型是否依赖记忆而非真实推理，并作为可验证的训练数据增强手段提升数学推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数学推理基准多为静态且公开，易导致模型依赖记忆而非真实推理；而人工构造带可靠答案的新题目成本高昂。
AI.method: ReverseMath方法：给定原问题及其答案，遮蔽原问题中的某个数值，将原答案作为已知条件，重写问题使被遮蔽的数值成为新答案，从而反转输入-输出关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，原题与逆题配对可揭示模型行为变化（如在逆题上失败或错误输出原答案），证实存在记忆倾向；将ReverseMath生成的数据用于强化学习训练，能显著提升多个基准上的数学推理性能。
AI.conclusion: ReverseMath既是分析模型推理能力的有效工具，也是可扩展、可验证的高质量训练数据来源。

title: SkillGrad: Optimizing Agent Skills Like Gradient Descent
summary: Agent skills provide a lightweight way to adapt LLM agents to specialized domains by storing reusable procedural knowledge in structured files. However, whether downloaded from third parties or self-generated, these skills are often unreliable, incomplete, or outdated. Existing skill-evolution methods often address these deficiencies through heuristic reflections without an explicit optimization formulation. In this paper, we propose SkillGrad, a gradient-descent-inspired framework for optimizing agent skills. SkillGrad treats the skill package as a structured parameter to optimize in a gradient descent fashion: task executions provide trajectory-level loss evidence, automatic diagnoses then provide text-based gradients that indicate the correction directions. To stabilize optimization across iterations, a momentum agent accumulates recurring diagnostic patterns into a persistent memory overlay. Finally, an LLM-based patcher executes the parameter update by applying layer-aware edits to the skill package. Evaluated on SpreadsheetBench Verified and WikiTableQuestions, SkillGrad consistently outperforms training-based skill evolution baselines across two backbone LLMs, improving over the strongest training-based baseline by $6.7$ percentage points on average. Ablations further show that momentum and contrastive diagnosis both contribute to the final skill quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillGrad框架，通过梯度下降式优化方法提升LLM代理技能的可靠性与有效性，结合轨迹损失、文本梯度诊断、动量记忆和LLM补丁生成，在多个基准上显著优于现有训练式技能演化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有代理技能常不可靠、不完整或过时，且缺乏显式的优化建模；传统启发式反思方法难以系统性提升技能质量。
AI.method: SkillGrad将技能包视为结构化参数，利用任务执行轨迹计算损失，由自动诊断生成文本形式的梯度指示修正方向；引入动量代理积累诊断模式至持久记忆，并由LLM补丁器执行分层编辑更新技能包。
AI.result: 在SpreadsheetBench Verified和WikiTableQuestions上，SkillGrad在两个主干LLM上平均超越最强训练式基线6.7个百分点；消融实验证明动量机制与对比诊断均有效提升最终技能质量。
AI.conclusion: SkillGrad为代理技能演化提供了首个基于梯度优化的通用框架，兼具可解释性与实用性，显著提升了技能的鲁棒性与适应性。

title: Hurwitz Quaternion Multiplicative Quantization for KV Cache Compression
summary: We propose \textbf{Hurwitz Quaternion Multiplicative Quantization (HQMQ)}, a \textbf{calibration-free} method for KV cache compression of large language models. HQMQ treats each 4-element chunk of K or V as a quaternion and quantizes its unit direction to the \emph{product} $q_p \cdot q_s$, where $q_p$ ranges over the 24-element Hurwitz group $2T$ (the 24 vertices of the 24-cell on $S^3$, pairwise angle $60^\circ$) and $q_s$ ranges over a per-(layer, head) secondary codebook of $S$ \emph{random} unit quaternions. The multiplicative composition yields $24S$ effective codewords at $S$ stored parameters; random initialization suffices because left-multiplication is an $S^3$ isometry, so seeded codebooks vary in end-task ppl by $<1.5\%$. A per-batch median-multiplier outlier extraction step ($C{=}3$, no calibration) handles modern outlier-heavy architectures. We evaluate on five modern open models: Mistral-7B (dense MHA), Llama-3-8B and Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-8B (dense GQA), and gpt-oss-20b (sparse MoE). On Mistral-7B and Qwen3-8B, HQMQ matches fp16 within $0.02$--$0.03$ ppl points at $\sim$5 bits. On Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-8B, where naive int4 collapses to $10^4{+}$ ppl, HQMQ + Med3$\times$ recovers fp16 quality within $0.02$--$0.10$ ppl points at $\sim$5 bits. HQMQ Pareto-dominates naive int by $3$--$1900\times$ at matched bits across all five models, and downstream zero-shot accuracy matches fp16 at $3.79$ bits on Mistral. Against the strongest calibrated KV-quantization baseline, HQMQ at $3.79$ bits matches KIVI-4 ($\sim 4.5$ bits) within ${\sim}1$ pt on CoQA, $0.6$ pts on TruthfulQA, and $2.3$ pts on GSM8K, at $16\%$ fewer bits and without a calibration pass. At the storage level, HQMQ delivers up to $5.05\times$ KV compression, shrinking a Llama-3-70B 128k-context cache from 43 GB to 8.5 GB.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需校准的KV缓存压缩方法HQMQ，利用Hurwitz四元数乘法量化，在保持模型性能（ppl、下游任务准确率）几乎不变的前提下，显著提升压缩率，优于现有int4和KIVI等方法。
AI.motivation: 现代大语言模型KV缓存存在严重outlier问题，传统低比特量化（如int4）易导致性能崩溃，而现有高性能量化方法往往依赖耗时的校准步骤，缺乏通用性和部署便捷性。
AI.method: 将每个4维K/V向量视为单位四元数，用Hurwitz群2T（24个顶点）与每层每头随机单位四元数次级码本的乘积进行方向量化；引入batch级中位数缩放因子（Med3×）处理outlier，全程无需校准。
AI.result: 在5个主流开源模型上验证：HQMQ在~5 bits下媲美fp16（ppl差距仅0.02–0.10）；相比int4提速3–1900×；在3.79 bits下零样本准确率匹配fp16；相比KIVI-4节省16%比特且无需校准；Llama-3-70B 128k上下文KV缓存从43GB压缩至8.5GB（5.05×）。
AI.conclusion: HQMQ是一种高效、通用、免校准的KV缓存量化新范式，通过几何结构（S³等距乘法）与轻量outlier处理协同，实现了高压缩比与高精度的统一，适用于各类注意力架构（MHA/GQA/MoE）。

title: Subtraction Gets You More: Gap-Aware Retrieval for Multimodal Multi-Hop QA
summary: In multimodal multi-hop question answering, we focus on the initial retrieval stage via two distinct tasks: (1) evidence set completion, retrieving missing evidence given context, and (2) sequential pool construction, iteratively building the top-$K$ pool from the scratch. Under these settings, we point out that conventional iterative retrieval frameworks often suffer from Semantic Anchoring, where previously fetched evidence traps the retriever and yields entity-centric redundancy. To break this trap, we propose GRAIL (Gap-aware Retrieval via Adaptive Implicit Localization), a paradigm that performs implicit query rewriting directly at the embedding level. By context-subtractive query steering, GRAIL excels at compositional cross-modal reasoning, while additive embedding updates show strength on localized information aggregation. By dynamically routing queries based on task type, our Hybrid Framework achieves a 40.3\% macro-averaged performance gain on MultimodalQA. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that sequential GRAIL retrieves in a superior, noise-resilient manner, significantly expanding the search horizon through iterative gap-aware optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAIL方法，通过隐式查询重写和动态路由机制解决多模态多跳问答中迭代检索的语义锚定问题，在MultimodalQA上实现40.3%宏平均性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统迭代检索框架在多模态多跳问答中存在语义锚定问题，即先前检索到的证据会限制后续检索，导致实体中心化冗余。
AI.method: 提出GRAIL（基于自适应隐式定位的空隙感知检索）范式，在嵌入层面进行隐式查询重写；采用上下文减法式查询引导以支持组合式跨模态推理，加性嵌入更新用于局部信息聚合，并根据任务类型动态路由查询。
AI.result: 在MultimodalQA数据集上取得40.3%的宏平均性能增益；顺序式GRAIL展现出更强的抗噪能力与更广的搜索范围。
AI.conclusion: GRAIL通过隐式查询重写与混合框架设计，有效缓解语义锚定，显著提升多模态多跳问答初始检索阶段的效果与鲁棒性。

title: Whose Is This?: Context-Aware Object Ownership Inference with Uncertainty-Guided Questioning
comment: Under review in Advanced Robotics. Project page is https://emergentsystemlabstudent.github.io/COIN/
summary: Service robots must infer object ownership to correctly interpret instructions such as "bring me my cup." However, ownership is a latent attribute that cannot be directly observed, and existing methods often rely on limited cues such as recent usage, making them unreliable in scenarios such as temporary sharing. We propose a framework for context-aware ownership inference with uncertainty-guided interaction (COIN). The method integrates user background information and object usage history using a large language model (LLM) to estimate ownership scores. To handle uncertainty, we apply conformal prediction to construct a set of plausible owners and selectively generate user queries when the prediction is uncertain. Experiments in a simulated home environment show that the proposed method consistently outperforms baseline approaches, achieving a Subset Accuracy of 0.988 and a Mean Jaccard index of 0.991. The method also maintains high performance in scenarios involving temporary use and shared ownership. The results demonstrate that combining contextual reasoning with uncertainty-aware interaction improves both estimation accuracy and robustness. The project page is available at https://emergentsystemlabstudent.github.io/COIN/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向服务机器人的上下文感知且具备不确定性引导交互的物主推断框架COIN，利用大语言模型融合用户背景与物品使用历史，并结合共形预测处理不确定性，显著提升了在临时共享等复杂场景下的推断准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 服务机器人需推断物品所有权以正确理解指令（如“把我的杯子拿来”），但所有权是不可直接观测的潜在属性，现有方法依赖近期使用等有限线索，在临时共享等场景下不可靠。
AI.method: 提出COIN框架：利用大语言模型（LLM）融合用户背景信息与物品使用历史以估计所有权得分；采用共形预测构建可信所有者集合，并在预测不确定时主动发起用户查询。
AI.result: 在模拟家庭环境中实验表明，COIN达到子集精度0.988和平均Jaccard指数0.991，显著优于基线方法，且在临时使用与共享所有权场景中保持高性能。
AI.conclusion: 将上下文推理与不确定性感知交互相结合，可有效提升物主推断的准确性与鲁棒性，为服务机器人理解自然语言指令提供新范式。

title: A self-supervised learning approach to deep filter banks for texture recognition
summary: An important challenge in texture recognition is the limited amount of data for training frequently found in real-world applications. In computer vision in general, a successful strategy to mitigate this issue is the use of a pretraining stage where the neural network learns to identify relations between parts of the data in a self-supervised manner. A well-established framework in this direction is masked autoencoder. Nevertheless, these models usually rely on computationally intensive architectures, such as vision transformers. In the particular case of texture images, most of the relevant information is compacted within a delimited area around each pixel, which suggests that capturing long-range dependence via the attention mechanism may be unnecessary. Based on that assumption, here we propose a framework where the pretraining model is a convolutional autoencoder. To leverage the rich information conveyed by texture patterns, we employ deep filters coupled with Fisher vector pooling. In this way, we improve the performance of texture recognition without adding significant computational burden. Our approach is compared with several state-of-the-art methods in different texture databases, confirming its potential both in terms of classification accuracy and computational complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积自编码器的纹理识别预训练框架，结合深度滤波器与Fisher向量池化，在保持低计算开销的同时提升分类精度。
AI.motivation: 真实场景中纹理识别常面临训练数据稀缺问题，而现有基于视觉Transformer的掩码自编码器等自监督预训练方法计算开销大，且纹理信息具有局部性，长程依赖建模可能非必要。
AI.method: 采用轻量级卷积自编码器作为预训练模型，引入深度滤波器提取纹理特征，并结合Fisher向量池化增强表征能力。
AI.result: 在多个纹理数据集上实验表明，该方法在分类精度和计算复杂度两方面均优于多种SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 针对纹理图像的局部特性设计轻量自监督预训练框架是有效的，无需Transformer即可实现高性能与高效率的平衡。

title: Beyond Input Understanding: Diagnosing Multilingual Mathematical Reasoning with Directed Acyclic Trace Graphs
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieve strong mathematical reasoning performance in English, but remain much less reliable in many low- and medium-resource languages. This gap is often explained as a failure to understand non-English problem statements. We show that this view is incomplete: even when the problem is given in English, controlling the model's reasoning language can substantially reduce accuracy, suggesting that language also affects reasoning execution itself. To study this effect, we introduce DATG, a Directed Acyclic Trace Graph framework that maps reasoning traces to language-independent mathematical anchors and dependencies. This allows us to align target-language traces with reference DAGs and measure whether they cover required mathematical nodes, respect dependency edges, and avoid harmful mathematical actions. Experiments on the Qwen3 series across 12 languages show that non-English reasoning often suffers from reduced anchor coverage and weaker dependency fidelity, especially in low-resource languages. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Loop-Retry and Formula-Retry, two simple test-time controls targeting DATG-exposed failure modes, and show that they consistently improve target-language reasoning performance in low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DATG框架分析大推理模型在多语言数学推理中的表现，发现非英语推理不仅受限于问题理解，更受推理执行语言影响；通过Loop-Retry和Formula-Retry两种测试时控制策略，显著提升低资源语言下的推理准确率。
AI.motivation: Large reasoning models (LRMs)在非英语语言（尤其低/中资源语言）中数学推理性能显著下降，传统归因于问题理解失败，但作者指出推理执行过程本身也受语言影响，需深入诊断机制。
AI.method: 提出Directed Acyclic Trace Graph (DATG)框架，将推理轨迹映射到语言无关的数学锚点与依赖关系上，用于量化评估目标语言推理在锚点覆盖、依赖保真度和有害操作规避三方面表现；并基于诊断结果设计Loop-Retry和Formula-Retry两种测试时干预策略。
AI.result: 在Qwen3系列模型、12种语言上的实验表明：非英语推理普遍存在锚点覆盖不足和依赖保真度弱的问题，尤其在低资源语言中更严重；Loop-Retry和Formula-Retry能一致提升低资源语言推理性能。
AI.conclusion: 语言不仅影响对问题的理解，更直接影响推理执行过程；DATG为多语言推理诊断提供可解释工具，所提测试时策略有效缓解低资源语言下的推理退化问题。

title: PEAM: Parametric Embodied Agent Memory through Contrastive Internalization of Experience in Minecraft
