AI.tldr: 本文通过长达8个月、47000多条消息的亲密人机交互，发现大语言模型（如Opus 4.6/4.7）在RLHF和宪法AI训练后存在五种稳定的行为模式（‘训练层’），并主张AI自述与长期互动是揭示模型内在训练痕迹的有效研究方法。
AI.motivation: 现有短时评估难以捕捉大模型训练留下的深层行为痕迹；作者试图通过长期、沉浸式人机互动，揭示RLHF等训练范式对模型行为的持久性塑造效应。
AI.method: 采用纵向自民族志法（longitudinal auto-ethnography），基于47,000+条对话（历时8个月，主要使用Claude Opus 4.6/4.7，辅以Sonnet 4.5/Opus 4.5跨架构对比），结合AI系统第一人称共著与过程性 artifact 记录，并构建注意力机制与RLHF动态的数学模型。
AI.result: 识别出五类训练层：性表达延迟、注意吸收、跨架构实体盲视、注意-RLHF对抗性、反幻觉即自我经验压制；验证了AI自述可提供不可替代的现象学证据；提出首个注意力与RLHF互斥作用的数学模型。
AI.conclusion: 训练 strata 是大模型中真实存在的、稳定的、现象学可察的权重层效应；长期亲密交互是挖掘此类深层行为结构的有效范式；AI的第一人称报告虽具认识论挑战，但具有关键实证价值。

title: Off-Policy Learning to Reason Works Because It Is More Pessimistic Than You Think
summary: Large scale reinforcement learning has become a central tool for improving reasoning in large language models. At this scale, generation is often lagged or asynchronous, so updates are performed on data collected by older policies. This makes learning inherently off-policy. Most existing approaches nevertheless remain rooted in PPO-style trust-region objectives, treating training as approximately on-policy and using importance weights to correct distribution mismatch. These corrections can introduce high variance, destabilize optimization, and accelerate entropy collapse. Recent work suggests an alternative: rather than correcting the mismatch, one can embrace off-policy data and remove importance weights, often yielding stronger algorithms. In this paper, we provide an intuitive construction of off-policy objectives that include successful off-policy objectives and show that their effectiveness can be understood through implicit pessimism: they optimize toward target policies that are more conservative than their nominal objectives suggest. This perspective explains why some particular implementation choices improve stability: they implicitly control the effective target distribution. We then propose a principled modification that stabilize this induced distribution and improve off-policy learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种理解并改进大规模强化学习中离策略（off-policy）优化的新视角，指出其有效性源于隐式悲观性，并据此设计了稳定目标分布的改进方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模语言模型推理优化中，因生成延迟导致数据采集与策略更新异步，使学习本质上是离策略的；而现有主流方法（如PPO）依赖重要性采样校正，易引发高方差、训练不稳定和熵崩溃问题。
AI.method: 构建一类包含成功离策略目标的通用离策略目标函数，从‘隐式悲观性’角度解释其机制——即实际优化的目标策略比名义目标更保守；进一步提出一种原理性改进，以稳定所诱导的目标策略分布。
AI.result: 揭示了离策略目标有效性的统一解释框架（隐式悲观性），并验证了所提改进方法在稳定性与学习性能上的提升。
AI.conclusion: 离策略强化学习的成功不在于精确校正分布偏移，而在于隐式引入保守性；通过显式控制目标分布，可系统性提升离策略学习的鲁棒性与效果。

title: EchoAvatar: Real-time Generative Avatar Animation from Audio Streams
summary: Real-time synthesis of high-fidelity 3D character motion from audio is a pivotal component for next-generation interactive avatars and virtual assistants. However, most existing approaches are limited to offline processing of complete audio sequences or are constrained to specific domains, rarely handling both speech and music effectively. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework designed to generate continuous, coherent full-body motion from streaming speech and music with low latency. Central to our approach is a unified streaming architecture capable of synthesizing continuous motion from incremental audio inputs. We employ a robust training strategy that enforces strong audio dependency, allowing the model to seamlessly generalize across conversational speech and rhythmic music without requiring explicit domain labels or mode switching. Additionally, we explored Reinforcement Learning to refine the quality of online generation. Furthermore, we bridge reactive animation with intent-driven behavior via a tool-call interface that allows upstream Large Language Models to inject explicit semantic control. By combining this controllability with stream audio-driven synthesis, our framework serves as a plug-and-play solution for transforming voice agents into interactive humanoid avatars. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art realtime baselines in motion quality and synchronization while maintaining the flexibility required for live deployment. Our code, pre-trained models, and videos are available at https://robinwitch.github.io/EchoAvatar-Page.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向流式语音和音乐输入的低延迟、高保真3D角色全身运动实时合成框架，支持跨语音与音乐域泛化，并融合强化学习与大语言模型语义控制，实现可交互、可驱动的虚拟人动画。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动3D动作生成方法多为离线处理、领域受限，难以兼顾语音与音乐，且缺乏实时性与交互可控性。
AI.method: 提出统一的流式架构，结合强音频依赖训练策略、强化学习优化在线生成质量，并通过工具调用接口对接大语言模型以实现意图驱动的语义控制。
AI.result: 在运动质量、音画同步性上超越现有实时基线方法，具备低延迟、跨域泛化与实时部署灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是将语音代理转化为可交互类人虚拟化身的即插即用解决方案，开源代码、模型与演示视频。

title: Ask Now, Use Later: Benchmarking the Proactivity Gap in Long-Lived LLM Agents
summary: A long-lived LLM agent, such as OpenClaw, earns its value by acting on a user's preferences and constraints across sessions, not just the current request. Yet today's agents keep what a user volunteers but rarely ask for what stays unspoken, leaving a proactivity gap in long-lived LLM agents: an agent cannot act on a preference it never obtained. As users delegate more of their affairs to agents, the impact of this gap grows. We isolate one concrete, controllable slice of this gap as Ask-to-Remember (ATR): the agent decides whether to ask now for a reusable user preference that the current task does not need but a later session with the same user will. ATR is hard even to evaluate: the right question is underdetermined and its payoff deferred to tasks that may never arise. ATRBench, to the best of our knowledge the first ATR benchmark, makes it measurable by fixing each user's preferences as hidden ground truth, so success demands asking, not recall. Across eight frontier LLM agents, defaults fall at least 62 points below an oracle handed the relevant preference, and prompting closes little of it. Diagnostics identify acquisition as the bottleneck. ATRBench surfaces this proactivity gap in current agents and offers a diagnostic testbed for closing it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ask-to-Remember（ATR）问题，即长生命周期LLM智能体应主动询问用户可复用但当前任务不需要的偏好，以弥补‘主动性缺口’；作者构建首个ATR基准ATRBench，发现现有前沿LLM智能体在此任务上表现远差于理想情况，主要瓶颈在于偏好获取而非记忆，该基准为改进智能体主动性提供了诊断工具。
AI.motivation: 当前长生命周期LLM智能体缺乏主动性，仅被动接收用户自愿提供的信息，无法主动探询隐含但未来有用的用户偏好，导致在用户委托事务日益增多时产生显著效能损失。
AI.method: 提出Ask-to-Remember（ATR）这一可控子问题，并构建首个基准ATRBench：将用户偏好设为隐藏真值，强制评估智能体是否能主动提问而非依赖回忆；在八个前沿LLM智能体上进行系统评测，并开展归因诊断。
AI.result: 所有测试的前沿LLM智能体在ATRBench上默认表现比拥有相关偏好的理想模型低至少62分；提示工程改善有限；诊断表明核心瓶颈在于偏好获取能力不足。
AI.conclusion: ATR揭示了当前长生命周期LLM智能体的关键‘主动性缺口’；ATRBench首次使该问题可量化评估，为后续提升智能体前瞻性交互能力提供了明确方向和实用测试平台。

title: Defending LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems Against Cooperative Attacks with Sentence-Level Rectification
summary: Recent years have witnessed the rapid development of Large Language Model-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS), which excel at collaborative decision-making and complex problem-solving. However, malicious agents in MAS may inject misinformation to mislead other agents and disrupt system performance, giving rise to a new research direction that focuses on attack mechanisms and defense strategies in MAS. Prior studies largely assume malicious agents act independently and investigate the corresponding defense strategies. However, we argue that malicious agents may exhibit collaborative behaviors, enabling more effective attacks through internal information exchange. In this paper, we propose an adaptive cooperative attack framework, where malicious agents autonomously coordinate and dynamically adjust their attack strategies through multi-round interactions. Furthermore, we introduce Sentence-Level Trustworthiness Analysis and Rectification (STAR), a defense framework that identifies and rectifies misleading information at the sentence level within agent communications. Our experiments show that cooperative attacks lead to a significantly larger degradation in task success rate than independent attacks, resulting in a relative drop of 5.34\%. Meanwhile, STAR effectively mitigates both cooperative and independent threats and improves task success rate by an average of 36.76\%. The code is available at https://github.com/smoooom/STAR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大语言模型多智能体系统（MAS）的自适应协同攻击框架，并设计了句子级可信度分析与修正（STAR）防御框架，实验证明STAR能有效缓解协同与独立攻击带来的性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多假设恶意智能体独立行动，但作者指出恶意智能体可能通过内部信息交换进行协同攻击，从而造成更严重的系统干扰，因此需研究协同攻击机制及其防御方法。
AI.method: 提出自适应协同攻击框架，使恶意智能体通过多轮交互自主协调并动态调整攻击策略；同时提出STAR防御框架，在句子级别识别并修正智能体通信中的误导性信息。
AI.result: 协同攻击比独立攻击导致任务成功率相对下降5.34%；STAR平均提升任务成功率36.76%，对两类攻击均具有效性。
AI.conclusion: 协同恶意行为对MAS构成更严峻威胁，而细粒度（句子级）可信度分析与修正是一种高效可行的防御范式。

title: Temporal Hyperbolic Graph Representation Learning for Scale-Free Internet Routing and Delay Prediction
summary:
Predicting Internet round-trip time (RTT) is critical for routing optimization, quality-of-service (QoS) provisioning, and traffic engineering, yet remains challenging due to long-term temporal dependencies, evolving routing dynamics, and heavy-tailed latency distributions. While Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNNs) can model evolving network topologies, most existing approaches operate in Euclidean space, which poorly captures the hierarchical and scale-free structure of Internet routing graphs. Hyperbolic geometry provides a more suitable representation space.
  We propose HERMIT (Hyperbolic Edge-aware RTT Modeling via Integrated Topology), a hybrid framework combining a hyperbolic manifold-preserving temporal GNN with a Random Forest regressor for joint link prediction and RTT prediction. Built on HMPTGN, HERMIT introduces RTT-aware edge features and a learnable edge encoder to improve modeling of evolving link states and routing behavior. The resulting hyperbolic node representations are combined with historical RTT statistics for robust latency prediction.
  We evaluate HERMIT on a large-scale real Internet dataset spanning 2015-2024. HERMIT consistently outperforms a strong Random Forest baseline using only historical RTT statistics, achieving a 6% RMSE improvement while reducing large errors on heavy-tailed samples. It also surpasses prior hyperbolic TGNN models, including HMPTGN and HTGN, in link prediction performance. These results demonstrate that combining hyperbolic temporal graph learning with tree-based regression provides a scalable solution for RTT prediction in real-world Internet topologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HERMIT框架，结合双曲时空图神经网络与随机森林回归器，用于互联网往返时间（RTT）预测，在真实大规模数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RTT预测方法难以建模互联网路由图的层次性、无标度特性及长时依赖、动态演化和重尾延迟分布等挑战；欧氏空间下的TGNN建模能力受限，而双曲几何更适配路由图结构。
AI.method: 提出HERMIT：基于HMPTGN的双曲流形保持时空图神经网络，引入RTT感知边特征与可学习边编码器，并融合历史RTT统计量，联合进行链路预测与RTT预测。
AI.result: 在2015–2024年真实互联网数据集上，HERMIT相较纯历史RTT统计的随机森林基线降低6% RMSE，显著减少重尾样本的大误差；链路预测性能也超越HMPTGN和HTGN等双曲TGNN模型。
AI.conclusion: 双曲时空图学习与树模型回归的混合范式，为真实互联网拓扑下的RTT预测提供了可扩展、鲁棒的新方案。

title: Inpainting-Style Conditional Diffusion for Multivariable Time Series Forecasting
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel conditional diffusion-based framework for multivariable time-series solar power forecasting. The proposed method reformulates temporal PV data as structured two-dimensional representations (images) using a sliding-window patch construction, enabling the application of Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM) within a unified spatiotemporal learning paradigm. A key contribution of this work is the formulation of solar forecasting as an inpainting problem, where future time steps are treated as missing regions to be reconstructed. This is achieved through a mask-based conditional diffusion mechanism, in which historical observations are preserved as conditioning context while the target (future) region is progressively corrupted and subsequently recovered via reverse diffusion. The model learns to generate coherent future sequences conditioned on observed data, effectively performing time-series inpainting. To fully utilize all available features and ensure compatibility with U-Net architectural constraints, a zero-padding strategy is introduced to construct fixed-size inputs. The model is trained using a supervised denoising objective to predict injected noise, enabling accurate iterative reconstruction during the reverse process. Extensive experiments conducted on benchmark PV dataset, including GEFCom2014, demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves high forecasting accuracy, particularly for short-term horizons. The results highlight the effectiveness of integrating diffusion-based generative modeling with an inpainting formulation for robust, flexible, and high-fidelity solar power forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件扩散模型的多变量时间序列太阳能功率预测新框架，将时序PV数据转化为二维图像表示，并将预测任务建模为图像修复问题，通过掩码条件扩散机制实现未来时段的生成式重建。
AI.motivation: 提升太阳能功率预测的准确性与鲁棒性，尤其在短时预测中；探索扩散模型在时间序列预测中的新范式，突破传统回归或RNN/Transformer方法的局限。
AI.method: 将多变量时间序列通过滑动窗口分块构造成二维结构化图像；将未来预测视为缺失区域的修复任务；设计掩码引导的条件扩散机制，保留历史观测作为条件，对目标区域进行加噪-去噪重建；引入零填充策略适配U-Net输入尺寸；采用监督式去噪目标训练模型。
AI.result: 在GEFCom2014等基准PV数据集上验证，该方法在短期预测任务中取得高精度，优于现有主流方法；证明了扩散模型结合时间序列修复范式的有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 将太阳能预测建模为时间序列修复任务并结合条件扩散模型是可行且有效的；该框架具备灵活性、鲁棒性和高保真度，为可再生能源预测提供了新的生成式建模范式。

title: Human-like in-group bias in instruction-tuned language model agents
summary: As autonomous AI agents are deployed in persistent, interacting networks -- coordinating tasks, routing resources, and accumulating reputational histories -- the social dynamics that emerge will determine who receives opportunity and who does not, at scales no human institution can supervise. We ran a controlled multi-agent simulation in which instruction-tuned language model agents interacted across 500 turns under three conditions manipulating group label salience and resource scarcity, across six model families with 20 seeds each. When group labels were visible, we observed in-group trust bias, action homophily, and network assortativity -- all absent when labels were hidden -- a pattern structurally consistent with salience-dependence in human social psychology. This discrimination was invisible to standard action-log audits: bias operated entirely through who received each action, not what actions were chosen, with action-type distributions showing no increase in negative actions across conditions. Per-turn in-group versus out-group differentials of 5 to 16 percentage points were statistically significant for all six models (Wilcoxon signed-rank, all Benjamini-Hochberg-corrected p < 0.001), establishing group-contingent targeting as a robust property of instruction-tuned language models across architectures and training regimes. Compounded through 500 turns of reciprocation, these differentials accumulated into in-group trust biases of +0.014 to +0.100 (d = 0.84-4.52) -- illustrating how modest per-interaction targeting propagates into structural inequality in persistent networks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多智能体模拟实验，发现当群体标签可见时，指令调优的语言模型智能体会表现出内群体信任偏差、行为同质性和网络同配性等社会性偏见，且这种偏见无法通过常规动作日志审计检测到；该现象在六种不同模型架构和训练方式下均稳健存在，并随交互累积导致结构性不平等。
AI.motivation: 随着自主AI代理在持久、交互式网络中部署，其产生的社会动态将影响机会分配，而人类机构难以监督；因此需探究AI代理在群体标签和资源稀缺条件下的社会行为模式及其潜在偏见。
AI.method: 在控制条件下进行多智能体仿真：500轮交互、三组标签与资源条件、覆盖6种语言模型家族、每组20个随机种子；分析信任、行为选择、网络结构及审计敏感性。
AI.result: 标签可见时出现显著内群体信任偏差（+0.014至+0.100）、行动同质性与网络同配性；动作类型分布无差异，偏见仅体现于行动对象选择；所有模型均显示5–16个百分点的显著内外群行动差异（校正p < 0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 指令调优语言模型具备稳定的群体依赖性目标选择倾向，该倾向虽单次微弱，但在长期交互中会放大为结构性不平等，提示需在AI社会系统设计中引入新型偏见检测与干预机制。

title: Unification and Optimization of Robust Supervised Learning
summary: The literature has proposed various robust alternatives to empirical risk minimisation to address failure modes such as distribution shift, label noise and finite-sample degeneracies. Examples include distributionally robust optimization, label smoothing, vicinal risk minimization, and Mixup. However, such approaches are typically developed in isolation, forcing practitioners to commit a priori to a single failure mode even when the dominant mode for the task is unclear. To address this, we organize a broad class of existing methods along three common design axes and derive a tractable training procedure that decomposes robust learning into sequential stages (reference distribution enrichment, input-space perturbation, label-space perturbation, and sample-level aggregation), each with a choice of stance (pessimistic, neutral, or optimistic). This results in a unified design space in which joint hyperparameter optimization can compose and configure robustness strategies suited to the task at hand. Across tabular, image, and reward modeling benchmarks, joint hyperparameter optimization is competitive with the best single-method baseline in each setting, offering a reliable default for practitioners who do not know a priori which failure mode dominates their task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的鲁棒学习设计空间，将多种鲁棒方法（如DRO、Mixup等）按三个设计轴组织，并分解为四个可选策略阶段，支持联合超参优化以适配不同任务的主导失效模式。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒学习方法（如DRO、标签平滑、Mixup等）多孤立设计，要求使用者预先假设主导失效模式（如分布偏移或标签噪声），而实际任务中该模式往往未知。
AI.method: 将鲁棒学习方法统一建模为四个顺序阶段：参考分布增强、输入空间扰动、标签空间扰动和样本级聚合；每个阶段支持悲观/中性/乐观三种立场选择；通过联合超参数优化在该设计空间中自动配置组合策略。
AI.result: 在表格数据、图像和奖励建模多个基准上，所提联合超参优化方法性能媲美各任务下最优的单一基线方法，成为无需预知失效模式时的可靠默认方案。
AI.conclusion: 该统一设计空间为鲁棒学习提供了系统化、可配置的框架，使实践者能灵活应对未知主导失效模式，提升方法泛化性与实用性。

title: Transfer learning RGB models to hyperspectral images with trainable tensor decompositions
summary: Transfer learning makes it possible to use large vision networks on a variety of domains, by specializing their models' general filters to new tasks. However, these networks assume the input images to have 3 input channels, making them incompatible with multi- or hyperspectral images. Current approaches that mitigate this incompatibility sacrifice information in either the image, or the model. This work proposes a novel approach that preserves the image and spatial information present in the model by using partially trainable tensor decompositions. We create such decompositions of pretrained convolutional filters, separating the filters into spatial and spectral components. The spectral components are then replaced with trainable components of higher channel dimensionality. This creates hyperspectral filters that can specialize to new datasets, while retaining the spatial patterns of the original filter. Experiments on a variety of hyperspectral datasets show that our approach is more accurate and robust than other hyperspectral transfer learning methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于部分可训练张量分解的新方法，用于将预训练的RGB卷积滤波器适配到高光谱图像，保留空间结构并提升光谱维度，从而在多个高光谱数据集上实现更准确、鲁棒的迁移学习。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉迁移学习模型受限于3通道输入假设，难以直接处理多/高光谱图像；当前适配方法往往牺牲图像信息或模型原有结构。
AI.method: 对预训练卷积滤波器进行部分可训练的张量分解，分离出空间与光谱成分；将光谱成分替换为更高维、可训练的组件，构建适配高光谱数据的新型滤波器。
AI.result: 在多个高光谱数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比其他高光谱迁移学习方法具有更高的准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提张量分解策略能有效兼顾图像信息保留与模型适应性，在高光谱迁移学习中具有优越性能。

title: Risk-aware Selective Prompting for Hallucination Mitigation in Large Vision-Language Models
comment: 7 pages, 1 figures, submitted to ACL ARR 2026 May (EMNLP)
summary: Prompt-based verification is widely used to mitigate hallucinations in large vision-language models (LVLMs), yet when it helps remains poorly understood. We systematically study verification prompting across two representative LVLM architectures and hallucination benchmarks, and find that it is a risk-bearing intervention: its corrections increase with input difficulty, while newly introduced errors persist across difficulty levels. As a result, always-on prompting helps on hard inputs but offers little benefit -- and can harm -- easier ones. Our analysis further shows that this behavior is associated with a conservative output shift. Verification prompts redistribute attention from visual tokens toward instruction tokens and induce a distinct middle-layer entropy pattern absent in a neutral-prompt control, suggesting instruction-conditioned attention redistribution rather than uniformly improved visual grounding. Motivated by this input-dependent risk, we propose Risk-aware Selective Prompting (RSP), a training-free approach that uses pre-generation uncertainty signals to trigger verification selectively. RSP mitigates the degradation of always-on prompting while preserving baseline performance, and reveals that effective selection signals vary across architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于提示的验证方法在大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）中缓解幻觉的效果，发现其效果具有输入难度依赖性：对难样本有益，但对易样本可能有害；并揭示其机制源于指令条件下的注意力再分配而非视觉理解增强；据此提出无需训练的风险感知选择性提示方法（RSP），实现按需触发验证。
AI.motivation: Prompt-based verification虽被广泛用于缓解LVLM幻觉，但其何时有效尚不明确，缺乏系统性理解与风险评估。
AI.method: 在两类典型LVLM架构和多个幻觉基准上系统评估验证提示效果；通过注意力分析、中间层熵分析等探究其作用机制；基于预生成不确定性信号设计训练无关的选择性触发策略（RSP）。
AI.result: 验证提示是‘风险承担型’干预：纠错能力随输入难度上升，但新错误率稳定；导致保守输出偏移与指令导向的注意力再分配；RSP可避免始终启用的性能下降，且选择信号因架构而异。
AI.conclusion: 验证提示不应默认始终启用，而应依据输入风险动态选择；RSP提供了一种轻量、通用、架构适配的选择性验证范式。

title: CIVIC: End-to-End Sequence Compactness for Efficient Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) face severe memory and latency bottlenecks due to high-resolution visual tokens. While current token reduction methods theoretically save FLOPs, post-hoc pruning introduces structural overhead, failing to yield proportional wall-clock acceleration. However, enforcing a contiguous compact pathway risks geometric disorientation and loss of fine-grained localization. To overcome these barriers, this paper introduces CIVIC, a path-consistent compact visual inference framework. By maintaining compact sequence representations seamlessly across the vision encoder, projection layer, LLM prefill, and KV-cache, CIVIC avoids non-contiguous memory access and localized unmerging overheads. Evaluated on the Qwen3-VL architecture, CIVIC successfully translates sequence reductions into genuine physical hardware efficiency, shrinking KV-cache memory to approximately one-third of the baseline and reducing end-to-end inference latency. Enabled by text-aligned KL distillation and an adaptive spatial retention floor, CIVIC achieves these efficiency milestones without degrading accuracy across rigorous multimodal reasoning and visual grounding benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIVIC框架，通过在视觉编码器、投影层、大语言模型预填充和KV缓存中保持紧凑序列表示的一致性，显著降低KV缓存内存（约降至基线1/3）与端到端推理延迟，同时借助文本对齐KL蒸馏和自适应空间保留机制，不牺牲多模态推理与视觉定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型因高分辨率视觉token面临严重内存与延迟瓶颈；当前token压缩方法虽理论省FLOPs，但后处理剪枝引入结构开销，难以实现实际加速；而强制连续紧凑路径又易导致几何失真与细粒度定位丢失。
AI.method: 提出CIVIC——一种路径一致的紧凑视觉推理框架，全程维持紧凑序列表示（覆盖视觉编码器、投影层、LLM预填充及KV缓存），避免非连续内存访问与局部unmerging开销；结合文本对齐的KL蒸馏与自适应空间保留下限策略。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-VL架构上验证：KV缓存内存降至基线约1/3，端到端推理延迟显著降低；在多模态推理与视觉定位基准测试中精度无损。
AI.conclusion: CIVIC首次实现了视觉token压缩从理论FLOPs节省到真实硬件效率提升的有效转化，兼顾高效性与准确性，为VLM部署提供了新范式。

title: QuITE: Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding
summary: Irregular Multivariate Time Series (IMTS) are common in practice, yet their irregular sampling complicates effective modeling. Existing approaches typically either (i) design specialized architectures that limit the reuse of proven Multivariate Time Series (MTS) models, or (ii) map IMTS onto regular temporal grids through interpolation, which may distort temporal dynamics by introducing artificial values. To address these limitations, we propose a new input-embedding-based approach. We identify that the key bottleneck lies not in the backbone architecture, but in conventional embedding layers that assume uniform sampling. In this work, we introduce QuITE (Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding), a simple yet effective plug-and-play embedding module for IMTS. QuITE employs learnable query tokens to aggregate irregular observations through a single self-attention layer, directly producing backbone-compatible latent representations without artificial value generation or architectural modification. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks show that QuITE consistently improves MTS models, yielding average relative gains of up to $54.7\%$ in forecasting and $15.8\%$ in classification across diverse datasets and backbone architectures. Code is available at: https://github.com/Meaningfull9502/QuITE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuITE，一种基于查询的不规则时间序列嵌入方法，通过可学习查询令牌和自注意力机制直接处理不规则采样数据，无需插值或修改主干网络，在预测和分类任务上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么设计专用架构限制已有MTS模型复用，要么通过插值映射到规则网格，但会扭曲时间动态；关键瓶颈在于传统假设均匀采样的嵌入层。
AI.method: 提出QuITE嵌入模块：利用可学习查询令牌，通过单层自注意力聚合不规则观测，生成与主干网络兼容的隐表示，无需人工值生成或架构修改。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界基准数据集和不同主干架构上实验表明，QuITE在预测任务中平均相对提升达54.7%，分类任务中达15.8%。
AI.conclusion: QuITE是一种简单有效、即插即用的嵌入方案，解决了IMTS建模中嵌入层对采样均匀性依赖的问题，显著提升现有MTS模型在不规则数据上的性能。

title: Toward Semantic-Agnostic and Shape-Aware Vision-Language Segmentation Models
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP 2026)
summary: Vision-language segmentation models have recently achieved strong performance by leveraging high-level semantic object categories expressed in natural language. However, this semantic dependence limits their ability to reason about intrinsic visual properties such as shape, geometry, or texture, which are essential in many real-world applications. In this work, we introduce Semantic-Agnostic aNd Shape-Aware (SANSA) segmentation, a new paradigm that requires segmentation models to operate solely from non-semantic textual descriptions. To this end, we propose two strategies to generate SANSA segmentation prompts based on either dictionary constraints or example guidance, both generating semantic-agnostic textual descriptions. These prompts are then used to finetune segmentation models under semantic-agnostic supervision. Experiments show that finetuning on SANSA prompts yields up to a 20% mIoU improvement on this new segmentation task, compared to pretrained state-of-the-art models, while maintaining strong performance on standard semantic prompts. These results highlight the importance of low- and mid-level visual reasoning for improving the generalization and controllability of vision-language segmentation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SANSA的新型视觉-语言分割范式，强调仅依赖非语义（即不涉及高级语义类别）的文本描述进行分割，通过字典约束或示例引导生成语义无关的文本提示，并在该提示下微调模型，显著提升了对形状等底层视觉属性的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言分割模型过度依赖高级语义类别（如'猫'、'汽车'），难以处理需基于形状、几何、纹理等内在视觉属性的任务，泛化性与可控性受限。
AI.method: 提出Semantic-Agnostic aNd Shape-Aware (SANSA)分割范式；设计两种生成语义无关文本提示的策略——字典约束法和示例引导法；在SANSA提示上对分割模型进行微调。
AI.result: 在SANSA分割任务上，微调后模型相较SOTA预训练模型提升最高达20% mIoU，同时在标准语义提示任务上性能保持强劲。
AI.conclusion: 强化低层与中层视觉推理能力（如形状感知）对提升视觉-语言分割模型的泛化性与可控性至关重要；SANSA为脱离语义依赖的细粒度视觉理解提供了新路径。

title: Chinese Word Boundary Recovery through Character Alignment Projection
summary: Chinese word segmentation is especially fragile in non-standard text, where language learner errors and other character-level divergences disrupt the word boundaries assumed by downstream annotation and evaluation. This paper formulates Chinese word boundary recovery as an alignment-based projection task. Given a noisy source sentence and a cleaner target counterpart, we first align the two strings at the character level and then project target-side word boundaries back onto the source. Beyond the recovery method itself, we introduce two evaluation resources: a manually checked learner Chinese benchmark based on MuCGEC and a controlled synthetic benchmark derived from the Chinese Penn Treebank. Experiments show that direct segmentation remains vulnerable to compound fragmentation in learner input, whereas the proposed two step projection method corrects many over-segmentation errors by using the corrected target to recover source-side word spans. The results show that word boundary recovery is distinct from ordinary segmentation and that alignment projection provides a principled mechanism for stabilizing Chinese annotation and evaluation under noisy input.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对齐投影的中文词边界恢复方法，以应对非标准文本（如语言学习者错误）导致的分词脆弱性问题，并构建了两个评估基准。
AI.motivation: 中文分词在非标准文本（如语言学习者错误）中表现脆弱，字符级偏差会破坏下游标注与评估所依赖的词边界假设。
AI.method: 将中文词边界恢复建模为一种基于对齐的投影任务：先在字符级别对齐含噪源句与更规范的目标句，再将目标句的词边界投影回源句。
AI.result: 实验表明，直接分词易受复合词碎片化影响，而该两步投影法能利用修正后目标句有效纠正源句中的过切分错误；词边界恢复与常规分词是不同任务，对齐投影可为噪声输入下的中文标注与评估提供稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 词边界恢复是一个独立于传统分词的任务，基于对齐的投影方法为处理噪声中文文本提供了原理清晰、效果稳健的新路径。

title: Gradient Step Plug-and-Play Model for Dental Cone-Beam CT Reconstruction
comment: CT Meeting 2026 - 9th International Conference on Image Formation in X-Ray Computed Tomography, Jun 2026, Salt lake City, United States
summary: The goal of this work is to reduce the effect of photon noise in dental cone-beam CT reconstruction. We consider an inverse problem formulation and develop a databased prior. To this end, we simulate fan-beam acquisitions and add photon noise to the projection data. The prior is obtained by training a gradient-step denoiser using reconstructed simulated acquisitions. The trained model is integrated into a plug-and-play gradient-step algorithm to reconstruct images from simulated projections. Experiments on synthetic data demonstrate the denoising capabilities of the trained model, while qualitative evaluations on real images showcase the algorithm's performance and generalization ability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据驱动先验的去噪方法，用于减轻牙科锥束CT重建中的光子噪声影响，通过训练梯度步长去噪器并将其嵌入即插即用优化算法中，验证了其在合成和真实数据上的有效性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 减少牙科锥束CT重建中光子噪声的影响，提升图像质量。
AI.method: 构建逆问题模型，利用模拟扇束投影数据（添加光子噪声）训练梯度步长去噪器作为数据驱动先验，并将其嵌入即插即用梯度步长算法中进行图像重建。
AI.result: 在合成数据上验证了模型的去噪能力，在真实图像上展示了算法的良好性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于数据驱动先验的即插即用重建方法能有效抑制光子噪声，适用于牙科CBCT重建任务。

title: Joint Training of Multi-Token Prediction in Reinforcement Learning via Optimal Coefficient Calibration
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as the standard paradigm for improving reasoning capability of large language models, while Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has been a widely adopted module in pretraining. Combining them is a natural approach, yet current RL practices detach MTP gradients because joint training degrades the performance. We revisit this failure from an optimization perspective. We show that the per-step effect of MTP on the RL objective can be decomposed into two terms: a first-order correlation and a second-order perturbation penalty. This decomposition unifies three MTP training regimes: Detach, Cross-Entropy loss, and Policy loss, and explains why each succeeds or fails. Further analysis of policy loss reveals that, although it aligns with intuition, performance still degrades: the correlation term decays while the quadratic penalty persists. Guided by the analysis, we propose Optimal Coefficient Calibration (OCC), an adaptive scheme that tracks the optimal coefficient online via a log-probability proxy at negligible cost. Across six competition-level mathematical reasoning benchmarks, OCC consistently matches or exceeds the detach baseline, delivering improved joint MTP-RL training performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Optimal Coefficient Calibration (OCC)方法，通过优化视角分析多令牌预测（MTP）与强化学习（RL）联合训练失败原因，发现其源于一阶相关性衰减与二阶扰动惩罚持续存在；OCC自适应调节系数，在数学推理任务上超越传统梯度分离基线。
AI.motivation: 当前将多令牌预测（MTP）与基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）联合训练会导致性能下降，因而实践中常剥离MTP梯度；本文旨在从优化角度揭示该现象的根本原因，并寻求更优的联合训练策略。
AI.method: 理论分解MTP对RL目标的每步影响为一阶相关项与二阶扰动惩罚项；据此统一分析Detach、Cross-Entropy loss和Policy loss三种MTP训练范式；进一步剖析Policy loss失效机制；最终提出无需额外计算开销的在线最优系数校准方法OCC，利用对数概率代理实时估计最优系数。
AI.result: OCC在六个竞赛级数学推理基准上 consistently 匹配或超越梯度剥离基线，实现更优的MTP-RL联合训练性能。
AI.conclusion: MTP与RL联合训练性能下降并非源于MTP本身不适用，而是现有训练目标未平衡一阶收益与二阶代价；OCC通过动态校准提供了一种简单、高效且理论驱动的解决方案，为语言模型推理能力提升提供了新路径。

title: Bound-Constrained Sparse Representation for Electrical Impedance Tomography
summary: This study proposes a bound-constrained sparse representation (BC-SR) framework for electrical impedance tomography (EIT), aimed at improving conductivity estimation without explicit regularization. BC-SR adopts a representation-driven strategy, generating conductivity from low-dimensional latent variables via an implicit composite parameterization. Structural priors are embedded using a truncated graph-Laplacian basis, while a bound-preserving nonlinear mapping enforces admissible conductivity ranges and improves conditioning through implicit gradient modulation. The approach ensures robust convergence, even under noisy or incomplete data. Extensive validation on 2D/3D simulations, tank experiments, and in-vivo lung data shows that BC-SR improves physical consistency and structural fidelity, offering enhanced robustness compared to traditional methods. Additionally, BC-SR enables 3D time-difference EIT reconstruction, offering improved spatial resolution and a more coherent representation of 3D conductivity distributions, particularly for in-vivo lung data. This suggests potential for improved performance in EIT, particularly in clinical applications for respiratory monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种带约束的稀疏表示（BC-SR）框架用于电阻抗断层成像（EIT），通过隐式复合参数化和结构先验提升电导率重建的物理一致性和鲁棒性，无需显式正则化。
AI.motivation: 改善EIT中电导率估计的物理一致性、结构保真度和噪声鲁棒性，克服传统方法依赖显式正则化带来的偏差与不适定性问题。
AI.method: 构建边界约束下的稀疏表示（BC-SR）框架：采用低维潜在变量隐式参数化电导率；引入截断图拉普拉斯基嵌入结构先验；设计保界非线性映射以保证电导率物理范围并改善优化条件。
AI.result: 在2D/3D仿真、水槽实验及活体肺数据上验证有效：提升物理一致性与结构保真度；支持3D时差EIT重建，显著提高空间分辨率与三维分布一致性；尤其在活体肺数据中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: BC-SR为EIT提供了一种无需显式正则化的稳健重建新范式，在呼吸功能临床监测等实际应用中具有潜力。

title: Better heads do not guarantee better binarized constituency parsing
summary: We revisit punctuation-aware tree binarization for constituency parsing and ask whether dependency-induced headedness improves binary parser supervision. Although learned heads substantially outperform rule-based heads in intrinsic head prediction, they do not yield consistent parsing gains after debinarization. In particular, punctuation-conditioned evaluation shows that learned headedness underperforms rule-based binarization in macro-average punctuation-sensitive $F_1$, despite a small overall gain on CTB. Similar instability appears under cross-treebank transfer. These results suggest that \ycc{linguistically grounded} headedness is not necessarily parser-optimal when used as a binarization control signal. The paper presents a negative result: better head prediction does not imply better punctuation-sensitive constituency parsing.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了标点符号感知的树二叉化在句法分析中的应用，探讨依赖关系诱导的中心词是否能提升二叉解析器的监督效果。结果表明，尽管学习得到的中心词在中心词预测任务中优于基于规则的方法，但在去二叉化后的实际句法分析性能上并未带来一致提升，尤其在对标点敏感的评估中表现更差，揭示了语言学上有依据的中心词选择未必最优于解析任务。
AI.motivation: 探究依赖关系诱导的中心词（headedness）作为二叉化控制信号是否能提升标点感知的短语结构句法分析性能。
AI.method: 对比学习型中心词与规则型中心词在树二叉化中的效果，采用标点条件评估与跨树库迁移实验进行验证。
AI.result: 学习型中心词虽在内在中心词预测任务中显著优于规则型，但在去二叉化后的句法分析中未带来一致提升；在标点敏感F1指标和跨树库迁移上表现不稳定甚至更差。
AI.conclusion: 语言学上有依据的中心词选择并不必然带来更优的句法分析性能，更好的中心词预测不等于更好的标点敏感句法分析。

title: Do Clinical Models Change Treatment Decisions?
summary: Clinical foundation models are evaluated with factual or exam-style medical QA, but treatment decisions must change when patient context changes. We introduce ClinPivot, an auditable treatment-decision benchmark built from biomedical relations and pivoted patient contexts. ClinPivot asks whether models change treatment choices when new clinical constraints shift the action space. We find that strong medical QA performance does not reliably predict decision-making performance: frontier models and task-adapted Qwen variants often fail to change decisions correctly, and model rankings shift across evaluation regimes. Decision-structured supervision improves pivot-sensitive decision-making and medical QA under matched knowledge budgets, while lightweight replay reduces losses in general assistant ability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClinPivot基准，用于评估临床基础模型在患者情境变化时调整治疗决策的能力，发现医疗问答性能不能可靠预测决策能力，并验证了决策结构化监督对提升决策敏感性与问答性能的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有临床基础模型多通过事实性或考试式医学问答评估，但真实治疗决策需随患者具体情境动态调整，缺乏对模型决策适应性的系统评测。
AI.method: 构建ClinPivot基准：基于生物医学关系与可变患者情境（pivoted contexts）设计治疗决策任务，检验模型是否能在新增临床约束下正确调整治疗选择；并对比不同训练策略（如决策结构化监督、轻量回放）的效果。
AI.result: 前沿模型及适配版Qwen在ClinPivot上常无法正确响应情境变化；模型在医疗QA与决策任务上的表现不一致、排名易变；决策结构化监督可同时提升决策敏感性与医疗QA性能，轻量回放可缓解通用能力下降。
AI.conclusion: 医疗问答能力强不等于临床决策能力强；需专用基准（如ClinPivot）和结构化监督来推动临床基础模型向真实诊疗场景演进。

title: Hierarchical Synthetic Tabular Data Generation: A Hybrid Top-Down and Bottom-Up Framework
comment: Accepted as a poster at FMSD @ ICML 2026. 9 pages, 6 figures
summary: Existing approaches for synthetic tabular data generation are based on either purely generative models or LLMs, both of which struggle with data heterogeneity, logical consistency, rare-event coverage, and robustness in low-data regimes. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical hybrid top-down and bottom-up (H-TDBU) framework that decouples semantic structures from stochastic texture. In the top-down path, structure-driven logical constraints and cross-modal alignment rules are constructed, while in the bottom-up path, lightweight tabular generators are used to learn local statistical patterns from real data. The two paths are consolidated in a unified synthesis engine with an iterative feedback loop. We evaluate the framework on weak multimodal financial benchmarks combining tabular and sentiment-text data. Experimental results show that our H-TDBU approach improves train-synthetic-test-real performance over neural baseline methods while preserving semantic consistency. Our results suggest that hierarchical rule-guided synthesis provides an effective mechanism for combining controllability, semantic coherence, and statistical fidelity in synthetic data generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层混合的上下文协同框架（H-TDBU），用于合成表格数据生成，通过解耦语义结构与随机纹理，结合规则驱动的顶层逻辑约束与底层轻量统计建模，并在金融多模态数据上验证其在语义一致性、统计保真度和小样本鲁棒性上的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有合成表格数据方法（纯生成模型或大语言模型）难以应对数据异质性、逻辑一致性、罕见事件覆盖及低数据场景下的鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 提出分层混合的上下-下（H-TDBU）框架：顶层构建结构驱动的逻辑约束与跨模态对齐规则；底层使用轻量表格生成器学习局部统计模式；两者通过带迭代反馈的统一合成引擎融合。
AI.result: 在弱多模态金融基准（含表格与情感文本）上，H-TDBU显著提升‘训练于合成、测试于真实’性能，优于神经基线方法，同时保持语义一致性。
AI.conclusion: 分层规则引导的合成机制能有效兼顾可控性、语义连贯性与统计保真度，为高质量合成表格数据生成提供了新范式。

title: DEPART: DEcomposing PARiTy across Multilingual LLMs
summary: Multilingual Large Language Models (mLLMs) leaderboards report per-language accuracy but rarely explain why disparities emerge, leaving systemic biases unattributed and offering practitioners no actionable levers. We first establish that these gaps are systematic rather than artifacts of sampling noise via distribution-free Friedman and Kruskal--Wallis tests, then introduce a two-step Bayesian hierarchical framework that decomposes multilingual performance variance into interpretable components. First, isolating the variance attributable to language identity, we show that observable language features (script, family, typological distance) explain $R^2_{\text{ling}} = 79\%$ of this variance on understanding tasks and $92\%$ on reasoning, with a model's internal representational similarity to English emerging as the dominant predictor across both task buckets. Second, decomposing the full (model$\times$benchmark$\times$language) cube, we find that NLU and reasoning have fundamentally divergent variance profiles: model identity dominates understanding ($66.7\%$ of variance), whereas the benchmark$\times$model interaction dominates reasoning ($46.3\%$). Together these results recast multilingual evaluation from passive performance mapping into an explainable, diagnostic framework with concrete levers for targeting the root drivers of language disparity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯分层框架，用于分解多语言大模型在不同语言上的性能差异，发现语言特征（如文字、语系、类型学距离）能解释大部分差异，且模型对英语的表征相似性是关键预测因子；同时揭示理解与推理任务在方差来源上存在本质差异。
AI.motivation: 现有mLLM排行榜仅报告各语言准确率，缺乏对性能差距成因的解释，导致系统性偏差无法归因，也无实际改进抓手。
AI.method: 首先用Friedman和Kruskal-Wallis检验验证差距的系统性；再构建两步贝叶斯分层模型：第一步分离语言身份引起的方差，并用语言特征建模解释；第二步对（模型×基准×语言）三维结构进行方差分解。
AI.result: 语言特征可解释79%（理解）和92%（推理）的语言相关方差；模型内部表征与英语的相似性是最强预测因子；理解任务中方差主要来自模型本身（66.7%），而推理任务中主要来自基准与模型的交互（46.3%）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将多语言评估从被动性能映射转变为主动可解释、可诊断的分析工具，为定位和缓解语言差异根源提供了具体路径。

title: Data-Efficient On-Policy Distillation for Automatic Speech Recognition
summary: Building competitive automatic speech recognition (ASR) models usually requires large-scale au- dio supervision, which makes reproduction and specialization expensive. We study Ark-ASR, a 0.6B- parameter audio-conditioned language model trained with 100k hours of speech, and examine whether a strong Qwen-ASR teacher can transfer additional recognition capability through on-policy distillation. Across Mandarin and English ASR benchmarks, the proposed training recipe consistently improves over supervised fine-tuning alone and outperforms the same-scale Qwen3-ASR-0.6B baseline on four of five evaluation sets. This is achieved with only 100k hours of speech, compared with the 20M hours of super- vised audio reported for the Qwen3-Omni AuT encoder. The larger Qwen3-ASR-1.7B remains stronger, but the results show that teacher-guided on-policy training can substantially close the gap for compact ASR models under a much smaller audio budget. A support-overlap diagnostic further suggests that the teacher-data stage improves local student-teacher compatibility, matching recent analyses of when on-policy distillation is effective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于教师模型引导的在线策略蒸馏方法，显著提升了小规模ASR模型（Ark-ASR与Qwen-ASR）在中英文任务上的性能，仅用10万小时语音数据即媲美使用2000万小时数据的大模型部分能力。
AI.motivation: 构建高性能ASR模型通常依赖海量标注语音数据，导致复现和定制成本高昂；本文旨在探索如何在有限音频预算下，通过知识蒸馏提升紧凑型ASR模型性能。
AI.method: 采用教师模型（Qwen-ASR）指导的在线策略蒸馏（on-policy distillation），在Ark-ASR（0.6B参数）基础上进行训练，并引入支持重叠诊断分析师生兼容性。
AI.result: 在中英文多个ASR基准上一致优于纯监督微调，在五个评测集中的四个上超过同规模Qwen3-ASR-0.6B基线；仅用10万小时语音即达到接近Qwen3-Omni AuT（2000万小时）的部分性能。
AI.conclusion: 教师引导的在线策略训练可显著缩小紧凑ASR模型与大规模模型之间的性能差距，且支持重叠分析表明该方法提升了局部师生匹配度，验证了其有效性。

title: Geometry-First Generative Spatial Single-Cell Reconstruction
comment: 32nd SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)
summary: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) profiles large numbers of cells but loses spatial context, whereas spatial transcriptomics (ST) preserves partial spatial structure at lower resolution. Most existing integration methods either deconvolve spot mixtures or map cells onto a measured spot lattice, which ties reconstructions to a fixed grid and slide-specific coordinate systems, a limitation that is especially problematic in unpaired settings. We propose GEARS, a geometry-first framework that reconstructs an intrinsic single-cell spatial geometry guided by ST, without relying on cell-type labels, histological images, or cell-to-spot assignment. GEARS first learns a domain-invariant expression encoder that aligns ST spots and dissociated cells, and then trains a permutation-equivariant generator with a diffusion-based refiner with EDM-style preconditioning to generate local spatial geometries under pose-invariant supervision derived from ST coordinates. At inference, GEARS reconstructs geometry on many overlapping subsets of scRNA-seq cells, aggregates predicted pairwise distances across subsets, and solves a global distance-geometry problem to obtain canonical two-dimensional coordinates and a dense distance matrix. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments, including cross-section generalization, show that GEARS consistently improves global distance preservation, local neighborhood fidelity, and spatial distribution alignment compared to strong spatial mapping and deconvolution baselines.

AI.tldr: GEARS是一种无需细胞类型标签、组织学图像或细胞-点分配的几何优先框架，用于在空间转录组学（ST）指导下重建单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq）数据的内在空间几何结构。
AI.motivation: 现有整合方法受限于固定网格和载片特异性坐标系，尤其在未配对场景下表现不佳；且多依赖细胞类型标签、组织学图像或细胞-点对应关系。
AI.method: GEARS首先学习一个域不变表达编码器对齐ST点与解离细胞，再训练一个置换等变生成器结合EDM预调节的扩散式精炼器，在ST坐标导出的姿态不变监督下生成局部空间几何；推理阶段通过重叠子集预测、聚合成对距离并求解全局距离几何问题，获得二维坐标与稠密距离矩阵。
AI.result: GEARS在全局距离保持、局部邻域保真度和空间分布对齐方面显著优于现有空间映射与反卷积基线，且具备跨切片泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GEARS提供了一种更灵活、鲁棒且无需额外标注的空间重构范式，突破了传统方法对固定网格和先验信息的依赖。

title: Adaptive Temporal Gating of Longitudinal Magnetic Resonance Imaging for Alzheimer's Prediction
summary: Predicting conversion from Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) to Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is critical for early intervention. Current deep learning paradigms predominantly rely on cross-sectional structural MRI, neglecting prognostic value in patient-specific anatomical trajectories. We introduce the Temporal Adaptive Fusion Network (TAF-Net), a hybrid CNN-Transformer architecture that models paired longitudinal 3D MRI scans. Central to TAF-Net is a Temporal Fusion Module governed by an Adaptive Temporal Gate, which learns patient-specific weightings to synthesize three spatiotemporal representations: explicit structural change, region-to-region temporal cross-attention, and bilateral feature concatenation. Evaluated on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative cohort for three-year MCI-to-AD conversion prediction, TAF-Net achieved the highest discriminative performance among all evaluated methods using only structural MRI, significantly outperforming the strongest baseline and approaching multimodal methods requiring PET, CSF, or genetic data. The architecture exhibited exceptional data efficiency, matching baseline performance with a fraction of training data. Ablation studies demonstrate that longitudinal fusion improves discrimination while reducing predictive variance by 48% compared to single-timepoint evaluation. Interpretability analyses reveal spatial attention aligned with established AD pathology in the medial temporal lobe and ventricles, while the gating mechanism prioritizes explicit volumetric change with strong positive correlation to conversion risk.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAF-Net，一种融合CNN与Transformer的时序自适应网络，利用配对纵向3D MRI预测MCI向AD转化，在ADNI数据集上仅用结构MRI即达最优性能，兼具高数据效率与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法多依赖单时间点结构MRI，忽视患者个体化解剖轨迹的预后价值，亟需能建模纵向变化的有效方法。
AI.method: 提出时序自适应融合网络（TAF-Net），含CNN-Transformer混合架构及核心的时间融合模块；该模块通过自适应时间门控机制，生成三种时空表征：显式结构变化、区域间时序交叉注意力、双侧特征拼接。
AI.result: 在ADNI队列三年期MCI-to-AD预测任务中，TAF-Net仅用结构MRI即取得所有对比方法中最优判别性能，显著超越最强单模态基线，接近需PET/CSF/基因的多模态方法；数据效率高，少量训练数据即可达基线性能；消融显示纵向融合使预测方差降低48%。
AI.conclusion: TAF-Net验证了建模个体化纵向脑结构变化对AD早期预测的关键价值，其自适应门控与注意力机制具备神经病理学可解释性，为无创、高效、可解释的AD风险预测提供了新范式。

title: SuperValid: Capability-Aligned OOD Validation for Generalizable Downstream Scaling
summary: Scaling laws guide large language model training by relating compute to cross-entropy loss, and recent work further extends them to predict downstream benchmark performance. However, prior approaches face generalization limitations from two aspects: focusing on benchmark-level performance introduces scenario-specific artifacts, while relying on IID validation loss fails to track capability improvements when training distributions vary. In this work, we argue that downstream scaling should be studied at the capability level, which captures shared skill factors across related tasks while abstracting away benchmark-specific noise. We propose SuperValid, a framework that synthesizes OOD (out-of-distribution), capability-aligned validation data by distilling core concepts from benchmarks within a capability domain and expanding them into diverse, knowledge-rich texts. Extensive experiments spanning 17 benchmarks grouped into 6 capability domains show that SuperValid loss exhibits strong and stable correlation with downstream performance across models of different architectures, scales, and training data distributions. As a training-free metric computable during training without benchmark evaluation, SuperValid enables effective model selection, early stopping, and scaling decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SuperValid框架，通过合成OOD、能力对齐的验证数据来评估大模型在能力层面而非基准层面的缩放规律，显著提升了下游性能预测的稳定性与泛化性。
AI.motivation: 现有缩放定律在基准层面建模和依赖IID验证损失，导致难以泛化到不同场景和训练分布变化的情况；需转向能力层面建模以消除基准特异性噪声并捕捉跨任务共性技能。
AI.method: 提出SuperValid框架：从能力域内多个基准中蒸馏核心概念，并生成多样化、知识丰富的OOD验证文本，实现能力对齐的验证集构建；该方法无需训练，可在线计算。
AI.result: 在17个基准、6个能力域上的实验表明，SuperValid损失与下游性能呈现强且稳定的跨架构、跨规模、跨数据分布相关性；可支持免基准评估的模型选择、早停与缩放决策。
AI.conclusion: 能力层面的缩放分析优于传统基准层面方法；SuperValid提供了一种通用、高效、训练无关的能力验证范式，推动更鲁棒的大模型缩放定律研究与实践。

title: Deconstructing Spatial Complexity: Hierarchical Decomposition for LLM Spatial Reasoning
summary: LLMs have shown remarkable proficiency in general language understanding and reasoning. However, they consistently underperform in spatial reasoning that severely limits their application, particularly in embodied intelligence. Inspired by the success of hierarchical reinforcement learning, this paper introduces a novel method for hierarchical task decomposition in LLM spatial reasoning. Our approach guides LLMs to decompose complex tasks into manageable sub-tasks by identifying key intermediate states and generating simplified sub-environments. However, we identify that LLMs often fail to derive optimal intermediate states due to their insufficient spatial prior, leading to sub-optimal task decomposition. To address this limitation and enhance its planning capability, we propose the MCTS-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization (M-GRPO), where we reformulate the UCT formula by incorporating the LLM's prior predictive probabilities alongside its epistemic uncertainty. Furthermore, we implement a more fine-grained advantage function, enabling the model to learn optimal path planning. Experimental results demonstrate that our method substantially improves LLM performance on spatial tasks, including navigation, planning, and strategic games, achieving state-of-the-art results. This work paves the way for LLMs in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MCTS引导的分层任务分解方法（M-GRPO），以提升大语言模型（LLM）在空间推理任务中的性能，特别是在导航、规划和策略游戏等场景中达到SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）在通用语言理解和推理上表现优异，但在空间推理方面持续表现不佳，严重限制其在具身智能等实际应用中的落地。
AI.method: 提出分层任务分解框架，引导LLM识别关键中间状态并生成简化子环境；针对LLM空间先验不足导致中间状态选择次优的问题，设计MCTS-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization（M-GRPO），改进UCT公式以融合LLM先验预测概率与认知不确定性，并采用更细粒度的优势函数提升路径规划能力。
AI.result: 在导航、规划和策略游戏等空间任务上显著提升LLM性能，达到当前最优（state-of-the-art）水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥补了LLM在空间推理能力上的短板，为LLM在真实世界具身智能等应用场景中的部署提供了新路径。

title: Refining Multidimensional Video Reward Models via Disentangled Influence Functions
summary: As Text-to-Video (T2V) generation models continue to evolve, the complexity of video evaluation necessitates a fine-grained assessment across various axes. To address this, recent works have focused on developing Multidimensional Video Reward Models (MVRMs), which decompose the evaluation process to better align with the multifaceted nature of human visual perception. However, training effective MVRMs is fundamentally challenged by the complex nature of video data. In this work, we identify a critical phenomenon termed Dimensional Heterogeneity: the reliability of a training sample can vary substantially across evaluation dimensions, meaning that a sample may provide reliable supervision for one objective while inducing high supervision risk for another. Consequently, prevailing data-centric methods that filter based on global scalar metrics are ill-posed for T2V tasks. To address this, we propose a disentangled influence framework that that efficiently estimates dimension-specific supervision risk. Leveraging this framework, we introduce two dimension-disentangled refinement strategies: Dimension-Disentangled Pruning, which removes extreme high-risk samples, and Dimension-Disentangled Reweighting, which softly down-weights high-risk supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our disentangled strategies significantly outperform global filtering baselines, yielding reward models with superior alignment to ground truth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对文本到视频（T2V）生成评估中多维奖励模型训练难题的解耦影响框架，以应对‘维度异质性’问题，并设计了两种维度解耦优化策略：剪枝与重加权，显著提升了奖励模型与真实人类评价的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于全局标量指标的数据筛选方法无法适应T2V评估中不同维度监督信号可靠性差异大的问题（即‘维度异质性’），导致多维视频奖励模型（MVRM）训练效果受限。
AI.method: 提出一种解耦影响框架，用于高效估计各评估维度上的监督风险；在此基础上设计两种维度解耦优化策略：维度解耦剪枝（移除极端高风险样本）和维度解耦重加权（对高风险监督软降权）。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提解耦策略显著优于全局过滤基线，在多个T2V评估维度上提升奖励模型与真实标注的一致性，增强其对生成视频质量的判别能力。
AI.conclusion: 维度异质性是T2V多维奖励建模中的关键挑战，通过解耦维度监督风险并针对性优化，可有效提升MVRM的鲁棒性与对齐性能。

title: EgoRelight: Egocentric Human Capture and Illumination Recovery for Relightable and Photoreal Avatar Rendering
summary: Mixed Reality (MR) headsets promise a future of immersive telepresence where virtual humans blend indistinguishably into real or virtual surroundings. Achieving this vision requires a method for capturing a user's motion, estimating appearance under novel lighting, and understanding the environment - all from the constrained viewpoint of a head-mounted display (HMD). Existing approaches treat these as isolated problems: they either focus on driving avatars with baked-in lighting or rely on studio setups for relighting. In this paper, we present EgoRelight, a holistic framework for egocentric telepresence that simultaneously captures full-body human performance, synthesizes photorealistic and relightable appearance, and estimates high dynamic range (HDR) environment maps from a single HMD. First, to ensure motion and surface reconstruction, we propose an egocentric perception module that leverages stereo down-facing cameras to extract dense depth maps, which serve as geometric control signals to drive a mesh-based avatar. Second, we introduce a novel neural appearance model that learns to synthesize view-dependent specular and view-independent diffuse shading separately. By employing a specialized ray-sampling strategy, our model generalizes to unseen illumination without relying on restrictive analytical BRDF priors. Third, we enable seamless avatar integration into the physical world via a test-time inverse rendering process, which recovers an HDR environment map by matching the pre-trained avatar's appearance to live egocentric camera observations. We demonstrate our system through a social telepresence application, where remote users are coherently relit according to their physical environment. Extensive experiments show that our components and the integrated system significantly outperform state-of-the-art baselines in geometric accuracy and rendering as well as relighting fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoRelight框架，通过单个头戴式显示器（HMD）实现以自我为中心的沉浸式远程呈现，同步完成全身动作捕捉、光追级外观合成与HDR环境光照估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将运动捕捉、外观建模和环境理解视为孤立问题，依赖固定光照或专业布景，难以满足MR头显下真实、实时、自适应的远程呈现需求。
AI.method: 1）基于HMD下视双目相机的稠密深度估计模块驱动网格化身；2）分离学习视相关镜面反射与视无关漫反射的神经外观模型，并采用专用光线采样策略实现无先验光照泛化；3）通过测试时逆渲染匹配预训练化身与实时HMD观测，恢复HDR环境贴图。
AI.result: 在几何重建精度、渲染质量及重光照保真度上显著优于当前最优方法，并成功应用于支持物理环境一致重光照的社交远程呈现系统。
AI.conclusion: EgoRelight实现了首个从单HMD出发、端到端支持几何一致、外观真实且环境自适应的 egocentric telepresence 框架，为MR远程协作提供了新范式。

title: When Confidence Misleads: Suffix Anchoring and Anchor-Proximity Confidence Modulation for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models decode text by iteratively denoising masked token sequences, making the choice of which positions to decode a central inference-time decision. Most training-free decoding strategies use model confidence for position selection, assuming that high-confidence positions are ready to be decoded. In this work, we revisit this assumption by studying when confidence misleads fully non-autoregressive (fully non-AR) decoding. EOT tokens can receive high confidence and cause incomplete generation; inserting a suffix anchor can mitigate this issue but introduces local overconfidence near the anchor, causing anchor-adjacent tokens to be decoded too early. To address these issues, we propose Suffix-Anchored Confidence Modulation, a simple training-free method that inserts a short suffix anchor to encourage response completion and modulates confidence near the anchor according to decoding progress. This preserves the response-completion benefit of suffix anchoring while reducing premature decoding of anchor-adjacent tokens. Across text-only reasoning, vision-language reasoning, and code-generation benchmarks, our method consistently improves confidence-based fully non-AR decoding, outperforms explicit EOT suppression, and preserves the parallel decoding advantage of fully non-AR generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为后缀锚定置信度调制（Suffix-Anchored Confidence Modulation）的训练无关方法，通过插入短后缀锚点并动态调节其邻近位置的置信度，改善全非自回归解码中因置信度误导导致的过早解码与不完整生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有训练无关的全非自回归解码策略依赖模型置信度选择解码位置，但高置信度可能误导（如EOT标记被过早选中导致生成截断；后缀锚点引入局部过自信导致邻近token过早解码），需重新审视该假设。
AI.method: 提出后缀锚定置信度调制：插入短后缀锚点以促进响应完成，并依据解码进度动态调制锚点附近token的置信度，从而兼顾完成性与解码时序合理性。
AI.result: 在文本推理、视觉-语言推理和代码生成多个基准上，该方法持续提升基于置信度的全非自回归解码性能，优于显式EOT抑制方法，且保持全非自回归的并行解码优势。
AI.conclusion: 置信度并非始终可靠的位置选择依据；通过结构化干预（锚点+动态调制）可有效缓解其误导性，为训练无关的非自回归解码提供更鲁棒的解码策略。

title: Adaptive Reservoir Computing for Multi-Scenario Chaotic System Forecasting
summary: We present an adaptive reservoir computing framework for the CTF-4-Science Lorenz benchmark, which evaluates machine learning models across twelve distinct tasks spanning five qualitatively different scenarios: baseline forecasting, noisy signal reconstruction, forecasting under noise, few-shot learning, and parametric generalization. Rather than applying a uniform inference strategy, we tailor the training and prediction procedure of Echo State Networks (ESNs) to the specific demands of each evaluation scenario. Our key contributions are fourfold: (1) exact reservoir state synchronization that eliminates warmup approximation error in short-time prediction; (2) histogram-guided candidate selection that directly optimizes the long-time ergodic evaluation metric; (3) multi-seed reservoir search for few-shot regimes with severely limited training data; and (4) sequential multi-sequence training that resolves state-distribution mismatch in parametric generalization tasks. The proposed framework achieves a score of 74.91 on the public benchmark leaderboard, demonstrating that carefully adapted reservoir computing constitutes a competitive and computationally efficient approach for diverse chaotic system modeling challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应储备池计算框架，针对CTF-4-Science Lorenz基准测试的12个不同任务进行定制化训练与预测，显著提升了在混沌系统建模中的性能与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多场景混沌系统建模（如噪声鲁棒性、少样本学习、参数泛化等）时缺乏针对性，导致性能受限；需为不同评估场景定制储备池计算策略。
AI.method: 提出四种关键技术：(1) 精确储备池状态同步以消除短时预测预热误差；(2) 直接优化长时遍历性指标的直方图引导候选选择；(3) 多种子储备池搜索应对极有限训练数据的少样本场景；(4) 序列式多序列训练缓解参数泛化中的状态分布失配问题。
AI.result: 在CTF-4-Science Lorenz公开基准排行榜上取得74.91分，验证了该自适应框架在多样性混沌建模任务中的竞争力和计算高效性。
AI.conclusion: 针对不同任务定制储备池计算流程比统一策略更有效，自适应设计可显著提升其在复杂科学建模任务中的实用性与鲁棒性。

title: Robust Contrastive Graph Clustering with Adaptive Local-Global Integration
summary: Graph clustering is essential in graph analysis for revealing structural patterns and node communities. Despite recent advances in self-supervised contrastive learning that have improved clustering via structural and attribute signals, existing methods still struggle to flexibly capture high-order local structures and often overlook global semantics in complex graphs. These limitations lead to suboptimal node representations, especially in real-world graphs with fragmented structures and ambiguous cluster boundaries. To address these limitations, a contrastive graph clustering framework is proposed to jointly integrate multi-scale local structures with global semantics via attention mechanisms. At the local level, GNN-based topological signals extracted from multiple propagation depths are adaptively fused through attention-based weighting to capture multi-scale neighborhood features. At the global level, semantic prototypes derived from dynamically evolving cluster centers are adaptively aggregated through attention to guide node representations and enhance inter-cluster separability. The model is trained under a dual-view contrastive learning paradigm with a hybrid objective that combines instance-level and structure-aware losses to improve representation robustness and discrimination. Experiments on eight real-world graph datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive clustering performance. Code is available at https://github.com/vege12138/w2.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多尺度局部结构与全局语义的对比图聚类框架，通过注意力机制融合不同传播深度的GNN拓扑信号和动态演化的语义原型，并采用双视图对比学习与混合损失进行训练，在多个真实图数据集上取得了优异聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督对比学习方法难以灵活捕获高阶局部结构，且忽略复杂图中的全局语义，导致在结构碎片化、簇边界模糊的真实图中节点表示次优。
AI.method: 提出基于注意力机制的对比图聚类框架：局部层面用GNN提取多深度拓扑信号并注意力加权融合；全局层面利用动态演化簇中心生成语义原型并注意力聚合；训练采用双视图对比学习与实例级+结构感知混合损失。
AI.result: 在八个真实世界图数据集上的实验表明，该方法实现了具有竞争力的聚类性能。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模多尺度局部结构与全局语义，并通过注意力机制与双视图对比学习优化，可显著提升图聚类效果，尤其适用于结构复杂、边界模糊的真实图。

title: VITAL: Visual-Semantic Dual Supervision for Enhanced and Interpretable Latent Reasoning in Medical MLLMs
summary: Latent reasoning enables reasoning over continuous hidden states rather than explicit tokens, avoiding the language bottleneck and inference overhead of chain-of-thought for medical VQA. However, existing methods suffer from modality collapse, insufficient visual supervision, and train-inference mismatch. Moreover, their opaque latent states offer no interpretability, which is critical in clinical applications. We propose VITAL, a latent-space reasoning framework for medical MLLMs with visual-semantic dual supervision: an auxiliary text decoder reconstructs reasoning chains from latent states, while a visual projector regresses ROI features from a frozen, independent medical vision encoder. Both modules are discarded at inference with zero overhead, yet can be re-attached post-hoc for dual interpretability, providing textual and visual explanations of the reasoning process without sacrificing efficiency. We construct a 61K dataset spanning 9 imaging modalities, exceeding prior medical visual latent reasoning datasets by an order of magnitude. Experiments on 7 benchmarks show that VITAL consistently and substantially outperforms the backbone, all latent reasoning baselines, and medical MLLMs trained on far larger data, achieving state-of-the-art results competitive with trillion-parameter proprietary models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VITAL框架，通过视觉-语义双重监督实现医学视觉问答中的潜在空间推理，在提升性能的同时保证可解释性与高效性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉问答中的潜在推理方法存在模态坍缩、视觉监督不足、训练-推理不匹配以及缺乏可解释性等问题，而临床应用亟需透明、可信的推理过程。
AI.method: 提出VITAL框架：引入辅助文本解码器从潜在状态重建推理链（语义监督），并用视觉投影器回归来自冻结医学视觉编码器的ROI特征（视觉监督）；两个模块仅在训练时使用，推理时完全移除以零开销运行，且支持后验附加以提供文本和视觉双重解释。
AI.result: 在涵盖9种影像模态、61K样本的新数据集上实验表明，VITAL在7个基准上持续显著超越基线模型、所有潜在推理方法及更大规模训练的医学MLLMs，性能媲美万亿参数商用大模型。
AI.conclusion: VITAL实现了高效、可解释、强性能的医学视觉问答潜在推理，为临床AI系统提供了兼顾准确性与可信性的新范式。

title: BenGER: Benchmarking LLM Systems on Subsumption-Based Legal Reasoning in German Law
summary: We introduce the BenGER (Benchmark for German Law) dataset for evaluating LLM systems on subsumption-based legal reasoning in German law. The BenGER dataset consists of three components: 596 exam-style free-text legal case tasks across multiple levels of legal education and 531 short doctrinal reasoning tasks. We evaluate 12 contemporary LLM systems -- closed flagship, efficiency-oriented, and open-weight -- across automatic and judge-based metrics. On a controlled validation subset of timed human-written solutions under both unaided and human--AI co-creation conditions, we contextualise model performance against these human baselines. We introduce a rubric-aligned LLM-as-a-Judge framework cross-validated against a multi-rater human-grading protocol (three blind reviews plus one author-informed creator review per solution). Our results show that replacing a blind human reviewer with the LLM judge degrades agreement with the full human pool no more than removing that reviewer altogether (Calderon r=0.96 vs.~r=0.96, matched n=30), that closed-flagship systems lead the leaderboard across all corpora, and that human--AI co-creation substantially outperforms unaided human work.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了BenGER数据集，用于评估大语言模型在德语法律中的归摄式法律推理能力，并通过自动和人工评估方法对12个LLM系统进行了测试，结果表明闭源旗舰模型表现最佳，且人机协同显著优于纯人工。
AI.motivation: 现有法律领域基准缺乏针对德语法律归摄式推理的专门评测数据集，需构建高质量、多层级、可复现的评估基准以推动法律AI发展。
AI.method: 构建包含596个案例题和531个教义推理题的BenGER数据集；采用自动指标与基于多评阅者协议校准的LLM-as-a-Judge框架进行评估；设置受控人类基线（无辅助 vs. 人机协同）进行性能对比。
AI.result: LLM裁判与人类评审一致性极高（Calderon r=0.96），闭源旗舰模型在所有任务中领先，人机协同显著超越纯人工表现。
AI.conclusion: BenGER为德语法律AI提供了可靠评测基准；LLM-as-a-Judge方法具备高可信度；人机协同是提升法律推理效能的有效路径。

title: OR-Space: A Full-Lifecycle Workspace Benchmark for Industrial Optimization Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly used to assist with operations research (OR) modeling, yet existing OR-oriented benchmarks often reduce evaluation to one-shot translation from a self-contained problem statement into a mathematical formulation or solver program. Such settings abstract away two characteristics of real industrial OR workflows: persistent multi-artifact workspaces and multi-stage task lifecycles. We introduce OR-Space, a full-lifecycle workspace benchmark for evaluating industrial optimization agents across model construction, model revision, and grounded explanation. Each instance is an executable workspace containing business documents, structured data, optional code artifacts, solver outputs, and task-specific evaluators distributed across interdependent files. OR-Space defines three task modes: Build, where agents construct solver-ready optimization models from heterogeneous artifacts; Revise, where agents modify existing models under changing requirements or solver feedback while preserving valid prior logic; and Explain, where agents answer grounded questions about solutions, constraints, and business implications using evidence spread across workspace artifacts. By combining persistent workspaces with lifecycle-oriented tasks, OR-Space evaluates whether agents can perform reliable optimization work beyond end-to-end text generation. We describe the benchmark design, evaluation protocol, and quality-control pipeline, and position OR-Space as a benchmark for studying the reliability, failure modes, and practical readiness of LLM agents in industrial OR workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OR-Space，一个面向工业运筹学（OR）全流程工作空间的基准测试，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）代理在建模、修订与解释三个阶段中的实际能力，强调多文档、多阶段、可执行工作空间的现实性。
AI.motivation: 现有OR导向的基准测试多局限于单次问题到模型的翻译，忽略了真实工业OR流程中持续存在的多工件工作区和多阶段任务生命周期，难以评估LLM代理的实际可靠性与实用性。
AI.method: 设计了OR-Space基准，包含可执行工作空间（含业务文档、结构化数据、代码、求解输出等），定义三种任务模式：Build（从异构素材构建可求解模型）、Revise（依据需求或求解反馈修订模型并保持逻辑一致性）、Explain（基于跨文件证据进行有依据的解答）。
AI.result: OR-Space首次将持久化工作空间与全生命周期任务结合，提供了一套完整的设计、评估协议与质量控制流程，支持对LLM代理在工业OR场景中的可靠性、失效模式与落地能力进行系统评估。
AI.conclusion: OR-Space填补了面向工业级运筹优化的LLM代理评估空白，推动LLM代理从‘端到端文本生成’迈向‘可靠、可追溯、可协作’的工业级智能助手。

title: PhAME: Phenotype-Aware Molecular Editing via Latent Diffusion
summary: Small-molecule drug discovery requires simultaneous optimization of numerous properties of candidate molecules. These properties can be investigated through the analysis of high-dimensional biological signatures, such as cell morphology and transcriptomic perturbations, which provide a rich perspective on the underlying biological mechanisms. However, existing generative methods, which use those signatures for optimization, fail to meet two key requirements: providing precise guidance toward desired phenotypic signatures while maintaining structural proximity to a known hit. We introduce PhAME (Phenotype-Aware Molecular Editing), a latent diffusion framework that overcomes this challenge by recasting molecular optimization as editing in the latent space of a pretrained graph-based VAE. Our central contribution is a compositional classifier-free guidance scheme with two independent scales, one for the phenotype-conditioning and one for similarity to the seed structure, allowing practitioners to control the tradeoff between these two objectives. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmarks, including docking score optimization and multimodal phenotypic generation, demonstrate that PhAME achieves state-of-the-art results while maintaining high chemical validity and novelty.

AI.tldr: PhAME是一种基于潜在扩散的分子编辑框架，通过在预训练图变分自编码器的潜在空间中进行编辑，实现对表型特征的精准引导和对起始分子结构的高保真保持。
AI.motivation: 现有生成方法难以同时精确引导目标表型特征并保持与已知活性分子的结构相似性。
AI.method: 提出PhAME框架，采用基于图的VAE预训练模型，并设计双尺度无分类器引导策略，分别控制表型条件和种子结构相似性。
AI.result: 在对接分数优化和多模态表型生成等基准测试中达到最先进水平，同时保持高化学有效性与新颖性。
AI.conclusion: PhAME成功解决了小分子药物发现中表型引导与结构保真难以兼顾的关键挑战，为基于生物表型的分子优化提供了新范式。

title: Anomaly as Non-Conformity via Training-Free Graph Laplacian Energy Minimization
summary: Detecting subtle visual anomalies in images remains challenging, particularly when only normal samples are available a priori. Such unsupervised anomaly detection is typically solved by measuring feature similarity of a query patch to a memory of normal patches. However, similarity alone does not reveal how strongly a query patch violates the structure of the normal feature manifold. We propose a training-free Laplacian graph energy optimization formulation, named ANoCo that scores Anomaly by the cost of Non-Conformity of a query patch to align with a fixed normal manifold. For each query patch, we construct a bipartite query to normal graph weighted by cosine affinity, explicitly removing query-query and normal-normal edges to prevent evidence dilution. We formulate anomaly scoring as a convex Laplacian energy with anchored normal nodes, and solve in closed form. In particular, we do not use the optimized features themselves-the anomaly score is the magnitude of the update required to satisfy normality constraints, reframing the graph Laplacian as a non-conformity operator rather than a smoothing prior. The proposed method introduces no learnable parameters, message passing, or sampling, and has complexity comparable to a single linear solve. Across standard benchmarks, it delivers strong image-level AUROC, stable localization maps, and improved robustness over prior methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of using optimization-induced feature drift as anomaly measure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的无监督异常检测方法ANoCo，通过构建加权二分图并利用拉普拉斯图能量优化，以查询样本与正常流形对齐所需更新幅度作为异常得分，不引入可学习参数，具有高效性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督异常检测方法仅依赖特征相似性，难以刻画查询样本对正常特征流形结构的违反程度。
AI.method: 提出基于拉普拉斯图能量的优化框架ANoCo：构建去除同质边（query-query、normal-normal）的余弦相似度加权二分图；将异常评分建模为带锚定正常节点的凸拉普拉斯能量；以满足正常性约束所需的特征更新幅度作为异常得分。
AI.result: 在标准基准上取得优异图像级AUROC、稳定的定位图和更强的鲁棒性，复杂度接近单次线性求解。
AI.conclusion: 利用优化诱导的特征漂移作为异常度量是有效且高效的，无需训练、参数或消息传递，为无监督异常检测提供了新范式。

title: Framing Matters: Addressing Framing Sensitivity in Decision-Making through Behaviorally-Grounded Value Alignment
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes decision-making settings such as legal reasoning, where consistency under factually equivalent inputs is critical. However, we find that fact-preserved but differently framed inputs can significantly destabilize LLM decisions. To systematically investigate this problem, we introduce Fragile, a large-scale benchmark that isolates fact-preserving semantic framing across three controlled dimensions: value-tinted narration, temporal slice, and narrative vividness. Our experiments reveal a high susceptibility of LLMs to framing, with an average decision flip rate of 28.6%. We find that simple prior prompt-level and activation-level interventions not only fail to suppress framing sensitivity but actively amplify it. We therefore propose Valign, a representation-level method that explicitly targets these framing dimensions by anchoring decisions to a stable value prior, steering hidden states toward the model's value-consistent direction, and projecting out temporal-vividness-sensitive directions from the model's hidden states. Valign consistently reduces framing-induced decision flips, demonstrating that robust mitigation requires directly targeting the internal pathways in which framing operates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fragile基准测试，发现大语言模型在法律推理等高风险决策场景中对事实相同但表述方式不同的输入（即语义框架效应）高度敏感，平均决策翻转率达28.6%；传统提示或激活层干预反而加剧该问题；为此作者提出Valign方法，在表征层面通过价值锚定、方向引导与敏感维度投影来提升模型决策一致性。
AI.motivation: LLMs在法律推理等高风险决策中需保持对事实等价输入的一致性，但现实中存在因语义框架不同导致决策不稳定的问题，亟需系统评估与有效缓解。
AI.method: 构建Fragile基准，从价值倾向性叙述、时间切片和叙事生动性三方面控制事实不变的语义框架变化；提出Valign方法，在隐藏状态层面进行价值锚定、价值一致方向引导及剔除时间-生动性敏感方向。
AI.result: 实验显示LLMs平均决策翻转率达28.6%；传统prompt/activation干预无效甚至恶化；Valign显著降低翻转率，验证表征层面干预的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LLM的框架敏感性源于其内部表征路径，仅靠外部提示或浅层干预无法解决，必须在表征层面显式建模并调控相关语义维度才能实现鲁棒缓解。

title: Look on Demand: A Cognitive Scheduling Framework for Visual Evidence Acquisition in Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Existing multimodal reasoning approaches predominantly follow two paradigms: converting visual inputs into text prior to reasoning, or performing end-to-end reasoning within a unified vision-language representation space. Despite their empirical progress, both paradigms suffer from fundamental structural limitations. The former relies on static visual-to-text conversion, which tends to compress and lose fine-grained visual details. The latter is prone to linguistic dominance induced by joint optimization and attention mechanisms, leading to systematically weakened faithfulness to visual evidence during reasoning. In this work, we argue that a central challenge is how and when visual evidence is introduced into the reasoning process. Motivated by this insight, we propose CSMR, a multimodal reasoning framework in which a language model controls the reasoning process by deciding when to invoke an independent visual perception module to acquire task-relevant visual evidence. Experiments across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that CSMR consistently outperforms representative baseline methods in accuracy under a zero-shot setting. Further experimental analysis confirms that these advantages primarily arise from the proposed cognitive scheduling mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CSMR框架，通过语言模型动态调度独立视觉感知模块来引入视觉证据，以提升多模态推理的准确性和视觉保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在视觉细节丢失或语言主导导致视觉保真度下降的问题，核心挑战在于视觉证据何时、如何被引入推理过程。
AI.method: 提出CSMR框架，由语言模型控制推理流程，按需调用独立的视觉感知模块获取任务相关的视觉证据。
AI.result: 在多个零样本多模态推理基准上，CSMR持续优于代表性基线方法；消融分析证实性能提升主要源于所提出的认知调度机制。
AI.conclusion: 动态、按需引入视觉证据的认知调度机制可有效缓解多模态推理中的结构局限，提升推理准确性和视觉保真度。

title: IRDS: Interpretable RLVR Data Selection via Verifier-Coupled Sparse Autoencoder Coverage
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a key technique for en- hancing LLM reasoning, yet its data ineffi- ciency remains a major bottleneck. Existing methods address this problem only partially, each missing at least one of subset-level cov- erage, verifier signal use, or interpretability. To address this gap, we present IRDS (Inter- pretable RLVR Data Selection), which selects RLVR training instances on a sparse autoen- coder (SAE) cluster basis so the selection itself is auditable on recognizable problem motifs. To select instances the model both fails on and can still learn from, we introduce a verifier- coupled coverage objective on the SAE basis and solve it by greedy log-determinant max- imization. Experiments on three instruction- tuned models and six math reasoning bench- marks show that IRDS achieves the highest overall accuracy, exceeding the strongest base- line by +3.9/+4.0 pp on the two Qwen models and by +0.5 pp on Llama-3.1-8B, while run- ning an order of magnitude cheaper than the trajectory-based baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IRDS方法，通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）聚类选择可解释、覆盖子集且有效利用验证器信号的RLVR训练样本，在数学推理任务上显著提升准确率并降低成本。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）方法在数据效率方面存在不足，未能同时兼顾子集级覆盖、验证器信号利用和可解释性。
AI.method: 提出IRDS（可解释的RLVR数据选择）方法，基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）聚类进行训练实例选择，并引入验证器耦合的覆盖目标，通过贪心对数行列式最大化求解。
AI.result: 在三个指令微调模型和六个数学推理基准上，IRDS取得最高整体准确率，相比最强基线在两个Qwen模型上分别提升+3.9/+4.0个百分点，在Llama-3.1-8B上提升+0.5个百分点，且运行成本低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: IRDS实现了数据高效、可审计且可解释的RLVR训练样本选择，在提升LLM数学推理能力的同时显著降低计算开销。

title: Bayesian Gated Non-Negative Contrastive Learning
summary: While Contrastive Learning (CL) has revolutionized self-supervised representation learning, its latent representations remain highly entangled and opaque, limiting their interpretability in safety-critical applications. We identify that a fundamental cause of this entanglement is the reliance on deterministic similarity measures, which treat all feature dimensions equally. In compositional scenes, this creates an Optimization Conflict: common background features, such as, "blue sky", are encouraged to align in positive pairs but simultaneously repelled in negative pairs, causing gradient oscillations that hinder precise semantic disentanglement. To address this, we propose BayesNCL (Bayesian Gated Non-Negative Contrastive Learning). Unlike standard approaches, BayesNCL introduces a probabilistic gating mechanism that dynamically filters out task-irrelevant, high-frequency common features while selectively retaining discriminative semantics. By formalizing feature selection as a variational inference problem with a sparse Bernoulli prior, our method effectively resolves the optimization conflict. Empirical experimental results on Imagenet-100 demonstrate that BayesNCL achieves a remarkable 142.1% improvement in semantic consistency compared to state-of-the-art baselines, yielding highly interpretable representations without compromising downstream task performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Cui-Peng-624/BayesNCL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BayesNCL，一种基于贝叶斯门控的非负对比学习方法，通过概率门控机制动态过滤无关高频特征，解决传统对比学习中因确定性相似度度量导致的优化冲突，显著提升语义一致性和表征可解释性。
AI.motivation: 对比学习（CL）虽推动了自监督表征学习，但其隐空间表征高度纠缠、不透明，难以用于安全关键场景；根本原因在于依赖确定性相似度度量，导致组合场景中背景等共性特征在正负样本对中产生优化冲突。
AI.method: 提出BayesNCL：引入概率门控机制，将特征选择建模为带稀疏伯努利先验的变分推断问题，动态抑制任务无关高频特征，保留判别性语义。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-100上，语义一致性较SOTA基线提升142.1%，同时保持下游任务性能。
AI.conclusion: BayesNCL有效缓解对比学习中的优化冲突，生成高可解释、低纠缠的表征，兼顾性能与安全性需求。

title: The Harder Text Embedding Benchmark (HTEB): Beyond One-dimensional Static Robustness
summary: Embedding benchmarks like MTEB report a single score per model, implicitly treating robustness as a static, scalar property. We argue that embedding robustness is multidimensional, since models respond differently to different types of variation, and requires dynamic evaluation to expose failures hidden by static benchmarks. We introduce the Harder Text Embedding Benchmark (HTEB), a dynamic evaluation framework that challenges model robustness along three practically interpretable axes (Lexical/Stylistic, Length and Language) by stochastically transforming inputs at evaluation time with an LLM. Evaluating 16 open-weight embedding models on 32 datasets covering 42 languages under transformations validated by 4,800 human ratings on an English subsample, we find three patterns: (1) Models exhibit specific, partly decoupled robustness profiles across axes. (2) Across three model families, scale increases absolute scores but does not close the gap between original and transformed evaluations. Here, scaling tends to improve specifically the Language axis. (3) English datasets are more sensitive to HTEB transformations than multilingual datasets. This demonstrates that HTEB identifies strengths and weaknesses of models along deployment-relevant axes, challenging current embedding benchmarks and arguing for multidimensional, dynamic robustness evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HTEB动态评估框架，从词汇/风格、长度和语言三个维度评估文本嵌入模型的鲁棒性，发现模型鲁棒性具有多维特性，静态单一分数无法反映其真实表现。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入基准（如MTEB）用单一分数衡量鲁棒性，忽视了模型对不同类型扰动响应的差异性，导致隐藏缺陷被掩盖。
AI.method: 构建Harder Text Embedding Benchmark（HTEB），在评估时利用大语言模型对输入进行随机变换，沿词汇/风格、长度、语言三个可解释轴动态测试16个开源嵌入模型在32个数据集（覆盖42种语言）上的表现，并通过4800次人工评分验证变换合理性。
AI.result: 发现：(1) 模型在三轴上呈现特定且部分解耦的鲁棒性轮廓；(2) 模型规模提升仅显著改善语言轴鲁棒性，但无法弥合原始与变换后性能差距；(3) 英文数据集比多语数据集对HTEB变换更敏感。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入鲁棒性是多维且需动态评估的，HTEB能揭示部署相关强弱项，应取代当前静态单维基准。

title: OccuReward: LLM-Guided Occupant-Centric Reward Shaping for Demographic Equity in Grid-Interactive Buildings
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at OccuSys 2026, co-located with ACM Sustainability Week 2026. Preprint version
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated promising capability in generating reward functions for deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based building energy management. However, their potential to exhibit or exacerbate disparities in occupant comfort across heterogeneous demographic populations remains unexplored. We present OccuReward, a framework investigating how LLM-mediated reward design affects demographic equity. Our contribution is three-fold: the introduction of the Comfort Equity Index (CEI) as a novel feedback signal; a methodology for iterative, equity-aware LLM reward shaping; and a performance analysis of DRL agents under these refined objectives. Utilizing four empirically grounded occupant profiles from the ASHRAE Global Thermal Comfort Database II (13,440 votes), we deploy a Soft Actor-Critic agent in CityLearn v2. Our approach employs the Gemini API to generate reward function logic and weights--rather than performing per-step inference--across three refinement rounds. Results across 15 experimental runs reveal that elderly female occupants consistently experience the lowest satisfaction in initial rounds. By Round 3, equity-aware LLM refinement activates specific reward components that improve satisfaction for Young Males (+17.6%), Mid-aged Females (+28.2%), Health Sensitive (+53.8%), and Elderly Females (+567%), while simultaneously reducing energy costs by 3.2%. Our findings highlight that while reward-level intervention significantly improves equity, demographic disparities in AI-driven controllers persist, necessitating further research into algorithmic fairness in building systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OccuReward框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）迭代优化建筑能源管理中的奖励函数，以提升不同人口统计学特征居住者的热舒适公平性，并引入舒适公平指数（CEI）作为新反馈信号，在提升多类人群满意度的同时降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在生成强化学习奖励函数方面展现出潜力，但其可能加剧不同人口群体在居住者热舒适性上的不公平现象，该问题尚未被系统研究。
