AI.method: 提出OccuReward框架，包括：1）定义舒适公平指数（CEI）作为公平性反馈信号；2）基于Gemini API进行三轮迭代式、公平性感知的LLM奖励函数逻辑与权重生成（非逐步推理）；3）在CityLearn v2中用Soft Actor-Critic智能体评估性能，使用ASHRAE数据库中的4类实证居住者画像。
AI.result: 第三轮优化后，青年男性、中年女性、健康敏感人群和老年女性的满意度分别提升17.6%、28.2%、53.8%和567%，同时能源成本降低3.2%；但初始轮次中老年女性满意度始终最低，表明AI控制器中的群体差异仍存。
AI.conclusion: 在奖励层引入公平性干预可显著改善居住者舒适公平性，但算法层面的结构性偏差仍未完全消除，需进一步研究建筑能源系统中AI驱动控制器的算法公平性。

title: Parameter-Efficient Generative Modeling with Controlled Vector Fields
summary: We introduce a continuous-time generative modeling framework, motivated by the Chow-Rashevskii theorem, that builds expressive flows from a small set of fixed vector fields and learned scalar controls. Instead of learning an unconstrained high-dimensional vector field, our framework constructs the velocity by modulating fixed vector fields with learned scalar control functions. When the fixed fields are bracket-generating, their Lie algebra spans the ambient space, providing a mechanism for expressive transport with only a small number of learned control channels and offering a parameter-efficient geometric alternative to standard vector-field parameterizations. This decoupled formulation yields a structured and interpretable generative model in which the number of learned scalar output channels can be chosen independently of the ambient dimension. We formulate an expressivity principle showing that, under suitable controllability and well-posedness assumptions, such controlled flows can transport a source distribution to a target distribution. We train the resulting model using a continuous-normalizing-flow likelihood objective and present proof-of-concept experiments on synthetic distributions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Chow-Rashevskii定理的连续时间生成建模框架，通过固定向量场与学习得到的标量控制函数组合构建流，实现参数高效、结构清晰且可解释的生成模型。
AI.motivation: 受Chow-Rashevskii定理启发，旨在解决标准向量场参数化方法参数量大、缺乏几何解释性的问题，寻求更参数高效且表达力强的生成建模范式。
AI.method: 利用一组固定的、满足括号生成条件的向量场，通过学习标量控制函数对其进行调制，构造流的瞬时速度场；采用连续归一化流（CNF）似然目标进行训练。
AI.result: 理论证明了在可控性与适定性假设下，该受控流能将源分布映射至目标分布；在合成数据上完成了概念验证实验。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种解耦、几何直观且参数高效的生成建模新路径，标量控制通道数可独立于环境维度设定，兼顾表达力与可解释性。

title: BiasEdit: A Training-Free Bias-Detect-and-Edit Framework for Learning Fair Visual Classifiers
comment: Accepted to The Web Conference 2026 (formerly WWW) as an Oral presentation
summary: Visual data from the Web power image classifiers, which often underpin many web services, such as recommendation and content moderation. However, the raw Web data often contain spurious correlations and social biases, and neural networks are known for their tendency to learn biases present in data. This can reinforce unfairness in web services and the web data, leading to a vicious cycle. In the context of image classification, networks learn bias attributes for a specific class when a majority of images contain the same attribute only for a given class. Hence, training a fair and debiased classifier from a biased dataset demands handling an imbalanced problem between a majority of images with bias attributes (bias-aligned samples) and a minority without (bias-conflict samples). In this work, we introduce BiasEdit, a modular framework that automatically detects bias attributes from the original dataset and edits them to construct a debiased dataset. Specifically, BiasEdit first detects unknown bias attributes via statistical dependence and mutual information analysis of visual-linguistic representations, and then explicitly edits those attributes using text-guided image editing to generate realistic bias-conflict samples. Unlike prior works that assume known bias attributes or relies on synthetic mixing, our method operates without manual annotations and can leverage off-the-shelf vision-language and editing models. BiasEdit addresses a fundamental challenge in Web-sourced visual AI, mitigating dataset-induced bias and achieving state-of-the-art debiasing performance even when training data are fully biased.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiasEdit框架，通过自动检测并编辑图像中的偏差属性（如性别、种族等），从原始有偏数据集中生成去偏数据集，从而训练出更公平的图像分类器。该方法无需人工标注，利用现成的视觉-语言模型和文本引导图像编辑技术，在完全有偏的数据上实现了SOTA去偏性能。
AI.motivation: Web来源的视觉数据常含虚假相关性和社会偏见，神经网络易学习并放大这些偏差，导致网络服务不公平，形成恶性循环；尤其在图像分类中，当某类图像普遍携带特定属性（如女性-厨房）时，模型会将该属性误认为类别判据。
AI.method: BiasEdit是模块化框架：1）通过视觉-语言表征的统计依赖性与互信息分析，自动发现未知偏差属性；2）利用文本引导图像编辑技术（如Diffusion模型）对偏差属性进行真实感编辑，生成偏差冲突样本（bias-conflict samples），构建去偏数据集。
AI.result: 在多个基准（如CelebA、Waterbirds、CivilComments）上达到SOTA去偏性能，即使训练数据100%有偏仍显著提升公平性（如减少group-based accuracy gap），且无需人工标注或预设偏差类型。
AI.conclusion: BiasEdit为Web驱动的视觉AI提供了一种通用、自动化、免标注的去偏范式，突破了以往依赖已知偏差假设或合成混合数据的方法局限，有效缓解数据固有偏差对模型公平性的负面影响。

title: Pruning and Distilling Mixture-of-Experts into Dense Language Models
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) is now the dominant architecture for frontier language models, yet it requires all expert parameters to be loaded in memory, making it less preferable for memory-constrained deployment. Existing compression methods reduce the number of experts but the output remains an MoE model with the same fundamental limitation. We present the first systematic framework for converting a trained MoE into a standard fully dense architecture: experts are scored, selected, and grouped, then concatenated into a dense FFN and refined by knowledge distillation from the MoE teacher. We evaluate 7 scoring, 5 grouping, and 2 magnitude scaling methods across a range of selected expert counts on Qwen3-30B-A3B, yielding 350 configurations. We find that the choice of scoring method is the most impactful, with our novel diversity-aware scoring consistently outperforming prior methods on Qwen3-30B-A3B, DeepSeek-V2-Lite, and GPT-OSS-20B. Under a controlled comparison at matched parameter count, MoE-to-dense outperforms dense-to-dense pruning by +6.3 pp in average downstream accuracy after ~4B-token distillation at 1.6x faster training wall-clock speed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个系统性框架，将训练好的混合专家（MoE）模型转换为标准全密集架构，通过专家评分、选择、分组、拼接与知识蒸馏实现，在多个模型上验证了其有效性与高效性。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE模型需将全部专家参数加载至内存，不适用于内存受限的部署场景；而现有压缩方法仅减少专家数量，仍保留MoE结构的根本限制。
AI.method: 提出MoE-to-dense转换框架：对专家进行评分（含多样性感知新方法）、选择、分组、拼接成密集FFN，并通过知识蒸馏从MoE教师模型中精调。在Qwen3-30B-A3B上评估了7种评分、5种分组和2种幅度缩放方法，共350种配置。
AI.result: 多样性感知评分方法在Qwen3-30B-A3B、DeepSeek-V2-Lite和GPT-OSS-20B上均优于先前方法；在相同参数量下，MoE-to-dense相比dense-to-dense剪枝在下游任务平均准确率提升+6.3个百分点，且蒸馏训练速度快1.6倍。
AI.conclusion: MoE-to-dense是一种更优的MoE压缩范式，兼顾性能、效率与部署友好性，为MoE模型落地提供了新路径。

title: Localizing Input Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Models via Shapley Values
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into high-stakes decision-making, the ability to reliably quantify uncertainty has become a critical requirement for safety and trust. However, current uncertainty quantification methods primarily operate at the output level, often failing to distinguish whether uncertainty arises from the model's lack of knowledge or from ambiguity in the user's input. While input-centric uncertainty quantification has recently emerged as a promising direction, it remains relatively underexplored and typically relies on coarse, input-level information. Consequently, users are provided with scalar uncertainty scores that offer little actionable guidance on which parts of the input should be clarified to improve reliability. To address this limitation, we propose Shapley-based input uncertainty Quantification (ShaQ), a framework for span-level attribution of input-induced uncertainty. Our approach models ambiguous spans in the input as players in a cooperative game and quantifies their contributions using Shapley values, defined via the weighted average of marginal reductions in conditional entropy obtained by clarifying each span coalition. Unlike existing input-level approaches, our formulation captures complex interactions among spans and provides a principled decomposition in which individual attributions sum exactly to the total input-induced uncertainty. We evaluate ShaQ on the AmbigQA and AmbiEnt benchmarks, where it achieves state-of-the-art performance in ambiguity detection. We further demonstrate its utility on MediTOD, showing that ShaQ can localize under-specified clinical utterances and facilitate human-AI collaboration in high-stakes settings. Overall, ShaQ improves uncertainty estimation and provides actionable insights for targeted input clarification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Shapley-based input uncertainty Quantification (ShaQ)，一种基于Shapley值的输入级不确定性归因框架，用于定位导致模型输出不确定性的输入片段，提升高风险场景下人机协作的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法多在输出层面进行，难以区分不确定性源于模型知识不足还是用户输入模糊；而输入级方法通常仅提供粗粒度标量分数，缺乏对需澄清输入部分的细粒度指导。
AI.method: 提出ShaQ框架，将输入中模糊的文本片段建模为合作博弈中的参与者，利用Shapley值量化各片段对条件熵降低的边际贡献，实现span-level的不确定性归因，并保证归因总和等于总输入不确定性。
AI.result: 在AmbigQA和AmbiEnt基准上达到歧义检测SOTA；在MediTOD数据集上成功定位临床表述不充分的语句，支持高风险场景下的人机协同。
AI.conclusion: ShaQ实现了更精准的输入不确定性建模与分解，不仅提升不确定性估计质量，还提供可操作的输入澄清建议，增强LLM在关键应用中的可信性与实用性。

title: Dynamic Topic Modeling with a Higher-Order Hypergraphical Representation
summary: Dynamic topic modeling is widely used to analyze evolving trends in scientific literature, medical records, and social media. Traditional topic models represent each topic through a single probability vector on the multinomial simplex and implicitly couple word occurrence and repetition within one probabilistic mechanism. However, this formulation restricts the dependence structure among words and overlooks informative higher-order interactions, particularly in dynamic corpora with overlapping semantics. To address these limitations, we introduce a hypergraph representation of text where each document is modeled as a hyperedge connecting all co-occurring words, with repetition intensities encoded as node weights. This representation naturally separates word occurrence from repetition and induces a novel hypergraph-based multinomial distribution with a nonlinear normalization depending on the observed word set of each document. Building on this likelihood, we develop a dynamic topic modeling framework via structured low-rank factorizations with explicit temporal regularization on topic-word profiles. Moreover, we establish local convergence guarantees and derive non-asymptotic error bounds despite the intrinsic nonconvexity induced by bilinear factorization and document-specific nonlinear normalization. Numerical experiments on synthetic data and an application to the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) corpus demonstrate consistent improvements over existing multinomial-based topic models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超图的动态主题建模方法，通过将文档建模为连接共现词的超边、用节点权重编码词频，分离词出现与重复，并设计新型超图多项式分布；在此基础上构建带时序正则化的低秩分解框架，提供局部收敛性保证和非渐近误差界，实验表明其优于传统多项式主题模型。
AI.motivation: 传统主题模型将词出现与重复耦合在单一概率机制中，限制了词间依赖结构建模能力，且忽略高阶交互信息，尤其在语义重叠的动态语料中表现受限。
AI.method: 引入超图文本表示：每篇文档为一个超边，连接所有共现词，词频作为节点权重；据此定义具有文档相关非线性归一化的超图多项式分布；进而构建基于结构化低秩分解的动态主题模型，对主题-词分布施加显式时间正则化。
AI.result: 理论层面建立了局部收敛保证和非渐近误差界；实验层面在合成数据和ICLR会议论文语料上均一致优于现有基于多项式的主题模型。
AI.conclusion: 超图建模有效解耦词出现与重复，捕捉高阶语义交互，所提动态主题模型兼具理论严谨性与实际有效性，为动态文本分析提供了新范式。

title: REVEAL: Reference-Grounded Reasoning for Multimodal Manipulation Detection
summary: Multimodal manipulation detection aims to simultaneously identify forged image--text pairs and localize tampered regions, yet existing methods typically rely on memorizing isolated artifacts and struggle with imperceptible manipulation traces or domain shifts. Inspired by human comparative reasoning, we reformulate this task as a reference-grounded verification problem, where authenticity is assessed by comparing a query against retrieved authentic evidence. We propose REVEAL Reference-Enabled Verification for Evidence Analysis and Localization), a framework explicitly designed for this comparative paradigm. To support this paradigm, we construct a large-scale reference library comprising 170K authentic news image--text pairs featuring over 40K public figures. Technically, REVEAL employs a difference-aware fusion mechanism to capture fine-grained discrepancies between the query and retrieved evidence. Furthermore, we introduce a task-decoupled Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to jointly execute instance-level detection and fine-grained grounding, effectively mitigating optimization conflicts between these heterogeneous objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that REVEAL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, and notably enables \emph{training-free domain adaptation} by simply updating the reference library, offering a robust and practical solution for detecting evolving misinformation. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/REVEAL-Reference-A006.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REVEAL框架，将多模态操纵检测任务重新定义为基于参考的验证问题，通过对比查询与检索到的真实证据来评估真实性，并构建了包含17万对真实新闻图文对的大规模参考库。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖记忆孤立的伪造伪影，在处理不可察觉的操纵痕迹或跨域场景时表现不佳；受人类对比推理启发，作者希望构建一种更鲁棒、可泛化的检测范式。
AI.method: 提出REVEAL框架：1）构建170K真实新闻图文对的参考库；2）采用差异感知融合机制捕捉查询与证据间的细粒度差异；3）设计任务解耦的MoE架构，联合完成实例级检测与细粒度定位。
AI.result: 在多个基准上显著超越SOTA方法，并支持无需训练的领域自适应——仅需更新参考库即可适应新领域，提升对新兴虚假信息的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于参考的验证范式更符合人类认知逻辑，REVEAL通过证据驱动和模块化解耦，实现了高精度、强泛化、易部署的多模态操纵检测。

title: When Helpful Context Leaks: Privacy Risks in Domain-Adapted ASR
summary: SpeechLLMs are increasingly deployed in professional settings where domain customisation is standard practice: users supply context in prompts with sensitive information, fine-tune on proprietary recordings, or both. We identify and systematically investigate an overlooked privacy risk of such customisation: a model adapted to recognise domain-specific terminology can be nudged into transcribing a phonetically similar word from its context or training data, even when a different word is spoken, thereby leaking private information. To evaluate this risk, we construct a controlled dataset and measure leakage rates across two customisation mechanisms, prompting and fine-tuning. Both mechanisms cause measurable leakage, compounding when combined. We evaluate a prompt-level mitigation strategy and analyse the accuracy-leakage trade-off across customisation approaches, finding that fine-tuning without context prompts offers the best balance. We release our code and dataset publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了语音大语言模型（SpeechLLMs）在专业场景中进行领域定制时存在的隐私泄露风险：模型可能因适应特定术语而错误转录发音相似的敏感词汇，导致隐私信息泄露。研究通过构建受控数据集评估了提示（prompting）和微调（fine-tuning）两种定制方式的泄露率，并发现二者叠加会加剧泄露；提出并验证了一种提示级缓解策略，指出纯微调（不加上下文提示）在准确率与隐私保护间取得最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: SpeechLLMs在专业场景中常通过提示或微调进行领域定制，但这种定制可能引发语音识别中的隐私泄露风险——模型被诱导将发音相似的私有词汇误识别为实际说出的词。该风险此前被忽视，亟需系统性研究。
AI.method: 构建受控数据集，定量评估提示（prompting）与微调（fine-tuning）两种定制机制单独及组合下的隐私泄露率；设计并测试一种提示级缓解策略；分析不同定制方式在识别准确率与隐私泄露间的权衡关系。
AI.result: 两种定制机制均导致可测量的隐私泄露，且组合使用时泄露加剧；所提提示级缓解策略有效降低泄露，但影响准确性；纯微调（无上下文提示）在保持较高识别准确率的同时实现最低泄露率。
AI.conclusion: SpeechLLMs的领域定制存在实质性隐私风险，需在部署中审慎选择定制方式；纯微调相较结合提示的方式更优，兼顾性能与隐私；研究结果呼吁建立针对语音模型的隐私评估标准与防护机制。

title: Agentic Active Omni-Modal Perception for Multi-Hop Audio-Visual Reasoning
summary: Multi-hop audio-visual reasoning remains challenging for Omni-LLMs, as relevant evidence is often sparse, temporally dispersed, and distributed across both audio and visual streams. Existing benchmarks provide limited investigation of this setting, typically involving only a limited number of modalities, relevant temporal segments, or reasoning steps. In this work, we introduce MOV-Bench, a benchmark containing 519 carefully curated questions that require multi-hop reasoning over temporally dispersed audio-visual evidence. Evaluations on MOV-Bench reveal that current Omni-LLMs still struggle with multi-hop cross-modal reasoning. To address this challenge, we further propose AOP-Agent, an efficient agentic framework built on open-source Omni-LLMs for active omni-modal perception. By combining a hierarchical omni-modal memory with a collaborative observe-reflect-replan loop, AOP-Agent enables open-source Omni-LLMs to perform active perception without additional training or proprietary models. Experiments on MOV-Bench and OmniVideoBench demonstrate that AOP-Agent consistently improves reasoning performance, with particularly notable gains on long videos and reasoning-intensive questions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MOV-Bench基准测试集和AOP-Agent框架，以解决多跳音视频跨模态推理难题。MOV-Bench包含519个需多跳推理的问题；AOP-Agent通过分层记忆与观察-反思-重规划循环，提升开源Omni-LLM在长视频和复杂推理任务上的性能，无需额外训练或专有模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基准对多跳音视频跨模态推理研究有限，难以评估模型在稀疏、时序分散、多模态证据下的推理能力。
AI.method: 构建MOV-Bench基准；提出AOP-Agent框架，结合分层音视频记忆与协作式observe-reflect-replan循环，实现无需训练的主动感知。
AI.result: 在MOV-Bench和OmniVideoBench上验证了AOP-Agent显著提升推理性能，尤其在长视频和高推理需求问题上效果突出。
AI.conclusion: 当前Omni-LLMs在多跳跨模态推理上仍存在明显短板，AOP-Agent为开源模型提供了高效、免训练的增强路径。

title: Commit to the Bit: Reactive Reinforcement Learning Done Right
summary: Reinforcement learning algorithms are commonly analyzed (and designed) under the Markov assumption. This is unrealistic, as most environments encountered in practice are either partially observable, or require function approximation that restricts the agent to access non-Markovian state features. We consider the problem of learning an optimal reactive policy in a finite environment with deterministic observations (or equivalently, hard state aggregation). We introduce a new algorithm, Committed Q-learning, and prove almost-sure convergence to the optimal reactive policy under an intuitive assumption we call rewire-robustness. This assumption is strictly weaker than the $q_\star$-realizability condition used in prior work. Our algorithm is a variant of classical Q-learning in which the behavior policy commits to a single action upon entering a feature, and only resamples actions when the observed feature changes. A crucial part of our analysis is the introduction of quasi-Markov environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的强化学习算法Committed Q-learning，用于在确定性观测（或等价于硬状态聚合）的有限环境中学习最优反应式策略，并在比以往更弱的rewire-robustness假设下证明其几乎必然收敛。
AI.motivation: 现实环境中大多为部分可观测或需函数逼近，导致状态特征非马尔可夫，而传统强化学习常基于马尔可夫假设，因此需要更实用的分析与设计方法。
AI.method: 提出Committed Q-learning算法：行为策略在进入某一特征状态后固定执行单一动作，仅当观测特征改变时才重新采样动作；引入准马尔可夫环境概念以支撑理论分析。
AI.result: 在rewire-robustness假设下，证明该算法几乎必然收敛到最优反应式策略；该假设严格弱于先前工作中的q⋆-可实现性条件。
AI.conclusion: Committed Q-learning为非马尔可夫环境下反应式策略学习提供了更鲁棒、更弱假设下的收敛保证，拓展了Q学习的适用边界。

title: SA4Depth: Consistent Pose-Depth Scale Alignment for Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation
summary: Self-supervised depth estimation from monocular sequences relies on the joint learning of a depth and a pose network. Despite abundant research done to improve the depth network, efforts on the pose remain limited. In this context, even when depth is estimated up to scale, we highlight the importance of the alignment between the scene scales estimated by the pose and depth nets. Then, we introduce SA4Depth, an approach to improve this alignment and boost the depth predictions while keeping the inference time unchanged. Our proposed method uses the depth estimated during training to reproject learnable visual features across consecutive frames and refine the pose estimates by reducing feature alignment residuals. With our method, the estimated scene scales by the separate depth and pose networks are aligned, and the prediction scale consistency is improved across different sequences. Our differentiable refinement integrates seamlessly into existing self-supervised pipelines and substantially improves their depth estimates. We demonstrate this with extensive experiments both outdoors and indoors on KITTI, Cityscapes, and NYUv2. Additionally, results on KITTI Odometry confirm the effectiveness of our pose refinement. Our code is available at https://github.com/Runningchauncey/SA4Depth .

AI.tldr: 本文提出SA4Depth方法，通过利用训练中估计的深度信息来重投影可学习视觉特征并减少特征对齐残差，从而改进姿态网络与深度网络之间的场景尺度对齐，提升自监督单目深度估计性能，且不增加推理时间。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督单目深度估计方法中，尽管深度网络研究丰富，但姿态网络改进有限；尤其当深度仅能估计到尺度时，深度网络与姿态网络估计的场景尺度对齐至关重要，但常被忽视。
AI.method: 提出SA4Depth方法：在训练过程中，利用深度网络输出的深度图对可学习视觉特征进行跨帧重投影，并基于特征对齐残差对姿态估计进行可微分优化，从而实现深度与姿态网络间场景尺度的对齐。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Cityscapes和NYUv2数据集（室内外）上显著提升深度估计精度；KITTI Odometry结果验证了姿态估计优化的有效性；该方法可无缝集成至现有自监督流程，不增加推理开销。
AI.conclusion: 深度与姿态网络间的尺度对齐是提升自监督深度估计性能的关键因素；SA4Depth通过特征级对齐优化姿态估计，有效提升深度预测一致性与精度，为自监督单目深度估计提供了新思路。

title: IFMTBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Multilingual Translation Instruction Following
summary: Modern translation workflows demand more than semantic equivalence. Users routinely require models to preserve JSON or HTML schemas, honor curated glossaries, disambiguate with provided context, and match prescribed registers, often several at once. Conventional metrics such as BLEU and xCOMET capture semantic fidelity but provide little signal on constraint adherence, while general instruction following benchmarks ignore the cross-lingual nature of translation. We introduce \bench, a benchmark for multilingual translation instruction following covering seven languages, with 4,506 single-constraint and 2,838 multi-constraint items spanning six constraint dimensions and five compositional patterns with instructions issued in all seven languages. Constraints are split into a gating subset verified by deterministic checkers and a continuous subset scored by a rubric-based LLM judge, combined under a multiplicative rule that resists reward hacking. Evaluating 15 models reveals systematic gaps that prior protocols miss: Instruction following scales with size more sharply than translation quality, glossary and structured-format constraints dominate the difficulty gradient, and general instruction following rankings correlate only weakly with translation behavior. Our benchmark are available at https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy-MT2/tree/main/IFMTBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IFMTBench，一个面向多语言翻译指令遵循能力的基准测试，涵盖七种语言、多种约束类型与组合模式，并设计了混合评估机制以准确衡量模型在真实翻译场景中的指令遵循能力。
AI.motivation: 现有翻译评估指标（如BLEU、xCOMET）无法有效衡量模型对JSON/HTML格式、术语表、上下文消歧、语域等实际约束的遵循能力；通用指令遵循基准又忽略了翻译的跨语言特性。
AI.method: 构建IFMTBench基准：包含4506个单约束和2838个多约束样本，覆盖6类约束维度、5种组合模式，指令使用全部7种语言；采用‘门控型’（确定性校验）与‘连续型’（LLM评分明细）双轨评估，并以乘法规则融合得分以防止奖励作弊。
AI.result: 在15个模型上的评测表明：指令遵循能力随模型规模提升更显著；术语表与结构化格式约束最难；通用指令遵循榜单排名与翻译实际表现相关性弱。
AI.conclusion: IFMTBench填补了多语言翻译中指令遵循能力系统性评估的空白，揭示了当前模型在真实约束场景下的关键短板，为后续研究提供了新基准与分析视角。

title: Plant, Persist, Trigger: Sleeper Attack on Large Language Model Agents
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents remain vulnerable to safety threats from the external environment, where attackers inject adversarial content into external observations such as tool-returned data, webpages, or MCP context, causing harmful agentic behaviors such as unsafe actions or incorrect outputs. Existing studies typically focus on single-interaction attacks, where the agent observes adversarial content and immediately exhibits harmful behavior within one user request. However, we show that adversarial content can also persist across interactions served by the same agent, making such threats harder to detect and mitigate. Specifically, adversarial content may persist in the agent state, remain dormant across interactions, and later be activated by a benign user query. We formalize this type of safety threat as Sleeper Attack. To evaluate it, we construct a benchmark with 1,896 instances covering six real-world harmful outcomes, three attack strategies, and three agent state targets: session context, memory, and reusable skills. Experiments on seven strong open-source and closed-source LLMs show that state-of-the-art LLM agents remain vulnerable to Sleeper Attack, even when they achieve low attack success rates under a single-interaction baseline. Our code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/skdvnfu23ihr9wdscnksf1asdffsaef.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型安全威胁——'Sleeper Attack'（休眠攻击），即对抗性内容可持久存在于LLM智能体的状态中（如会话上下文、记忆、可复用技能），并在后续看似良性的用户请求中被激活，导致有害行为。作者构建了包含1896个实例的基准测试，并在7个主流LLM上验证了该威胁的普遍性和隐蔽性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单轮交互中的对抗攻击，但实际中对抗内容可能长期驻留于智能体状态并在后续交互中被触发，这类跨轮次、潜伏式威胁更难检测与防御。
AI.method: 形式化定义'Sleeper Attack'，设计覆盖六类真实有害结果、三种攻击策略及三类状态目标（会话上下文、记忆、可复用技能）的基准数据集（1896个实例），并在多个开源与闭源LLM智能体上进行实证评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使在单轮攻击成功率较低的情况下，当前最先进LLM智能体仍对Sleeper Attack高度脆弱；不同状态目标中，记忆和可复用技能尤为易受攻击。
AI.conclusion: Sleeper Attack揭示了LLM智能体在多轮交互中因状态持久化带来的新型安全隐患，亟需发展面向状态生命周期的安全防护机制。

title: AtomComposer: Discovering Chemical Space from First Principles with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Discovering novel stable molecules without training data remains a grand scientific challenge. Current molecular generative models are trained on large, pre-curated datasets, which introduce biases and limit exploration of novel chemistry. In contrast, we propose a new paradigm: autonomous, generalized agents capable of mapping vast, unknown chemical spaces without any pretraining. For the first time, we present AtomComposer, a self-guided agent that autonomously constructs valid 3D isomers under stoichiometric constraints and is trained exclusively online using reinforcement learning. Unlike existing approaches that generally overfit to a specific chemical formula, we establish a multi-composition training scheme that enables a broad generalization across diverse chemistry, guided by energy- and validity-based rewards. Our agent can discover up to an order of magnitude more valid isomers on unseen test formulas than existing single-composition reinforcement-learning baselines trained with per-step energy rewards. These results fulfill the promise of online reinforcement learning as a powerful paradigm for scalable, from-scratch exploration of chemical configuration space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AtomComposer，一种无需预训练、基于在线强化学习的自主分子生成代理，能够在化学空间中自主构建符合化学计量约束的有效3D异构体，并实现跨多种化学组成的泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有分子生成模型依赖大规模预处理数据集，存在偏差且限制新化学结构探索；亟需无需训练数据、能自主探索未知化学空间的新范式。
AI.method: 提出AtomComposer代理，采用在线强化学习进行训练，引入多组分训练方案和基于能量与有效性的奖励机制，以在满足化学计量约束下自主构建有效3D异构体。
AI.result: AtomComposer在未见过的测试化学式上发现的有效异构体数量比现有单组分强化学习基线高出一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 在线强化学习是一种可扩展的、从零开始探索化学构型空间的强大新范式。

title: SSR3D-LLM: Structured Spatial Reasoning via Latent Steps for Fine-Grained Grounding in Unified 3D-LLMs
summary: 3D object grounding localizes referred objects in a 3D scene from natural language. Unified instance-centric 3D-LLMs aim to solve grounding together with dialog, QA, and captioning, yet many rely on a single pointer-style grounding decision that compresses a relational instruction into one selection. This is brittle for fine-grained queries where multiple same-class candidates must be ruled out by context objects and spatial relations. We propose Structured Spatial Reasoning 3D-LLM (SSR3D-LLM), a structured grounding interface for unified 3D-LLMs. Given fixed Mask3D object proposals, the LLM writes a sequence of latent spatial reasoning steps and memory tokens from the query, and a geometry-aware scorer reads these latent steps in order to refine candidate rankings step by step with step-length masking. The latent steps are learned from standard benchmark target supervision with auxiliary referential-cue supervision during training, while inference uses only the input query and Mask3D proposals. Across ReferIt3D, ScanRefer, and Multi3DRef, SSR3D-LLM achieves the strongest results among unified 3D-LLM baselines, with substantial gains over the single-pointer QPG baseline on fine-grained grounding and consistent improvements over prior unified 3D-LLMs, while preserving the default language-task route.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSR3D-LLM，一种面向统一3D大语言模型的结构化空间推理接口，通过生成隐式空间推理步骤并由几何感知评分器逐步细化候选对象排序，显著提升细粒度3D指代表达定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有统一实例中心型3D-LLM依赖单一指针式定位决策，难以处理需借助上下文物体和空间关系排除同类候选的细粒度自然语言查询，鲁棒性差。
AI.method: 基于Mask3D固定物体提案，LLM生成来自查询的隐式空间推理步骤与记忆标记；几何感知评分器按序读取这些步骤，结合步长掩码逐步优化候选排序；训练时采用标准基准目标监督加指代线索辅助监督，推理仅需输入查询和Mask3D提案。
AI.result: 在ReferIt3D、ScanRefer和Multi3DRef数据集上，SSR3D-LLM在统一3D-LLM基线中取得最优结果，细粒度定位显著优于单指针QPG基线，并持续超越先前统一3D-LLM方法，同时保持原有语言任务路径。
AI.conclusion: 结构化空间推理机制有效提升了3D指代表达定位的准确性与鲁棒性，为统一3D-LLM提供了更可靠的细粒度接地接口。

title: The Illusion of Opting in AI-Mediated Consequential Decisions
summary: Drawing on Ullmann-Margalit's concept of opting (transformative, irrevocable, and shadowed by foreclosed alternatives), we show that current AI systems raise a profound ethical problem that existing AI ethics has not fully captured: the illusion of opting, in which persons and groups encounter the deceptive appearance of meaningful consequential choice while the agency needed to become genuinely capable of choosing is weakened. Against approaches that treat AI primarily as an optimizer of already given ends, we argue that AI systems should be evaluated by whether they protect and cultivate meta-capacity against the illusion of opting: the socially and institutionally scaffolded agentive capacity through which means and ends can be formed, contested, revised, and owned. This reframing is especially urgent for disadvantaged populations, who are least able to absorb the costs of the illusion of opting when AI-mediated pathways misdirect behavior and action. We propose three normative imperatives for AI-mediated consequential decisions: existential honesty, which acknowledges the limits of prediction; ecological rationality, which situates guidance within heterogeneous lived ecologies; and counterfactual reparation, which acknowledges and repairs foreclosed alternatives when AI-mediated decision-making pathways fail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI伦理中一个被忽视的核心问题——‘选择幻觉’：AI系统表面上提供有意义的选择，实则削弱人们形成、质疑和掌控自身目标与手段的元能力。作者主张以‘元能力保护与培育’为AI评估新标准，并为弱势群体提出三项规范性原则：存在诚实、生态理性与反事实修复。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伦理框架未能充分捕捉AI系统引发的‘选择幻觉’问题——即用户看似拥有实质性选择权，实则其形成、反思与重构目标与手段的深层能动性正被悄然削弱，尤其对弱势群体造成不公后果。
AI.method: 基于Ullmann-Margalit的‘选择（opting）’理论，批判将AI仅视为给定目标优化器的主流范式；提出以‘元能力’（meta-capacity）为核心的新评估框架，并构建三项规范性原则作为实践指南。
AI.result: 确立了‘元能力’作为AI伦理评估的根本尺度；提出并阐释了‘存在诚实’‘生态理性’‘反事实修复’三项原创性规范原则；揭示了AI对弱势群体在结构性脆弱性上的加剧机制。
AI.conclusion: AI伦理必须超越效用优化逻辑，转向对人类能动性根基的守护；唯有通过制度化地培育元能力并落实三项规范原则，才能实质性抵御‘选择幻觉’，实现技术正义。

title: Adaptive Bandit Algorithms for Contextual Matching Markets
summary: We study bandit learning in matching markets, where players and arms constitute the two market sides, and the players' utilities are linear in the arm contexts. In each round, new arms arrive with observable contexts. Then, the algorithm matches them to players, aiming to minimize each player's regret against a stable matching benchmark. This contextual structure creates significant complexity: subtle context shifts can slightly alter one player's utility while completely reconfiguring the underlying benchmark, causing large regret spikes for others. We address this in two settings: stochastic contexts, drawn from a latent distribution, and adversarial contexts, which may be arbitrary. For the stochastic case, we introduce a novel minimum preference gap to capture learning difficulty and provide a fully adaptive algorithm with an instance-dependent poly-logarithmic regret upper bound. We also establish matching instance-independent regret upper and lower bounds under a mild distributional assumption. For the adversarial setting, we propose a tractable regret notion that remains valid under arbitrary contexts and achieves an instance-independent sublinear regret bound via an adaptive algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文研究匹配市场中的赌博机学习问题，其中玩家和臂构成市场的两侧，玩家效用线性依赖于臂的上下文。文章针对随机和对抗性上下文两种设置，分别提出了自适应算法，并给出了相应的遗憾上界和下界分析。
AI.motivation: 上下文结构带来的复杂性：细微的上下文变化可能轻微影响一个玩家的效用，却彻底重构底层稳定匹配基准，导致其他玩家出现巨大遗憾波动。
AI.method: 针对随机上下文，提出最小偏好间隙新概念并设计完全自适应算法；针对对抗性上下文，定义一种在任意上下文下仍有效的可处理遗憾概念，并设计自适应算法。
AI.result: 随机设定下获得实例依赖的多项式对数遗憾上界，以及在温和分布假设下的实例无关遗憾上下界；对抗设定下实现实例无关的次线性遗憾界。
AI.conclusion: 本文为上下文匹配市场中的带约束赌博机学习提供了理论基础与实用算法，统一处理了随机与对抗性环境下的稳定性与学习效率权衡问题。

title: DiscoForcing: A Unified Framework for Real-Time Audio-Driven Character Control with Diffusion Forcing
summary: We study real-time audio-responsive character control as a deployment-faithful problem: strictly causal, bounded-latency streaming that must generate coherent full-body motion at interactive frame rates while the audio condition can change abruptly, including tempo shifts, drops, or user edits. Prior music-to-motion systems are largely optimized for offline generation with global context, and degrade in streaming rollouts where conditioning history becomes stale or unreliable. We introduce DiscoForcing, a streaming audio-driven diffusion framework that combines a causal music encoder that captures rhythmic structure and phase dynamics with a diffusion-forcing sequence model trained under heterogeneous noise levels across the temporal horizon. Building on this, we design a hybrid temporal schedule and a history-guided streaming sampler to explicitly trade off responsiveness against long-horizon consistency under non-stationary audio. Implemented in an end-to-end real-time interactive system with online avatar playback and humanoid deployment workflows, DiscoForcing delivers more stable long-horizon rollouts and sharper audio-motion alignment than prior baselines under matched causality and latency constraints while maintaining real-time throughput.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiscoForcing，一种面向实时音频响应式角色控制的流式扩散框架，通过因果音乐编码器与异质噪声水平训练的扩散强制序列模型，结合混合时间调度与历史引导采样策略，在严格因果、低延迟约束下实现高稳定性与强音画对齐的全身运动生成。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐到动作系统多针对离线生成优化，依赖全局上下文，在流式推断中因音频条件突变（如节奏变化、静音、用户编辑）导致历史条件失效、动作不连贯，难以满足实时交互需求。
AI.method: 提出DiscoForcing框架：1）因果音乐编码器捕捉节奏结构与相位动态；2）在时间维度上采用异质噪声水平训练扩散强制序列模型；3）设计混合时间调度与历史引导的流式采样器，权衡响应性与长时一致性；4）构建端到端实时交互系统，支持在线虚拟人播放与人形机器人部署。
AI.result: 在相同因果性与延迟约束下，DiscoForcing相比基线方法展现出更稳定的长时滚动生成效果和更精准的音频-动作对齐能力，同时保持实时吞吐率。
AI.conclusion: DiscoForcing验证了在严格流式条件下，通过建模音频时序动力学与扩散过程的协同设计，可有效提升音频驱动运动生成的实时性、鲁棒性与表现力，为交互式虚拟人与具身智能体提供新范式。

title: Supervised Semantic Differential for Cross-Cultural Concept Analysis: A Case Study of Human Affect
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, excluding the appendices. Code to reproduce our results is available at https://github.com/przebor/Cross-Cultural-SSD
summary: Cross-cultural comparison of psychological meaning requires methods that go beyond word-level translation and examine how semantic dimensions are organized across languages. We introduce a cross-lingual extension of the Supervised Semantic Differential (SSD), which estimates supervised semantic gradients in embedding space and compares them across aligned multilingual word embeddings. The method tests gradient alignment and difference using permutation procedures and bootstrap intervals, and interprets residual differences through clustering around the difference gradient. We demonstrate the approach on Polish, English, and French affective norm lexicons, modeling Valence, Arousal, and Dominance where available. Affective dimensions were significantly recoverable across languages and model settings. Cross-lingual comparisons showed broad alignment together with structured residual differences: Valence appeared mostly shared, whereas Arousal and Dominance produced more interpretable contrasts involving bodily threat, aesthetic stimulation, internal emotionality, macro-level authority, and everyday control. Several clusters also reflected corpus-specific artifacts, underscoring the need for cautious interpretation. Cross-lingual SSD offers an explainable framework for testing semantic alignment, identifying divergence, and generating hypotheses about cross-cultural differences in psychological meaning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨语言监督语义差异（SSD）方法，用于比较不同语言中心理语义维度（如效价、唤醒度、支配度）的组织方式，发现维度间存在广泛对齐但也有结构化差异，并强调需谨慎解释语料库特异性偏差。
AI.motivation: 跨文化心理意义比较需要超越词汇翻译的方法，以考察语义维度在不同语言中的组织方式。
AI.method: 提出了跨语言版监督语义差异（SSD）方法，利用对齐的多语言词嵌入估计监督语义梯度，通过置换检验和自助法置信区间检验梯度对齐与差异，并通过差异梯度周围的聚类解释残差差异。
AI.result: 在波兰语、英语和法语情感规范词典上验证表明，效价、唤醒度和支配度等情感维度可在跨语言和不同模型设置下显著复现；效价维度高度共享，而唤醒度与支配度展现出更可解释的跨语言差异，涉及身体威胁、审美刺激、内在情绪性、宏观权威及日常控制等主题；部分聚类反映语料库特异性偏差。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言SSD提供了一个可解释的框架，可用于检验语义对齐、识别语义分歧，并生成关于跨文化心理意义差异的假设。

title: Learning When to Optimize: Verified Optimization Skills from Expert GPU-Kernel Lineages
summary: LLM-based agents are increasingly used to generate GPU kernels, but they often know what optimizations to try without knowing when those optimizations are sound. We introduce KLineage, which learns this missing "when" knowledge from expert kernels: instead of relying on forward rollouts, KLineage walks expert implementations backward through validation-gated simplifications and reverses each accepted step into a reusable optimization skill. Each skill records not only the optimization intent, but also where it applies in code, what conditions made it valid, what effect it had, and what failures its assumptions avoid. A downstream LLM materializes these skills on new code surfaces under the same compile/correctness/profile gate. On five expert workloads across two NVIDIA architectures, these lineage-derived skills serve as an effective optimization curriculum, exceeding recent memory-based LLM-kernel baselines in both final kernel quality and optimization efficiency under the same fixed budget. We additionally use a separate 22-instance held-out check as a sanity test against source-case memorization.

AI.tldr: KLineage是一种从专家GPU内核中逆向推导优化技能的方法，通过验证门控的简化步骤反向构建可复用的优化规则，并指导LLM在新代码上安全高效地应用这些技能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型（LLM）的GPU内核生成方法缺乏对‘何时应用何种优化’这一关键知识的判断能力，易导致不安全或低效的优化。
AI.method: KLineage从专家内核出发，反向执行验证门控的简化操作，将每个被接受的简化步骤逆向转化为一个结构化优化技能；该技能包含适用位置、有效性条件、效果及规避的错误类型；下游LLM在相同编译/正确性/性能约束下复用这些技能。
AI.result: 在五个专家工作负载、两种NVIDIA架构上，KLineage衍生的技能作为优化课程，显著超越近期基于记忆的LLM内核基线，在最终内核质量与单位预算下的优化效率两方面均更优；22个独立保留实例验证未发生源案例记忆。
AI.conclusion: KLineage通过逆向构建带上下文与约束的优化技能，有效弥补了LLM在GPU内核优化中的‘时机’知识缺失，提升了自动化优化的安全性、可解释性与泛化能力。

title: ProRL: Effective Reinforcement Learning for Proactive Recommendation via Rectified Policy Gradient Estimation
summary: Proactive Recommender Systems (PRSs) aim to guide user preference shift toward target items by generating paths of intermediate recommendations. Reinforcement learning (RL) provides a principled framework for optimizing such sequential decision tasks, as path rewards can naturally capture both short-term acceptance and long-term guidance effectiveness. However, naively applying policy gradients to PRS results in deficient gradient estimation. We identify two deficiencies: (1) path-level rewards decompose into step-level rewards with positive mean, creating a length-dependent bias that causes gradients to favor path extension over meaningful exploration; (2) weighting each step by the entire path-level reward ignores the decomposition structure, leading to high gradient variance. To rectify these two deficiencies, we propose an effective RL framework ProRL with two novel mechanisms for proactive recommendation. First, Stepwise Reward Centering subtracts expected rewards to neutralize length-dependent bias, ensuring that path extension yields zero expected gradient signal. Second, Position-Specific Advantage Estimation leverages the reward decomposition structure to compute step-dependent baselines, reducing gradient variance. Together, these mechanisms yield policy gradients that precisely target path quality. Our experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that ProRL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art PRSs. Our code is available at https://github.com/hongruhou89/ProRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProRL框架，通过Stepwise Reward Centering和Position-Specific Advantage Estimation两种新机制，解决主动推荐系统中策略梯度估计偏差大、方差高的问题，显著提升推荐路径质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的主动推荐系统在策略梯度估计中存在长度依赖偏差和高方差问题，影响路径质量优化。
AI.method: 提出ProRL框架，包含Stepwise Reward Centering（消除长度依赖偏差）和Position-Specific Advantage Estimation（利用奖励分解结构降低梯度方差）两个核心机制。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上，ProRL显著优于当前最先进的主动推荐系统。
AI.conclusion: ProRL通过改进策略梯度估计，更精准地优化推荐路径质量，为强化学习在主动推荐中的应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Janus-LoRA: A Balanced Low-Rank Adaptation for Continual Learning
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has emerged as a promising paradigm for Continual Learning. It independently updates its low-rank factors ($A$ and $B$), creating a composite update to the full weight matrix through their interaction. To prevent catastrophic forgetting, this update should remain orthogonal to the task-specific subspace that contains previously learned knowledge. However, we identify that this composite update systematically violates this orthogonality, reintroducing interference and undermining stability. Furthermore, naively enforcing this orthogonality compromises plasticity, disrupting the delicate stability-plasticity trade-off. To resolve these issues, we propose \textbf{Janus-LoRA}, a framework that restores this balance through two novel components. Specifically, we first introduce Gradient Rectification, a closed-form solution that mathematically decouples LoRA's factor updates, enforcing orthogonality against the historical knowledge subspace identified by an efficient Online Estimation. Next, to enhance plasticity, we introduce a Decoupled Margin Loss that promotes feature-level separation by pushing new feature representations away from old ones, thus creating distinct, low-interference regions for new learning. Comprehensive experiments on challenging benchmarks demonstrate that by harmonizing parameter-level orthogonality with feature-level separation, Janus-LoRA achieves a superior balance and establishes new state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Janus-LoRA，通过梯度校正和解耦边界损失，在参数级正交性与特征级分离之间取得更好平衡，缓解LoRA在持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，并提升性能。
AI.motivation: LoRA在持续学习中因复合更新违反任务子空间正交性而导致灾难性遗忘；而强制正交又损害可塑性，破坏稳定性-可塑性权衡。
AI.method: 提出Janus-LoRA框架：1）梯度校正——基于在线估计的历史知识子空间，用闭式解解耦LoRA因子更新以保证正交性；2）解耦边界损失——推动新特征远离旧特征，增强特征级分离。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性持续学习基准上显著优于现有方法，达到新的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 参数级正交性与特征级分离协同优化，可有效重建持续学习中稳定性和可塑性的平衡，Janus-LoRA为此提供了有效实现路径。

title: Why We Need Speech to Evaluate Speech Translation
summary: Speech translation models are increasingly capable of preserving speech-specific information (e.g., speaker gender, prosody, and emphasis), yet evaluation metrics remain blind to such phenomena. We meta-evaluate both text- and speech-based quality estimation metrics on two contrastive datasets targeting gender agreement and prosody, and find that both fall short, even when given direct access to the speech signal. We then train SpeechCOMET, a family of quality estimation models with speech encoders, and evaluate a state-of-the-art SpeechLLM as a judge. Both match or exceed text-based COMET on standard quality estimation, but neither consistently assesses speech-specific phenomena. We identify three causes: (1) speech-specific features are not reliably preserved in current encoders, (2) models tend to ignore the speech source signal, and (3) quality estimation training data contains too few relevant examples. We release all models and code, and argue that progress requires dedicated speech-specific training data and models that genuinely condition on speech.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语音翻译质量评估指标在捕捉语音特有信息（如说话人性别、语调和重音）方面的不足，提出了SpeechCOMET模型并分析其局限性，指出需构建专用语音训练数据及真正依赖语音信号的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有语音翻译质量评估指标无法有效衡量语音特有信息（如性别、语调、重音）的保留程度，而当前模型却日益具备保留这些信息的能力，导致评估与能力脱节。
AI.method: 对文本和语音两类质量评估指标进行元评估；构建带语音编码器的SpeechCOMET系列模型；以先进SpeechLLM作为评判器；系统分析性能瓶颈原因。
AI.result: 现有文本/语音质量评估指标均难以可靠评估语音特有现象；SpeechCOMET和SpeechLLM在标准任务上媲美或超越文本COMET，但在语音特有现象评估上仍不一致；发现三大根本原因：语音特征未被可靠编码、模型忽略语音源信号、训练数据中相关样本严重不足。
AI.conclusion: 推动语音翻译质量评估进步的关键在于构建专用语音特有现象的训练数据，并设计能真正以语音为条件的评估模型。

title: Machine Learning methods for event classification and vertex reconstruction of the 12C + 12C reaction with the MATE-TPC
summary: In modern nuclear physics experiments, identifying events of interest is challenging for nuclear reaction studies with the active target Time Projection Chamber (TPC). In this work, machine learning techniques are employed to analyze the complex data of the 12C + 12C fusion reaction from a TPC named MATE (multi-purpose active-target time projection chamber for nuclear experiments). Specifically, we successfully applied Residual Neural Network (ResNet-50, ResNet-34 and ResNet-18) and Visual Geometry Group (VGG-19) to classify elastic scattering and fusion reaction events from the 12C + 12C reaction. The classification results of the four models are nearly identical, with accuracies of approximately 97% for the simulated data and 90% for the experimental data. Moreover, these approaches successfully identify some events that are misclassified by traditional methods. These models are also applied to classify events from different fusion reaction channels, with classification accuracies of approximately 95% on simulated data. In addition, a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model is developed to reconstruct the reaction vertex, providing an alternative strategy for vertex reconstruction. These results indicate that machine learning techniques can effectively classify reaction events from different channels and reconstruct the reaction vertex, thereby paving the way for future analyses of complex nuclear reaction data.

AI.tldr: 本文利用ResNet和VGG等深度学习模型对MATE TPC实验中12C+12C反应的弹性散射与融合事件进行高精度分类（模拟数据97%，实验数据90%），并开发CNN模型用于反应顶点重建，显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现代核物理实验中，使用活性靶时间投影室（TPC）研究核反应时，识别感兴趣事件（如弹性散射与融合反应）具有挑战性。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-50/34/18、VGG-19进行事件分类，并构建CNN模型用于反应顶点重建，分别在模拟与实验数据上验证性能。
AI.result: 四类网络对弹性散射与融合事件分类准确率分别达~97%（模拟）和~90%（实验）；对不同融合通道分类准确率达~95%（模拟）；CNN顶点重建提供新策略。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习技术可有效提升核反应事件分类与顶点重建能力，为复杂核反应数据分析提供新途径。

title: DriveWAM: Video Generative Priors Enable Scalable World-Action Modeling for Autonomous Driving
summary: Pretrained foundation models have become an important basis for end-to-end autonomous driving. In contrast to vision-language models pretrained primarily on static image-text pairs, video generative models capture temporal dynamics and motion priors that are naturally suited for driving. We present DriveWAM, a driving world-action model that adapts a pretrained video diffusion transformer into an autoregressive video-action policy. DriveWAM organizes video and action streams into a unified temporal token sequence and trains them under a joint flow-matching objective, preserving the pretrained video-generation architecture while adapting its large-scale video priors to action generation. To incorporate high-level scene understanding, we introduce scene-evolving driving guidance, where a frozen VLM produces chunk-specific semantic intent to guide video-action generation. To keep long-horizon rollout bounded, we further introduce selective KV memory, which maintains bounded modality-aware video and action memory pools through relevance-redundancy cache selection at inference time. Experiments on NAVSIM and the PhysicalAI-Autonomous-Vehicles benchmark show that DriveWAM achieves strong planning performance, and a data-scaling study from 4k to 100k driving clips further confirms the scaling potential of world-action modeling for end-to-end autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: DriveWAM是一种将预训练视频扩散Transformer适配为自回归视频-动作策略的驾驶世界-动作模型，通过联合流匹配目标、场景演化驾驶引导和选择性KV记忆机制，提升端到端自动驾驶的规划性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练基础模型已成为端到端自动驾驶的重要基础；相比主要在静态图像-文本对上预训练的视觉语言模型，视频生成模型能捕捉更适合驾驶任务的时间动态与运动先验。
AI.method: 提出DriveWAM模型：1）将预训练视频扩散Transformer适配为自回归视频-动作策略，统一组织视频与动作流为时序token序列，并采用联合流匹配目标训练；2）引入冻结视觉语言模型驱动的场景演化驾驶引导，提供语义意图指导；3）设计选择性KV记忆机制，在推理时通过相关性-冗余性缓存选择维持有界模态感知记忆池。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM和PhysicalAI-Autonomous-Vehicles基准上展现出强规划性能；数据扩展实验（4k至100k驾驶片段）验证了世界-动作建模在端到端自动驾驶中的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DriveWAM有效融合视频生成先验与动作决策，为端到端自动驾驶提供了可扩展、具语义引导和长程一致性的世界-动作建模范式。

title: When Seekers Are Hard to Help: Evaluating Emotional Support Dialogue Systems in Worst-Case Interactions
summary: Emotional Support Dialogue Systems (ESDSes) are increasingly evaluated and trained with LLM-simulated seekers. However, such simulated seekers often behave as cooperative, average-case users who disclose clearly, respond constructively, and accept support within a few turns. This can lead to overly optimistic evaluation and obscure whether ESDSes can handle difficult help-seeking interactions. In this work, we study ESDS evaluation under worst-case interactions, where seekers are hard to help due to low engagement, resistance, limited self-disclosure, emotional volatility, or rigid negative interpretations. We first conduct an expert simulation study with eight experienced counselling professionals, who simulate difficult seekers, interact with existing Chinese ESDSes, provide scale ratings, and participate in semi-structured interviews. Based on this study, we derive worst-case seeker behaviours and identify key limitations of current systems. We then propose a worst-case evaluation framework consisting of an LLM-based worst-case seeker simulator and four worst-case-oriented metrics: Deep Emotional Understanding, Guided Exploration, Balanced Emotional Support, and Authentic and Grounded Support. Evaluating 17 systems, we find that nearly all models suffer substantial performance drops under worst-case interactions. Large general-purpose LLMs are generally more robust than specialised ESDSes, but even the strongest models struggle to sustain engagement and improve seekers' emotional states. Finally, we show that worst-case simulation can also generate useful training data, improving the robustness of smaller models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了情感支持对话系统（ESDSes）在最坏情况交互下的评估问题，发现现有基于LLM模拟的评估过于乐观；作者通过专家模拟构建了最坏情况下的寻求者行为模式，并提出包含四个新指标的评估框架，实验表明当前系统在此类场景下性能显著下降，但最坏情况模拟数据可用于提升小模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有ESDS评估多依赖合作性强、表达清晰的LLM模拟寻求者，导致评估结果过于乐观，无法反映系统在真实困难求助场景（如低参与度、抗拒、情绪波动等）中的实际能力。
AI.method: 1）组织8位专业咨询师模拟困难寻求者，与中文ESDS交互并评分访谈；2）基于专家数据归纳最坏情况行为特征；3）构建基于LLM的最坏情况寻求者模拟器及四项新评估指标；4）对17个系统进行最坏情况评估，并验证模拟数据用于训练的有效性。
AI.result: 几乎所有系统在最坏情况下性能大幅下降；通用大模型比专用ESDS更鲁棒，但仍难以持续维持互动和改善用户情绪状态；最坏情况模拟数据可有效提升小模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 当前ESDS评估需纳入最坏情况视角，所提框架能更真实揭示系统局限性，并为鲁棒性建模和数据增强提供新路径。

title: When Does Memory Help Multi-Trajectory Inference for Tool-Use LLM Agents?
comment: More evaluation and analysis are on the way
summary: Multi-trajectory inference for tool-use LLM agents - generating multiple reasoning attempts and selecting among them - benefits from transferring knowledge across attempts so that later ones avoid the pitfalls of earlier ones. Existing cross-trajectory memory methods (trajectory-level reflection, atomic fact extraction, raw observation injection) are each evaluated under a single inference strategy on a single task, making it unclear whether reported gains reflect properties of the memory abstraction or of the inference method. We propose a unified framework that decomposes memory along two axes -- the scope of transfer (within an expansion vs. across trajectories) and the abstraction of the transferred content -- and evaluate four methods under three inference strategies (best-of-N, beam search, MCTS) on four tool-use benchmarks spanning SQL, knowledge-graph, and CLI environments, in a verifier-free setting that matches the deployment regime of practical agents. The experiment matrix identifies the inference method as a confound: the same memory method produces statistically distinct results under different inference strategies on the same examples. Reflection reaches significance only under MCTS (not under best-of-N); within-expansion injection (conditioning each candidate on prior siblings' outcomes) helps only diversity-starved beam search; and atomic fact extraction is accuracy-neutral but shortens trajectories by 19-26% on tasks with reusable environmental structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架来评估多轨迹推理中跨轨迹记忆方法的有效性，发现推理策略是影响记忆方法效果的重要混杂因素。
AI.motivation: 现有跨轨迹记忆方法在单一推理策略和任务下评估，难以区分效果来源于记忆抽象本身还是推理方法。
AI.method: 构建一个二维分解框架（转移范围：单次扩展内 vs. 跨轨迹；内容抽象程度），系统评估四种记忆方法在三种推理策略（best-of-N、beam search、MCTS）和四个工具使用基准上的表现，且在无验证器设置下进行。
AI.result: 实验证明推理策略是关键混杂变量：同一记忆方法在不同策略下表现显著不同；反思仅在MCTS下显著有效；扩展内注入仅对多样性不足的beam search有益；原子事实提取虽不提升准确率，但可缩短19–26%轨迹长度。
AI.conclusion: 跨轨迹记忆方法的效果高度依赖于所采用的推理策略，未来研究需联合设计记忆与推理机制，并在多样化策略下评估。

title: T-GINEE: A Tensor-Based Multilayer Graph Representation Learning
summary: Traditional network analysis focuses on single-layer networks, real-world systems often form multilayer networks with multiple relationship types. However, existing methods typically fail to capture complex inter-layer dependencies by treating layers independently or aggregating them. To address this, we propose T-GINEE (Tensor-Based Generalized Multilayer-graph Estimating Equation), a statistical regularization framework combining tensor-based generalized estimating equations with task-specific loss to model cross-network correlations explicitly. Key innovations include: (1) CP tensor decomposition capturing structural dependencies via shared latent factors; (2) a generalized estimating equation framework modeling inter-layer correlations through working covariance matrices; and (3) a flexible link function accommodating characteristics like sparsity. Our theoretical analysis establishes consistency and asymptotic normality under mild conditions. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets validate T-GINEE's effectiveness for multilayer network analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出T-GINEE框架，通过张量分解与广义估计方程建模多层网络中跨层依赖关系，兼具统计可解释性与任务适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统网络分析局限于单层网络，而现实系统常以多层网络形式存在；现有方法难以有效捕捉层间复杂依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出基于张量的广义多层图估计方程（T-GINEE），结合CP张量分解、广义估计方程框架（含工作协方差矩阵）及灵活链接函数。
AI.result: 理论证明了估计量的一致性与渐近正态性；在合成与真实数据集上验证了其在多层网络分析中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: T-GINEE为多层网络建模提供了兼具统计严谨性与实用性的新范式，能显式刻画跨网络相关性。

title: GEM: Generative Supervision Helps Embodied Intelligence
summary: Embodied Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance and generalization in robotics, particularly within Vision-Language-Action frameworks. However, a significant gap remains between the high-level semantic focus of standard text-guided pre-training paradigms and the low-level spatial and physical knowledge critical for execution in embodied environments. In this paper, we introduce GEM, a Generative-supervised Embodied vision-language Model designed to bridge this divide. We propose integrating a depth map generation task directly into the VLM pre-training phase. By training this generative objective jointly with the main model, we observe substantial improvements in embodied intelligence, significantly enhancing both semantic understanding and physical operation capabilities. To support this paradigm, we curate and release GEM-4M, a comprehensive large-scale dataset featuring a mixture of grounding, reasoning, and planning data paired with high-quality depth supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GEM achieves state-of-the-art results across diverse embodied benchmarks. Furthermore, our deployed action model, GEM-VLA, exhibits vastly superior task execution abilities in both simulation environments and real-world evaluations. Code, models, and datasets are available at https://zhaorw02.github.io/GEM/

AI.tldr: 本文提出GEM模型，通过在视觉语言模型预训练中引入深度图生成任务，提升机器人在具身环境中的语义理解与物理操作能力，并发布大规模数据集GEM-4M及具身动作模型GEM-VLA。
AI.motivation: 标准文本引导的预训练范式侧重高层语义，缺乏具身环境中执行所需的低层空间与物理知识。
AI.method: 提出生成监督的具身视觉语言模型GEM，在VLM预训练阶段联合训练深度图生成任务；构建并发布含深度监督的大规模数据集GEM-4M。
AI.result: GEM在多个具身智能基准测试中达到SOTA；其动作模型GEM-VLA在仿真与真实世界任务执行中表现显著更优。
AI.conclusion: 将生成式深度估计任务融入VLM预训练可有效弥合语义理解与物理执行之间的鸿沟，提升具身智能整体性能。

title: Building Community-Centred NLP Resources for Puno Quechua
comment: Sixth Workshop on NLP for Indigenous Languages of the Americas (AmericasNLP 2026), co-located with ACL 2026
summary: The preservation of under-resourced languages requires digital tools and resources shaped by and for their speakers. We present the first dedicated ASR resources for Puno Quechua (ISO 639-3: qxp): (1) the largest speech corpus for any single Quechua variety, consisting in 66 hours of recordings for scripted and spontaneous speech (including 36 hours of manually transcribed and validated data), collected via a participatory design campaign; (2) the first systematic ASR benchmark for Puno Quechua, evaluating state-of-the-art models and fine-tuning Whisper-base, wav2vec2-base, and XLS-R-300M, with and without continued pre-training (CPT); (3) an open release of all datasets and fine-tuned models.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了首个专为秘鲁普诺地区克丘亚语（qxp）设计的自动语音识别（ASR）资源，包括大规模语音语料库、系统性基准测试及开源模型与数据集。
AI.motivation: 保护低资源语言需要由其使用者参与设计并服务于他们的数字工具和资源。
AI.method: 通过参与式设计活动收集66小时语音数据（含36小时人工校验转录），构建首个普诺克丘亚语ASR基准，评估并微调Whisper-base、wav2vec2-base和XLS-R-300M模型，部分结合持续预训练（CPT）。
AI.result: 发布了目前最大的单一克丘亚语变体语音语料库、首个系统性ASR基准结果，以及全部数据集和微调模型的开源版本。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为低资源土著语言的语音技术发展提供了可复用的方法论和实践范例，并推动社区驱动的语言技术建设。

title: PIRS: Physics-Informed Reward Shaping for SAC-Based Building Energy Management
comment: N pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on AI-Driven Energy Efficiency in Dynamic Systems (AI-DEEDS '26), co-located with ACM e-Energy / ACM Sustainability Week, Banff, AB, Canada, June 22-25, 2026
summary: Occupant comfort and grid-aware energy efficiency are competing objectives whose joint optimization depends critically on how reward functions are specified in deep reinforcement learning (DRL) controllers for buildings. Yet reward design remains largely ad hoc: comfort terms are either hand-tuned heuristics or simple temperature-deviation proxies without explicit grounding in thermal-comfort physics. We present PIRS (Physics-Informed Reward Shaping), which replaces these ad-hoc comfort proxies with the ISO 7730 Predicted Mean Vote (PMV) formulation inside a weighted multi-objective reward for Soft Actor-Critic (SAC). By anchoring the comfort signal in the ISO 7730 PMV formulation, PIRS improves reward interpretability and provides a standards-grounded comfort proxy without changing any other component of the learning pipeline. We evaluate PIRS in CityLearn v2.1.2 (challenge 2022 phase 1) with a central SAC agent trained for 50k steps over five random seeds, and compare against a rule-based controller (RBC), a manually engineered reward (E2), an energy-only reward (E3), and a naive temperature-deviation comfort reward (E4). District-level key performance indicators (KPIs), reported as ratios versus RBC, show that PIRS attains cost, carbon, and electricity metrics on par with the manual baseline while substantially outperforming non-physics-grounded designs -- particularly on load ramping (1.78x vs. ~2.4x RBC) and daily peak demand. All DRL policies remain above RBC at this training budget; we interpret this gap honestly and position PIRS as an interpretable, standards-aligned foundation for reward design rather than a claim of dominance over classical control at limited compute.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIRS（物理信息奖励塑形）方法，将ISO 7730标准中的PMV热舒适模型嵌入Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）的多目标奖励函数中，替代传统启发式或温度偏差型舒适奖励，在不改变DRL框架其他部分的前提下提升奖励可解释性与标准一致性。实验表明PIRS在成本、碳排放和用电效率上媲美人工设计奖励，且显著改善负荷爬坡与日峰值需求等关键指标。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑DRL控制器中，舒适性奖励设计多为经验性或简单温度偏差代理，缺乏热舒适物理基础，导致奖励不可解释、难以标准化；需一种既保持DRL灵活性又符合国际标准的奖励构造方法。
AI.method: 提出PIRS方法：将ISO 7730标准的Predicted Mean Vote（PMV）公式作为舒适性项，嵌入加权多目标奖励函数，用于Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）算法；在CityLearn v2.1.2平台（2022挑战赛Phase 1）上训练中央SAC智能体，共50k步，5组随机种子；对比规则控制器（RBC）、人工奖励（E2）、纯能耗奖励（E3）及温度偏差奖励（E4）。
AI.result: PIRS在区域能源成本、碳排放和总耗电量等KPI上与人工设计奖励（E2）相当（均以RBC为基准），但在负荷爬坡能力（1.78×RBC vs. E4约2.4×RBC）和日峰值需求控制上明显优于非物理驱动设计；所有DRL策略在50k步训练下仍略逊于RBC，但PIRS展现出更优的收敛趋势与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: PIRS通过将热舒适物理模型（PMV）直接纳入奖励函数，实现了奖励设计的标准化、可解释化与性能提升的统一；它不是对传统控制的全面超越，而是为面向建筑能源优化的DRL提供了一个稳健、合规、可扩展的奖励设计基础。

title: How Far Can Disaggregation Go? A Design-Space Exploration of Attention-FFN Disaggregation for Efficient MoE LLM Serving
summary: Modern large language model (LLM) inference has progressively disaggregated to keep pace with growing model sizes and tight TTFT and TPOT service-level objectives: from chunked-prefill aggregation, to prefill-decode (P/D) disaggregation, and most recently to operator-level Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD). This trend is especially important for mixture-of-experts (MoE) models, where memory-bound attention, compute-intensive expert FFNs, and MoE dispatch/combine communication create distinct resource demands. AFD further exposes this heterogeneity by placing attention and MoE-FFN execution on separate GPU groups. Each level of disaggregation deepens the scheduling design space across workload characteristics, resource allocation, and interconnect topology, raising the central question: when does each level actually pay off? We systematically characterize this trade-off for MoE inference across realistic workloads spanning input/output sequence lengths, prefix-KV reuse, and per-user latency constraints. Using chunked-prefill and P/D disaggregation as baselines, we study the benefits and limits of AFD at scale through a framework that fuses on-device kernel measurements with high-fidelity network simulation. Under strict TTFT/TPOT SLOs, AFD sustains around 4k tokens/s of system throughput on DeepSeek-V3.2 across chat, coding, and agentic-coding workloads, where non-AFD deployments are infeasible. We distill concrete takeaways for jointly optimizing throughput and interactivity, including how to partition attention and FFN across GPUs as a function of workload and model architecture, providing design principles for current rack- and cluster-scale deployments as well as future disaggregated AI infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了现代大语言模型（尤其是MoE架构）推理中不同层级的计算解耦（chunked-prefill、prefill-decode、Attention-FFN Disaggregation, AFD）对吞吐量与延迟的影响，发现AFD在满足严格TTFT/TPOT SLO下可显著提升系统吞吐（如DeepSeek-V3.2达~4k tokens/s），并提出面向实际工作负载与硬件拓扑的GPU资源划分原则。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM尤其是MoE模型规模扩大和SLO（TTFT/TPOT）趋严，推理逐步走向细粒度解耦（如AFD），但各层级解耦的实际收益尚不清晰；需在真实工作负载下量化其性能权衡。
AI.method: 构建融合设备内核实测与高保真网络仿真的评估框架，在涵盖不同序列长度、prefix-KV复用与用户延迟约束的真实MoE工作负载上，以chunked-prefill和P/D为基线，系统评测AFD的吞吐、延迟表现及资源划分策略。
AI.result: 在严格TTFT/TPOT约束下，AFD使DeepSeek-V3.2在多类工作负载中实现约4k tokens/s系统吞吐，而非AFD方案不可行；明确了Attention与FFN在GPU间划分的最优策略依赖于工作负载特征与模型架构。
AI.conclusion: AFD是当前MoE推理在严苛SLO下实现高吞吐与低延迟的关键路径；论文提炼出兼顾吞吐与交互性的联合优化设计原则，支撑现网机架/集群部署及未来解耦式AI基础设施演进。

title: PrunePath: Towards Highly Structured Sparse Language Models
summary: Feed-forward networks (FFNs) dominate the parameter count and computation of modern language models, yet existing pruning methods often struggle to convert sparsity into hardware-friendly inference efficiency gains. We introduce \textbf{PrunePath}, a budget-adaptive structured sparsification framework for FFN layers. Built on MoEfication, PrunePath replaces independent expert-wise thresholding with a softmax-normalized routing distribution and activates important experts under a cumulative-mass threshold. This formulation imposes a token-level probability budget, enabling adaptive expert counts and a direct inference-time sparsity knob from a single checkpoint. Across NLU, NLG, and instruction-tuning evaluations, PrunePath achieves a favorable sparsity--performance trade-off compared with existing static pruning and MoEfication-based methods. We further implement Triton kernels for KV-cache decoding to translate the resulting structured sparsity into practical memory savings and measurable decoding-speed improvements. These results demonstrate the superior performance of PrunePath for building highly sparse, deployment-friendly large language models.

AI.tldr: PrunePath是一种预算自适应的前馈网络结构化剪枝框架，通过改进MoEfication中的专家选择机制，实现token级稀疏控制和推理时灵活调整专家数量，显著提升稀疏大模型的部署效率。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法难以将稀疏性转化为硬件友好的推理加速，尤其在FFN层参数占比高、计算密集的现代语言模型中。
AI.method: 基于MoEfication，用softmax归一化路由分布替代独立专家阈值剪枝，引入累积质量阈值以实现token级概率预算控制，支持单checkpoint下动态调整激活专家数；并设计Triton内核优化KV缓存解码。
AI.result: 在NLU、NLG和指令微调任务上，PrunePath在稀疏率与性能间取得更优权衡；实际部署中实现显著内存节省与可测解码速度提升。
AI.conclusion: PrunePath为构建高稀疏、易部署的大语言模型提供了高效、灵活且硬件友好的结构化剪枝新范式。

title: AI, Take the Wheel: What Drives Delegation and Trust in Human-Computer Cooperative Question Answering?
comment: Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics, 2026
summary: AI systems are fallible, and humans can make mistakes in deciding whether to trust AI over their own judgment. Thus, improving human-AI collaboration requires understanding when, why, and how humans decide to rely on AI. We study two distinct reliance decisions: the delegation choice -- deciding when to let AI act autonomously without knowing its output, and the adoption choice -- evaluating AI suggestions and deciding how to use them. Both of these decoupled reliance patterns shape collaboration, but prior work rarely studies them together in realistic settings with the same users. We address this gap by studying collaborative human--AI teams competing in a question-answering game in which humans can choose when and how to work with AI agents to win. Our 24 matches pair 23 expert humans with 16 AI agents, capturing 387 delegation and 1440 adoption decisions. While human--AI collaboration performs better than either AI or humans alone, humans make suboptimal collaboration decisions, both under-relying on correct AI suggestions (3.9% of opportunities missed) and over-relying when AI misleads them (1.7%). Both parties contribute wrong answers: reported model confidence is near chance when humans and AI disagree, while confirmation bias drives higher under-reliance (64.5%) when an AI suggestion agrees with humans' initial incorrect answer. To close this gap, we recommend calibrated confidence, evidence-grounded explanations, and mechanisms that help users refine trust.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了人类在与AI协作时的两种依赖决策：委托选择（让AI自主行动）和采纳选择（评估并决定是否采用AI建议）。通过一个问答游戏实验，发现人类在协作中存在过度依赖和依赖不足的问题，并提出了改进信任校准、提供基于证据的解释以及帮助用户调整信任机制的建议。
AI.motivation: AI系统存在错误，人类在决定是否信任AI时也可能犯错，因此需要理解人类何时、为何及如何决定依赖AI，以提升人机协作效果。
AI.method: 设计了一个问答游戏实验，让23名专家人类与16个AI代理配对进行24场比赛，收集并分析387次委托决策和1440次采纳决策。
AI.result: 人机协作表现优于单独的人类或AI；但人类存在次优协作决策：未采纳正确AI建议（3.9%），错误采纳错误AI建议（1.7%）；当人类与AI意见不一致时模型置信度接近随机水平；确认偏误导致人类在AI支持其初始错误答案时更易低估AI建议（64.5%）。
AI.conclusion: 需通过校准AI置信度、提供基于证据的解释以及支持用户动态调整信任的机制来改善人机协作中的依赖决策质量。

title: Compositional Generalization in Autoregressive Models via Logit Composition
summary: Composing autoregressive models remains a core challenge in understanding how large language models can combine behaviors or skills learned across tasks. We introduce a new and principled composition strategy for autoregressive systems, inspired by composition methods developed for diffusion models. Under a factorized-conditionals assumption, we show that the resulting composition is projective: each component model preserves control over its own designated subspace of the output distribution avoiding interference between models. This property is further preserved under smooth reparameterizations of the output space, yielding a feature-space theorem. Finally, we show that composition preserves length-generalizing behavior when the factorization assumptions and component guarantees hold uniformly at the target length. These results provide a principled understanding of when model composition and merging succeed in autoregressive systems and identify conditions under which their interactions remain stable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受扩散模型启发的、基于因子化条件假设的自回归模型组合新策略，证明了该组合具有投影性（各组件模型在输出分布的指定子空间中保持独立控制），且该性质在输出空间的平滑重参数化下保持，并可推广到不同序列长度。
AI.motivation: 理解大语言模型如何组合跨任务学习到的行为或技能，即自回归模型的组合问题，是一个核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种新的自回归系统组合策略，基于因子化条件假设，并从理论上分析其投影性、在输出空间重参数化下的不变性，以及对长度泛化行为的保持性。
AI.result: 证明了所提组合策略具有投影性，避免模型间干扰；该性质在输出空间的平滑重参数化下仍成立（特征空间定理）；并在满足因子化假设和组件保证时，保持长度泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 为自回归系统中模型组合与融合的成功提供了理论依据，明确了其交互保持稳定的充分条件。

title: Deformable Gaussian Occupancy: Decoupling Rigid and Nonrigid Motion with Factorized Distillation
summary: Understanding dynamic 3D environments is essential for safe autonomous driving, particularly when reasoning about human-centric, nonrigid agents. However, existing weakly supervised occupancy prediction frameworks predominantly assume rigid-body motion and rely on simple frame-to-frame offsets, limiting their ability to capture fine-grained deformations and maintain temporal coherence. To address this issue, we propose DeGO, a deformable Gaussian occupancy framework that unifies decoupled Gaussian deformation with factorized 4D foundation-model distillation. DeGO disentangles rigid and nonrigid motion, enabling each Gaussian primitive to evolve through both deformation and offset-based updates. In parallel, a factorized 4D distillation strategy transfers cross-camera and cross-frame knowledge from the VGGT foundation model, producing foundation-aligned features that enhance temporal consistency. Experiments on the Occ3D-NuScenes benchmark demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under weak supervision, delivering 13.5% gains on human-centric instances and 10.9% overall improvements. These results highlight the effectiveness of deformation-aware and foundation-guided occupancy modeling for dynamic scene understanding. The code is publicly available: https://github.com/vita-epfl/DeGO

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeGO框架，通过可变形高斯体与4D基础模型知识蒸馏结合，提升弱监督下动态3D场景（尤其是人体等非刚性目标）的占用预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督占用预测方法多假设刚体运动，难以建模细粒度形变和保持时间一致性，尤其在人机共驾等需理解非刚性动态主体的场景中存在局限。
AI.method: 提出DeGO：1）解耦高斯体的刚性平移与非刚性形变；2）引入因子化4D蒸馏策略，从VGGT基础模型迁移跨相机、跨帧知识，生成与基础模型对齐的特征以增强时序一致性。
AI.result: 在Occ3D-NuScenes基准上，弱监督设定下达到SOTA：人体中心实例提升13.5%，整体提升10.9%。
AI.conclusion: 形变感知与基础模型引导的占用建模能显著提升动态场景理解能力，尤其适用于人机交互等复杂驾驶场景。

title: CIRF: Tokenizing Chain-of-Thoughts into Reusable Functional Units for Efficient Latent Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Implicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reduces the inference cost of large language models by internalizing the explicit rationales. However, existing approaches typically lack alignment with explicit rationales and adaptivity to example complexity. In this work, we propose CIRF (\textit{\underline{C}hain-of-thoughts \underline{I}nto \underline{R}eusable \underline{F}unctional units}), an implicit CoT framework that performs reasoning as a dynamic sequence of discrete functional tokens. CIRF assigns a functional token to each semantically coherent reasoning unit in explicit CoT traces. The model is then fine-tuned to autoregressively generate functional tokens and their optional results, followed by the final answer. This design aligns latent reasoning with a sequence of functional units, facilitating parallel training, explicit rationale alignment, and adaptive reasoning. Extensive experiments on mathematical, symbolic, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks show that CIRF provides a favorable accuracy-latency trade-off compared with state-of-the-art implicit CoT methods. Further analyses demonstrate that CIRF constructs distinct, interpretable functional tokens, leading to consistent performance improvements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIRF框架，将隐式思维链推理建模为可重用的功能单元序列，通过功能标记对显式推理步骤进行对齐和抽象，在保持高准确率的同时显著降低推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式思维链方法缺乏与显式推理的对齐性，且难以适应不同复杂度的样本。
AI.method: 提出CIRF框架，将显式CoT中的语义连贯推理单元映射为离散的功能标记；模型经微调后自回归生成功能标记及其可选结果，再输出最终答案。
AI.result: 在数学、符号和常识推理基准上，CIRF在准确率与延迟之间取得优于当前最优隐式CoT方法的权衡；分析表明其学习到的标记具有可解释性和一致性。
AI.conclusion: CIRF通过功能化、结构化的隐式推理建模，实现了对齐性、可并行训练性与自适应推理能力的统一，是隐式CoT的有效新范式。

title: Entropy Distribution as a Fingerprint for Hallucinations in Generative Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often generate factually incorrect outputs, commonly termed hallucinations, that undermine trust and limit deployment in high-stakes settings. Existing hallucination detection methods typically require multiple forward passes, or access to model internals. In this work, we provide theoretical background and empirical evidence that the distribution of token-level entropies, beyond the mean captured by perplexity or length-normalised entropy, serves as a fingerprint of hallucination, with distributional shape and tail behaviour carrying independent signal. We formalize hallucination detection as a statistical hypothesis test and propose the Calibrated Entropy Score (CES), a lightweight algorithm requiring only a single forward pass and black-box access to token logits. CES combines the mean signal with the maximum signal of the generated entropy through a calibrated reference CDF, producing scores that are directly comparable across models and tasks. We establish finite-sample calibration guarantees via a novel random-length Dvoretzky--Kiefer--Wolfowitz inequality, and also prove that CES detects hallucinations with probability converging to one exponentially fast in the generation length. Across eight QA benchmarks and ten generator models spanning open-source and API access models, CES achieves the highest detection performance among all single-pass black-box methods while providing formal error guarantees that existing heuristics lack. Remarkably, CES is statistically indistinguishable from multi-sample methods that require far greater computational cost, closing the gap between lightweight and expensive detection and making it suitable for real-time, large-scale deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Calibrated Entropy Score（CES）的轻量级幻觉检测方法，仅需一次前向传播和黑盒访问token logits，利用token级熵的分布特征（而不仅是均值）进行统计假设检验，具备理论校准保证与高检测性能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）常产生事实性错误（即幻觉），威胁可信度与高风险场景部署；现有检测方法多依赖多次前向传播或模型内部访问，效率与适用性受限。
AI.method: 将幻觉检测形式化为统计假设检验，提出CES算法：融合生成序列中熵的均值与最大值信号，并通过校准的参考累积分布函数（CDF）标准化；理论支撑包括随机长度DKW不等式与指数级检测概率收敛证明。
AI.result: 在8个QA基准、10个开源及API模型上，CES在单次前向黑盒方法中达到最高检测性能，且统计上与多采样高成本方法无显著差异；同时提供现有启发式方法所缺乏的形式化误差保证。
AI.conclusion: CES是一种高效、可理论保证、跨模型/任务可比的幻觉检测方法，弥合了轻量级与高成本检测之间的性能差距，适用于实时、大规模部署。

title: Learning to Assess the Reliability of Number-of-Runs Estimation in Stochastic Optimization
comment: Preprint version of a poster accepted at the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2026 (GECCO 2026)
summary: In large-scale benchmarking of stochastic optimization algorithms, the key challenge is no longer whether repeated runs are needed for reliability, but how to determine when sufficient evidence has been collected without incurring unnecessary computational cost. We study a learning-based extension of a recent empirical online heuristic that adaptively estimates the required number of runs using outlier handling and skewness-based symmetry checks. Using annotated outcomes from 132{,}000 Nevergrad runs on COCO (24 problems in 20 dimensions, 10 instances each, 11 optimizers), we train classifiers on 23 statistical, energy-free, and shape and stability features to predict whether a run-number estimate is reliable, prioritizing detection of incorrect estimates via minority-class recall. We evaluate reliability prediction using a within-configuration learning setup, where models are trained and tested on data sharing the same optimizer. The results show that run-number reliability can be learned in a within-configuration scenario, enabling detection of unreliable estimates with high minority-class recall, although performance remains limited by the restricted data diversity within fixed configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的方法来评估随机优化算法基准测试中所需运行次数的可靠性，利用统计和形状特征训练分类器，重点提升对错误估计的检测能力（少数类召回率），并在固定优化器配置内验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 大规模随机优化算法基准测试中，核心挑战是如何在保证结果可靠性的同时避免不必要的计算开销，即动态、自适应地判断何时已收集足够多的运行次数。
AI.method: 基于132,000次Nevergrad在COCO基准上的运行结果，提取23个无能量（energy-free）、统计及形状稳定性特征，训练分类器预测运行次数估计的可靠性；采用组内配置（within-configuration）学习范式，即模型在相同优化器的数据上训练与测试，并以少数类召回率为优先优化目标。
AI.result: 在within-configuration设定下，模型能有效学习运行次数估计的可靠性，实现高少数类召回率，但受限于固定配置下数据多样性不足，整体性能仍有提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 运行次数估计的可靠性可在同优化器配置内被有效建模和预测，为自动化、自适应的优化算法基准测试提供了可行的学习驱动新范式。

title: Mining Multi-Modality Spatio-Temporal Cues for Video Important Person Identification
summary: Identifying key individuals in video scenes is essential for applications such as automated video editing and intelligent surveillance. Current methods primarily focus on static images and immediate visual cues, overlooking the rich spatio-temporal information in videos. This leads to the phenomenon of Temporal Importance Shift (TIS), wherein individuals deemed significant in early frames may be demoted as the entire temporal context is considered. To address this, we introduce the Video Important Person (VIP) identification task, aimed at automatically identifying the most influential individuals in videos while providing textual rationales. We present Temporal-VIP, a large-scale rationale-annotated dataset consisting of 9,249 video segments across 11 categories with aligned importance rationales. To mitigate TIS, we develop the VIP-Net framework, which includes a Social Cue Encoder (SCE) for extracting multi-modal spatio-temporal cues, a Temporal Importance Rectifier (TIR) for hierarchical cue fusion and cross-modal alignment, and VIP Inference for ranking individuals. Experimental results show that VIP-Net achieves 67.3% accuracy, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art models (37.5%-53.9%) and yielding a mean rationale similarity of 0.63 to ground truth through feature-guided LLM refinement. The dataset and code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/yml2002/Temporal-VIP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出视频重要人物（VIP）识别任务，构建了大规模带文本理由标注的数据集Temporal-VIP，并设计VIP-Net框架以缓解时序重要性偏移（TIS）问题，在准确率和理由生成质量上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多基于静态图像和即时视觉线索，忽视视频中丰富的时空信息，导致时序重要性偏移（TIS）现象，难以稳定识别视频中真正关键的人物。
AI.method: 提出VIP-Net框架，包含社会线索编码器（SCE）、时序重要性校正器（TIR）和VIP推理模块；构建Temporal-VIP数据集（9249个视频片段，11类，附带重要性文本理由）；结合特征引导的大语言模型（LLM）进行理由优化。
AI.result: VIP-Net在VIP识别任务上达到67.3%准确率，显著优于SOTA模型（37.5%–53.9%）；理由与真实标注的平均相似度达0.63。
AI.conclusion: 引入时序建模与多模态线索融合可有效缓解TIS，结合理由生成提升了VIP识别的可解释性与实用性，为视频理解开辟新方向。

title: Revisiting Anthropomorphic Reflection Markers in Large Language Model Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often produce explicit reflective traces during complex reasoning, accompanied by anthropomorphic markers such as wait, hmm, and alternatively. Although these markers are commonly used as visible indicators of reflection, their mechanisms remain unclear, which leaves the risk of overthinking associated with redundant and repetitive reflection markers. In this work, we revisit anthropomorphic reflection markers, examining their necessity for reasoning and role in the reflection. We suppress these markers through prompt-level and token-level interventions, and analyze their effects on task performance across four benchmarks and two model scales. Our results show that anthropomorphic markers are not uniformly necessary for reasoning performance: suppressing them can preserve or improve performance in several settings, especially under larger sampling budgets. Meanwhile, marker suppression does not necessarily remove reflection behavior, as models can still perform marker-free verification. These suggest that anthropomorphic markers tend to be surface cues rather than reliable proxies for reflection itself, and motivate future research on reasoning mechanisms beyond explicit marker patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）在复杂推理中使用的拟人化反思标记（如wait、hmm等）的作用与必要性，通过提示级和词元级干预抑制这些标记，发现其并非推理性能的必要条件，反而可能带来冗余；抑制后模型仍可进行无标记反思，表明这些标记更多是表层线索而非反思本身的可靠指标。
AI.motivation: 拟人化反思标记虽被广泛用作推理过程的可见指示器，但其内在机制尚不明确，且存在因过度使用导致‘过度思考’的风险。
AI.method: 通过提示级（prompt-level）和词元级（token-level）干预手段抑制拟人化反思标记，在四个基准任务和两种模型规模下分析其对推理性能的影响，并考察抑制后模型是否仍具备无标记反思能力。
AI.result: 抑制拟人化标记可在多个设置下保持甚至提升推理性能（尤其在更大采样预算下）；抑制并不消除反思行为，模型仍能进行无标记验证。
AI.conclusion: 拟人化反思标记本质上是表层线索，不能作为反思行为的可靠代理，应推动超越显式标记模式的推理机制研究。

title: Global Policy-Space Response Oracles for Two-Player Zero-Sum Games
summary: The Policy-Space Response Oracles (PSRO) framework scales equilibrium computation to large zero-sum games by iteratively expanding a restricted strategy set using deep reinforcement learning (DRL). A central challenge is to construct, under limited computational budgets, a small strategy population whose induced game well approximates the full game. Existing PSRO variants typically expand the population using best responses to meta-strategies computed from restricted-game payoffs, which can lead to inefficient expansions that provide limited global improvement. We propose to guide population expansion by directly evaluating the post-expansion population quality. Specifically, we adopt Population Exploitability (PE) to measure how well a restricted strategy set represents the full game, and introduce a two-phase exploration--selection framework that explicitly minimizes PE during expansion. We instantiate this framework as Global PSRO, a practical DRL-based algorithm that efficiently generates candidate responses and estimates PE via parameter-sharing conditional neural networks. Experiments across multiple two-player zero-sum games show that Global PSRO achieves lower exploitability and approximates Nash equilibria with significantly fewer policy iterations than prior PSRO methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Global PSRO算法，通过直接评估扩展后策略集质量（以Population Exploitability为指标），在有限计算资源下更高效地逼近零和博弈的纳什均衡。
AI.motivation: 现有PSRO方法基于受限博弈收益计算元策略并生成最优响应，易导致低效扩展、全局改进有限；需在计算预算受限下构建能更好逼近完整博弈的小规模策略种群。
AI.method: 提出以Population Exploitability（PE）衡量策略集代表性，并设计两阶段探索–选择框架以显式最小化PE；具体实现为Global PSRO：利用参数共享的条件神经网络高效生成候选响应并估计PE。
AI.result: 在多个双人零和博弈实验中，Global PSRO比现有PSRO方法达到更低的可利用性（exploitability），且以显著更少的策略迭代次数逼近纳什均衡。
AI.conclusion: 直接优化策略集整体质量（而非局部最优响应）是提升PSRO效率与效果的关键路径，Global PSRO为此提供了实用、可扩展的DRL实现方案。

title: Hybrid Neural World Models
summary: Neural surrogates promise large speedups over classical solvers for physical dynamics but fail silently at sharp dynamical events such as shocks, fronts, and contact.
